chapters.text: Semtilin Pathenin Vanle leiset ahinsem tai.
Ahin leiset chu alimle agong bei ahinalaiyin, twipi thuh tah-in akikhangin achunga thimpi ana jinge; hichea chun Pathen lhagao twi chunga analam lenglen ahi.
Chuin Pathenin “Kho hungvah hen,” atileh, kho ahungvah tai.
Pathenin khovah chu aven ahile aphalheh jengin, hijeh chun Pathenin khovah le muthim ahinsep khentai.
Chua chun Pathenin khovah sun asah-in muthim chu jan asahtan ahi; chua chun nilhah ahung umdoh-in jingkah jong ahung umdohtan ahile nikho khat ahitai.
Hichun Pathenin, “Twipi lah a chun vanthamjol hung kidal hen lang twipi chu alang langa daltan hen,” atin;
hiti chun Pathenin vanthamjol ahinjamdoh paiyin, vanthamjol noiya twipi le vanthamjol chunga twipi chu adaltanton ahile akikhen lhontai.
Pathenin vanthamjol chu van asahtai; hiti chun nilhah khatma ahung umdoh-in jingkah khat ahung umdohtan, nikho ni alhingtan ahi.
Chujouvin Pathenin, “Vannoiya twipi mun khat’a hung veikhom hen lang chutengle leiset tolgo jong hung kilahdoh hen,” atileh, chutobang chun ahung um jenge.
Chuin Pathenin jong tolgo lai chu leiset asah in chule twipi veikhom chengse chu twikhanglen asahtai. Pathenin aven ahile apha lheh jengin ahi.

Hichun Pathenin, “Leiset’in hampa, amunei hamphung, agathei thingphung, aga achi dinga amunei cheh, ama ama chi dungjui cheh-in hinsepdoh hen lang leiset chunga hungkehdoh-uhen,” atileh; hiti chun ahung kehdoh tauve.
Leiset’in hampa ahinsepdoh tan, hamphung ama ama chi dungjuiyin ahung kehdoh-in, agathei amunei thingphung ama ama chi dungjui yin ahung kehdoh tauvin ahi. Pathenin avet leh apha lheh jengin ahi.
Chuti chun nilhah khat le jingkah khat ahung umdoh-in nithum alhingtai.
Pathenin, “Sunle jan sepkhen dingin vana vanthamjola avah thei vah ho hung kigol uhen lang, hiche ho chu kum kihei chin melchihnan jong, nikho simtohnan jong chule kum simtohnan jong pangu hen,
chujongle hiche ho chu vana vanthamjola konin leiset salvah in pangu hen,” atin ahile, hiti chun aumtai.
Hichea chun Pathenin vah alen cheh ni asemin, vah alenjo chu sunlaiya thunei dingin apansah-in, chule vah aneojochu janlaiya thunei dingin apansahtai; hiti chun ahsi ho jong ahinsem tai.
Hichengse chu Pathenin vana vanthamjola chun agolin, leiset chung salvah dingle
sunlaiya thunei ding, janlaiya thunei ding, chule khovah le muthim sepkhen dingin apansahtan ahi. Pathenin aven ahile apha lhehjengin ahi.
Chuti chun nilhah khatle jingkah khat ahung umdoh-in nikho li alhingtan ahi.
Chujouvin Pathenin jong, “Twipi hin ahon hona kijotle ding ganhing tamtah hinsepdoh hen lang, chule leiset chung vana vanthamjola jong vachate adung avaiyin hung leng leu hen,” atin;

hiti chun Pathenin twikhanglena ganhing lentah tah le ahing thei adang dang akijotle dingin asemin, hiche ho chun twi akidilsah sah-uvin, ama ama jat cheh-in alhauvin ahi, chujongle ajat jat’in alhanei vachate jong asemin ahi. Hichu Pathenin avetleh apha lheh jenge.
Abonchauvin Pathenin phatthei aboh-in, “Hinphauvin lang punguvin, twikhanglena twi lah dimset’uvin, chule leiset chunga vachate jong pungu hen,” ati.
Chuin nilhah khatle jingkah khat ahung umdoh-in ni nga lhinna ahitai.

Chuin Pathenin jong, “Leiset’in ama ama jat dungjui cheh-in ganhing hinso doh hen lang, ina vah ding gancha hihen aop’a kithol ganhing ho hileh chule leiset chunga gamsa ho hijongle ama ama jat dungjui cheh-in hinso doh hen,” a tin, hitobang chun ahungsoh doh tan ahi.

Hijeh chun Pathenin leiset chunga gamsa ama ama jat dungjui cheh in asemin, ina vah ding gancha jong ama ama jat bang bangin, chule tola kithol ganhing ho jong ama ama jat dungjui cheh-in asemtai. Pathenin aven, ahile apha lheh jengin ahi.

Hichun Pathenin jong, “Eihon eiho lim hin eiho tobang mihem sem uhitin; chuteng amaho chun twikhanglena nga ho chung hihen, vanlaijola vachate chung hihen; ina vahthei ganchate chung hileh, leiset pumpi chung hihen lang chule leiset chunga aop’a kithol chengse chung hijongle thunei vaihomin pangu hen,” a tin;
hiti chun Pathenin Ama lim mong mongin mihem chu ahinsemin, Pathen lim tobang bangin amapa chu ahinsemtai, Pasalle numei asemdohtan ahi.

Pathenin amani chu phatthei aboh-in, chule ajah lhona, “Hinpha lhonin lang pung lhonin, leiset chung hung dimset lhonin, nathun nunsah lhon tan; chujongle twikhanglena nga ho hihen vanhiijola vachate hileh, chule leiset chunga lhale ganhing jouse hile achunguva thunei vaihomin pang lhontan,” ati.
Pathenin hitin jong aseiyin, “Vetan, keiman leiset chunga muchi phungjouse le thing gathei amunei jouse abonchan; nangni kapedoh tai, aboncha hi neh le chah a naman lhon ding ahi.

Chule leiset’a gamsa hihen lang chunga leng vachate hileh, tola kithol ganhing hijongle, ahingthei hinna nei chengse chu aneh achah dinguva hamhing pou pou hi kapehdoh ahitai,” atin; hitobang chun aumtai.
Hichun Pathenin athil semsa chengse chu abonchan aven ahile, vetan aphabeh seh jengin ahi; hichea chun nilhah khat le jingkah khat ahung umdohin ni gup lhinna ahitai.
Hitihin vanle leiset chule asunga thiljouse akisem joutai.
Pathenin ni sagi lhinnin athilsem abonchan ajousoh tan, hijeh chun ni sagi lhinnin athilbol anatoh chengsea konin akicholdotai.
Athilsemna anatoh chengsea kona ni sagi ni chu Pathenin kicholdo na aneijeh chun hiche ni sagi lhinni chu Pathenin phatthei abohin asuthengtan ahi.
Van le leiset ahung kisemdoh a akhanggui hung kipatdoh dan ho chu hiti hi anahi. Pakai Pathenin leiset le van ahinsem patni chun,

leiset chunga tollhanga jong hamphung akeh hih laiyin, tollhanga chun loudong ima jong ahung dondoh hih laiye; ajeh chu Pakai Pathenin leiset chunga go ajuhsah hih laiyin, chule loubol ding jong mihem ana um hih laiye;
leiset’a konjoh chun meijun ajamdoh jin chutengle leichung ahinle chapkot jin ahi.
Hichun Pakai Pathenin tola leiset leingan hin mihem ahinsemin, mihem nahhom teni sunga chu ama hinna hu ahailutpeh a ahile mihem chu mihing khat ahung hidohtai.
Chujouvin Pakai Pathenin jong niso lama Eden muna chun hon khat abolin, hikoma chun amihem sempa chu akoitai.
Pakai Pathenin hon leilai sunga kon chun vetnom nomle neh dinga atui tui thingphung tamtah ahinkedoh sah-in, hon lai lunga chun hinna thingphung jong akeh-in, se le pha hetna thingphung jong akeh-e.
Edena kon chun honlei chapnou dingin vadung khat ahung longin vadung chu lhalka ka lin along khenin, vadung li asohdoh paiye.
Vadung khatna chu amin Pishon ahin, hiche hi ahi sana umna Havilah gam pumpia long kimvelle chu.
Chuche gama sana chu ahoi thei lheh jengin, samphai changle songval chang jong a kimui.
Vadung ni lhinna chu amin Gihon ahin, hiche vadung hi ahiye Cush gam pumpi kimvela long lhung keiya chu.
Vadung thum lhinna chu amin Hiddekel ahin, Assyria niso lama alonge; chule vadung li lhinna chu Euphrates ahi.
Chuin Pakai Pathenin mihempa chu Eden hon sunga apuilut’in ahonlei bol dingle angah dingin apansah tai.
Pakai Pathenin mihempa chu thu apen aseiye. “Nangman honsunga thinggajouse nanop nop’a naneh thei cheh ahin,
amavang se le pha hetna thingga khu naneh lou hel ding ahi; ijeh-nem itile hiche khu naneh ni ni leh nathi tei tei ding ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin Pakai Pathenin jong, “Mihempa achangseh a aum hi anompoi, ama kithopi dingin aki ang ngatpi ding khat sempeh ing kate,” ati.

Pakai Pathenin leingan chun gamsa jouse ahin, chunga leng vachate ahiuvin ahinsem doh-in, hiche ho ipi pi ahisah am, ti vet dingin mihempa henga chun ahin hoilutsoh keiye; hichea mihempan ganhing ho aminvo na tapou chu amina pangden ahitai.

Hiti chun mihempan jong gancha ho jong aminvo cheh-in, chunga leng vachate ahiuvin chule tollhanga gamsa ho ahiuvin aminvo soh keitai; ahin mihempa ding chun akithopi ding aki ang ngatpi thei akimudoh hih laiye.
Hijeh chun Pakai Pathenin mihempa chu aihmut milsah-in, aihmut lan chun anahgu khat aheh lhan, anung chu aphen atomjol peh-in,
chuin Pakai Pathenin jong mihempa a kona ahe lhah anahgu chun numei khat asemdoh-in amanu chu mihempa henga chun ahinpui lut’in ahi.

Hichun mihempan jong, “Tua kilhah hiche gu hi keima gua kon ahin avoujang jong keima voujanga kon ahi, hijeh a chu hiche hi numei kiti ding ahi; ipijehinem itile amanu hi pasala kona kiladoh ahi,” ati.
Hiti ahijeh a chu pasalin apa le anu alha kanga ajinu akolchahjoh ding, chutengle amani chu phe khat vou khat hilhon ding ahi.
Hichepet chun mihempa ahin ajinu ahin anigel lhon chun asagoh keo ahinalai lhonin, ahivangin akijapi lhon hih hel’e.

Hichelai chun Pakai Pathen thilsem lah lah a gul chu thilsem gamsa dang jouse sangin adu-ha thuh penin, ama chun numeinu jah a, “Hona thingga hi aboncha na neh lhon lou ding ahi, tia Pathenin asei tahbeh mong ham?” atile,
numeinun jong gul jah a chun “Hona thingga kaneh lhon ding ahinai,
ahin hon lailunga thingga vang khu Pathenin na neh lhon louhel ding, lo jong nalo lhah lhon louhel ding ahi, nabol lhonle nathi jeng lhon ding ahi, tin aseiye,” ati.
Hiche phat chun gulin jong numeinu jah a, “Nathi tah beh lhon louhel ding ahi.
Ajeh chu hiche naneh ni ni lhonle chun namitlam lhon kikeo doh-intin, Pathentoh nabah lhona thilpha thilse hetheiya naum lhon ding ahi ti Pathenin ahetjeh a asei ahibove,” atitai.

Hichun numeinun jong thingga chu aven ahile neh dingin apha lheh jengin, vetnom nom aumtan, athingga chun mi achihsah jeng ding jeh chun ahaduchat cheh tai, hijeh chun aga chu akilo lhah-in anetan ahi; amanun ajipa jong phabep apen, amapan jong anetai.
Chutah chun agigel lhonin amitlam lhon akikeodoh tan, asagoh keo ahilhon jong akihetdoh lhonin hijeh chun theichangna chu akil mat mat lhonin kaipelengin akikhailhon tan ahi.
Chuin nisa dailhah lamin hon sunga chun Pakai Pathen avah le len ahile mihempa le ajinu chun ahusa ajalhonin, hijeh chun honlai lunga thing lah a chun amanitah Pakai Pathen masanga akisel lhontai.
Ahinla Pakai Pathenin mihempa chu ahinkouvin ajah a, “Hoilama umah nahim?” atile;
amapan jong, “Hon sunga nahusa kajah a ahile kasagoh keo kahijeh a kakichat’a hijeh a chu kisela kahi,” ati.
Hichun aman jong, “Koiham nangma nasagoh keo nahi tia naseipeh a chu? Nehih beh-in tia kathupeh thingga chu naneh khattou hitam ?” atileh;
mihempan jong, “Keima eilenkhompi dinga nangman neipeh numeinu hin thingga chu eipen kananetai,” ati.
Chuphat’in Pakai Pathenin numeinu jah a, “Ipi bola hitobang pi hi nabol hi tam!” atin ahile numeinun jong, “Hiche gul hin eijol jol phat’a kaneh ahibove,” ati.

Mihempan ajinu chu amin Eve asahtai, ijeh inem itile amanu chu mihing namkim dinga minu ahitan ahi.
Chuin Pakai Pathenin mihempa le ajinu ding chun savun ponsil asempeh-in, anilhon chun asilpeh-in ahi.
Hichun Pakai Pathenin, “Ven mihem hi eiho lah a khat tobangin thilpha thilse hetheiyin aumtai, hijeh chun ijem itile tunjong hinna thingga khu kilon tin hinne leh atonsot’a hing den ding ahi,” atin;
hichejeh chun Pakai Pathenin amapa chu, leiset’a kon a kiloidoh ahijeh chun leiset loubola kivah dingin, asolmangtai.
Hiti chun mihempa chu adelmangin; Eden hon niso lama chun hinna thingphung lampi ngah dingin Vantil lhanei chu achensah-in, chule chemjam koujeju chu akipei kimvelle sah tan ahi.
Chujouvin mihempan ajinu Eve chu akitimatpin ahile amanu ahung gaiyin Cain chu ahingtai, hichea chun amanun, “Pakai panpi jalin pasal khat kaneitai,” atin
chuin amanun hichepa sopipa Abel jong chu ahing kit’e. Khonungin Abel chu kelngoi chingin ahung pangtan, Cain chu loubolin ahung pangin ahi.
Phat phabep jouvin Cain chun alousoh alhoga ahinpon Pakaiya kilhaina ahung semtai.
Abelin jong akelngoi apeng masa lah a athaopen chu ahin choiyin ahile, Pakaiyin Abel lamjoh aven athilto jong asanpeh tai.
Cain vang chu akhohsah tapon athilto jong avetpeh tapoi; hijeh chun Cain hatah-in alung hangin akaiku jengin ahi.
Chuphat’in Pakaiyin jong Cain jah a, “Ipi dinga nang le nang kilunghan nahiya, chujongle ibola kaiku jeng nahim?

Phatea nabola ahile nakichoi sang da ding ham, amavang phatea nabol louva ahile chonset’in kotphunga nachang lhi jinge, nangma suhgoi jeng dinga nagot ahin, ahivanga nangman achunga vai nahom ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Chujouvin Cain chun asopipa Abel jah a, “Gam lah ache hite,” atin; gam lah agei lhon phat’in Cain chu asopipa Abel chunga achun, hiti chun ama chu athattai.
Ajouvin Pakaiyin jong Cain jah a chun, “Nasopipa Abel hoiya ba um hitam?” atile, aman jong, “Kahepoi, keima kasopipa ching gunset kahim?” ati.
Hichun Aman jong, “Ipi nabol hitam? Nasopipa thisan chu tola konin keima heng lama ahung peng pengin ahi.
Hijeh chun tua hi nangma khut’a kona nasopipa thisan chopkang dinga hung a leiset’a jong nangma gaosap chang nahitai;
hichejeh chun tol tun lang loubol jongle chun nang dinga leiset hin imacha ahinsodoh kit louhel ding ahitai, leiset chunga adung avaiya navale ding, navathai ding ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Cain chun Pakai henga, “Nei engbolna hi kapoh jouhoi ahipoi,

vetan tunin nangman hiche leiset chunga kon hin neidel mangtan, nangma masanga jong eikisel manghel ding ahitai, leiset chunga adung avaiya kavale le ding ahitan, chutengle koi hijongle eitoh khapen pen chun eitha ding ahitai,” ati.

Hichun Pakaiyin amapa jah a, “Chuti ponte, Cain hinthat pen pen chu achunga ajat sagi vei geiya aphu kila ding ahi,” atin; hiti chun koi hile atoh khapen penin atha louna dingin Cain chunga melchihna khat akoipeh-e.
Chuphat’in Cain jong Pakai angsunga konin apotdoh-in Eden niso lama Nod gamsunga achengtai.
Cain chun ajinu akitimatpin ahile amanu ahung gaiyin Enoch chu ahin hingtai, Cain chun phat phabep jouvin khopi khat asemdoh tan, achapa min aput sah in hiche khopi min chu Enoch asahtai.
Enoch chun Irad ahingin, Irad in Mehuja-el ahingin, Mehuja-el chun Methusha-el ahingin, Methusha-el chun Lamech ahinge.
Lamech chun ji numei ni akop’in, khatnu chu amin Adah ahin ani lhinna nu chu amin Zillah ahi.
Adah chun Jabal ahingin, hichepa hi ahiye, pon buh a chengte le gancha ching ho dinga apau chu.
Chule asopipa chu amin Jubal ahin, semjang saite le theile mutte dingin amapa hi apau ahiye.
Zillah jong chun Tubal-cain ahingin, ama chun manchah ding abonchan sum-eng jong ahinlhan chule thih jong ahinkhenge. Chule Tubal-cain chun sopi numei khat aneiyin Naamah ahi.

@@Chujouvin Lamech chun ajinu teni jab a, @2“Vo Adah le Zillah ka-oso ngai lhonin lang, @1Lamech jinu te nin keima thusei hin @3ngailhon temin; @2Ajeh chu pasal khat’in eimavo jeh-in @3kathat’in, @1Gollhang khat’in eidenjeh-in kathattai.
@@@1Cain jeh a sagi vel phu akilah dingle, @2Lemech chunga som sagi vei phu @3kila ding ahiye,” ati.

Chuin Adam chun ajinu akitimatpi kit’in ahile amanun jong chapa khat ahingin, amin Seth asahtai; ijeh-inem itile amanun hitin aseiye, “Pathenin eikhohsah-in chi khaiding khat, Cain thapa Abel khel dingin, eipetai,” ati.
Seth’in jong chapa khat ahingin amin Enosh asah-e; Hichea pat chun min Pakai min ahin minphah pantai.
Hiche hi Adam khangui lekhabu ahi. Pathenin mihem ahinsem chun Pathen lim tobangin ahinsemtai.
Pasalle numei ahin semin, anilhonin phatthei aboh in, chule amin lhon jong ahinsempatni chun mihem ahinsah tan ahi.
Chujouvin Adam chu kum ja khat le kum somthum alhinin ama lim le ama melto kilo tah cha khat ahingin hichepa min chu Seth asah-in ahi.
Seth ahin nung chun Adam jong nisao tah kum ja get jen ahingin, chapa le chanu tampi jong ahingin ahi.
Adam ahin nikho mong chu abonchan kum jako le kum somthum ahingin chujouvin athitai.
Seth chu kum ja khat le kum nga alhinin Enosh ahinge.
Enosh ahin nungin Seth kum ja get le kum sagi ahingin chapa le chanu dang tampi jong ahing nalaiye.
Hiti chun Seth hin nikho a bon bonin kum jako le kum som le kum ni alhingin, chujouvin athitai.
Enosh chu kum somko alhinin Kenan ahing tan ahi.
Kenan ahin nungin Enosh chu kum ja get le kum som le kum nga ahingin, chapa le chanu dang tampi jong ahing nalaiye.
Hiti hin Enosh hin nikho chu abon bonin kum jako le kum nga alhingin chujouvin athitai.
Kenan chu kum som sagi alhinin Mahalalel ahingin ahi.
Mahalalel ahinjouvin Kenan chu kum ja get le kum som li ahingin, chapa le chanu tampi jong ahing nalaiye.
Hiti chun Kenan hin nikho a bon bonin kum jako le kum som alhingin chujouvin athitan ahi.
Mahalalel jong kum somgup le kum nga alhinin Jared ahingtai.
Jared ahin jouvin Mahalalel chu kum ja get le kum somthum le kum gup ahingin, chapa le chanu tampi ahing nalaiye.
Hiti hin Mahalalel chu ahin nikho abonchan kum ja get le kum somko le kum nga alhingin, chujouvin athitan ahi.
Jared chu kum ja khat le kum somgup le kum ni alhingin Enoch ahinge.
Enoch ahin nungin Jared chu kum ja get ahingin chapa le chanu tampi ahing nalaiyin ahi.
Hiti chun Jared hin nikho abon bonin kum jako le kum som gup le kumko alhingin, chujouvin athitai.
Enoch chu kum somgup le kum nga bou alhinin Methuselah ahingtai.
Methuselah pen nung kum ja thum sungin Enoch chu Pathen toh akilhon khom jing jengin chule chapa dangle chanu dang tampi jong ahinge.
Hiti chun Enoch hin nikho abonchan kum ja thum le kum somgup le kum nga alhingin ahi.
Enoch chu Pathen toh kilhakang louvin akilhonle jing jengin, chujouvin ama akiholmo tai, ajeh chu Pathenin ama aladohtan ahi.
Methuselah chu kum ja khat le kum somget le kum sagi alhinin Lamech ahinge.
Lamech pen nungin Methuselah chu kum ja sagi le kum somget le kum ni ahingin chapa le chanu tampi jong ahing nalaiye.
Hiti hin Methuselah hin nikho abon bonin kum jako le kum somgup le kumko alhingin chujouvin athitai.
Lamech chu kum ja khat le kum somget le kum ni alhinin chapa khat ahingin,
ama min chu Noah asah in hitin aseiye, “Pathenin agaosapsa gim genthei thoh a ikhut’uva itohgim nau hiche leiset’a kona ama hin eitha-ol sah dingu ahi,” ati.
Noah pen nung chun Lamech jong kum ja nga le kum somko le kum nga ahingin chapa le chanu tampi jong ahing nalaiyin ahi.
Hiti chun Lamech hin nikho abon bonin kum ja sagi le kum som sagi le kum sagi alhingin chujouvin athitan ahi.
Noah chu kum ja nga alhin jouvin Shem le Ham chule Japheth ahingin ahi.
Hichun leiset chunga mihem ahung pung pantan ahile alah uva chanu jong tampi ahingtauve.
Chuin Pathen chapaten mihem chanute aveuvin ahile ahoithei lheh jenguvin, hijeh chun adei dei akilhenuvin ajinu dingin akipui tauvin ahi.
Ahivangin Pakaiyin, “Kalhagao mihem sunga atonsot kumkhon chengden thei deh ponte, ajeh chu ama tahsaphe bou ahin, ahin nikho jong kum ja khat le kum som ni bo hi ding ahiye,” ati.

Hiche lai chun leiset chunga Nephilim miho ana umuvin, chujong le Pathen chapate mihem chanute henga ahung lut nungu chun amahon jong cha ahinpeh tauve; hiche ho chu khanglui laiya mi hat’a panga, mi minthang ho chu anahiuvin ahi.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin leiset chunga mihem gitlouna apunjala chule anikho khoa alung gel alungput agilou jengbou ahi chu amudoh tan,
hijeh chun mihem anasem chu Pakai amatah akisihtai; ijehinem itile hiche chu ama lung sugenthei gunset’in apangtan ahi.

Chuti ahijeh in Pakaiyin jong, “Keiman leiset tola kona kalah a kesemsa mihem hi sugam tange, mihem ahin, sahem ahin, ganhing tola kithol ahiuvin, chunga leng vachate ahiuvin, ajeh chu hichengpi kanasemdoh hi kakisih lheh tai,” ati.
Ahin Noah chu Pakai mitmun lunglhai anaum nai.
Noah hin khankho dan chu hiti hi ahiye. Noah chu midih ahin, ama khang sunga nolna bei mi ahi; Naoh chu Pathentoh kilhakang louhelin anakilhon khom jing jenge.
Noah chun chapa thum anahingin, Shem, Ham chule Japheth ahiuve.
Hichun Pathen mit vet’in leiset asegamtan pumhat’a kino na jeng adimtan ahi.
Pathenin jong leiset chu aven ahile vetan asegam heltai, ajeh chu leiset chunga tahsa mihem jousen lam ajotkhel gamtauvin ahi.

Chuphat’in Pathenin jong Noah jah a, “Keiman tahsa mihem aboncha suhgam dinga kakoi ahitai, ajeh chu amaho jeh hin leiset chunga pumhat’a kino na jeng ahung dimtan ahi, vetan keiman abonchauva leisettoh kasuh mang tha ding ahitauve.
Nangman Gopher thingin kong innei khat kisemin lang, kong innei sunga chun indan adan adanin khah tanin, chuteng asungle apo begon loi jolin.
Hitia hi nasem ding ahi, kong innei chu adung tong ja thum, avai tong som nga, chule atun tong somthum hi ding ahi.
Kong innei chu bangkot hongin lang achunglam chu tong khat semben; abanga kotpi hongin lang, indan noinung, dan ni lhinna, chule dan thum lhinna geiya nasem ding ahi.
Ajeh chu vetan, keiman vannoiya ahu neiya hing thei jouse sumang dinga leiset chunga twisang kaletsah ding, leiset’a hing thei jouse thisoh hel ding ahi.
Ahin nangma toh kitepna khat phutdoh ing katin, chutengleh kong sunga nalut ding, nangman nahin nachapate ahiuvin, najinu chule namoute toh nabonchauva kong sunga nalut diu,
chule tahsa neiya hing ganhing namkima konin navah dingin ama ama jat dungjuiyin kop khat cheh, achal khat le anu khat cheh kong sunga chu nakihoilut ding ahi.

Vachate lah a kona jong am a ama jat dungjuiya, gancha ho lah a jong ama ama jat dungjuiya, tola aop’a kithol tho lah a jong ama ama jat dungjuiya, ajat dungjui cheh a ni ni navah hing dinga nahenga hung kitol lut ding ahiuve.
Chujongleh neh thei anneh jong ajat lhingset’a nakipoh lut’a nakikhol khom ding ahi; ajeh chu hiche neh thei ho hi nang ho le ganhing ho dinga naneh uva khouva nangan diu ahi,” ati.
Noah jong hiti chun abol’in, Pathenin bol’in tia athupeh chengse chu abonchan abol bukimsoh tai.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin Noah jah a, “Na insung mitoh nabonchauvin kong sunga lut tan, ajeh chu hiche khang mite lah a kamitmun nangma hi midih nahi, ti kamudoh tai.
Sahem theng lah a konin kop sagi; kop khat na achal khat le anu khat cheh, sahem thenglou lah a konin jong kop sagi ma kop khat’a achal khat le anu khat cheh kikailut’in lang,
chunga leng vachate lah a kona jong kop sagi ma, kop khat achal khat le anu khat cheh hi ding, hichengse chu leiset chunga navah a achi khai dinga nahing hoi ding ahi.
Ijeh-inem itile ni sagi lhin ni leh keiman leiset chunga ni somli jan somli sunga go kajuh sah a kasemsa ahing theijouse hi leiset chunga kasuh manghel ding ahitai,” ati.
Pathenin athupeh bang bang chun Noah in jong abonchan abolsoh keitan ahi.
Leiset chunga twisang ahung let chun Noah kum ja gup alhingtai.
Hichun Noah achapate toh ajinu toh chule amoute toh twisanglen twipi peldoh dingin kong sunga alut tai.
Sahem theng ho lah a ahin, sahem thenglou ho lah a ahin, vachate lah a konin jong tola kitholtho lah a konin jong,
ni nin achal khat le anu khat cheh, Pathenin Noah athupeh bang chun kong sunga chun Noah koma avahlut soh keiyuve.
Chuin ni sagi lhin jouvin twisanglen twipi chun leiset chung ahinchup pan tai.
Noah hinkho kum ja gup lhin kum, lha ni lhinna, chuche lha ni som le ni sagi lhin ni, chuche nikho le le chun twipi nah jouse ajaltan, chule vanlaiya bangkot jouse jong akihong doh soh tai.
Hijeh chun leiset chunga ni som li le jan som li sungin go aju ju jengin ahi.
Hiche ni ma ma chun Noah ahin, Noah chapate Shem le Ham chule Japheth ahiuvin, Noah jinu ahin, amoute thum ahiuvin abonchauvin kong sunga aluttauve,

amaho ahiuvin, ganhing ama ama chilhah dungjuile gancha ho ama ama chilhah dungjui cheh, tola aop’a kitholtho ho jong ama ama jat dungjui cheh in, vachate jong ama ama chilhah dungjuile vacha namkima kon ahiuve.
Hiti chun hinna hu neiya tahsa a hing chengse chu akop kop’in Noah henga kong sunga chun aluttauve.
Aki jot lut chengse chu achal khat le anu khat cheh, tahsa neiya hing cheh ahiuvin, Pathenin amapa athupeh bang bang chun akijot lut soh keitauvin ahi; chujouvin Pakaiyin kot akhahtai.
Chujouvin ni somli le jan somli sungin leiset chunga twisang alenin, twipi apomtou cheh cheh tan kong chu leiset sanga sang jon alet dohtai.
Twipi leiset chunga akhangtou tel tulin nasatah-in alongtan ahile kong chu twi chunga akitolle len ahi.
Hiti chun leiset chunga ahatval tan ahile vannoiya molsang jouse jong a bonchan achup soh heltai;
Twipi chu molsang chung vum jouse chunga akhangtou peh nalaiyin tong som le tong nga jen thuh-in achup mang helin ahi.
Hijeh chun leiset chunga lha le tahsa a hing jouse, vachate ahin, gancha ho ahin, gamsa ho ahiuvin, ahon hona kiloiya leiset chunga kitol le ganhing namkim ahiuvin mihem geiyin athisoh keiyuvin;
tolgo lah a cheng anah homa hinna hu neiya haithei jouse athigam soh tan ahi.

Hiti chun aman ipi hita leh leiset chunga lamle jouse mihem ahin, gancha ahin, aop’a kitholtho jouse ahiuvin, chunga leng vachate ahiuvin asugam soh helin, abonchan leiset chunga konin suhgamin aumtauve. Noah le kong sunga aumpi chengse chubou hing hoiyin aum nah nah-uvin ahi.
Twipi chu leiset chunga ni ja khat le nisom nga sungin akikhangden nalaiye.
Ahin Pathenin Noah le amatoh umkhom kong sunga gamsa jouse le gancha ho chu ahin geldoh tan, hijeh chun Pathenin jong leiset chunga huipi anunsah-in ahile twipi chu akemsuh tul tul tan;
twipi nah jouse jong vanlaiya bangkot jouse jong akikhah soh-in, vana kona go ju jong ahaitai, hichun leiset chunga twipi chu akemsuh tul tulin,
ni ja khat le ni som nga jouvin twipi akang hei hoi tan ahi;
hiti chun lha sagi lhinna, chuche lha ni som le ni sagi lhin nin kong chu Ararat molvuma akingam tan,
twipi vang chu lha som lhin na geiyin akemsuh jing nalaiye. Lha som lhinna chuche lha ni masa nipen chun molvum asang lai lai akimun ahi.
Chujouvin nisom li lhin nin Noah-in jong kong bangkot anasem chu ahong doh-in,
va-ah khat alhadoh-in ahile, adung avaiyin agaleng len, leiset chunga twi akan loulai jeh in ahung kinung le kit tai.
Chuin aman jong leiset chunga twi kangsoh tam ti avetna dingin vakhu khat alendoh sah kit’in ahile,

leiset chunga apumpia twi avei nah lai jeh in vakhu chun akeng ngap’a touna ding mun agahol mon ama heng ma ma kong lama chun ahung kile kittai. Aman jong akhut agah lhangdoh in akimat’in kong sunga ahin kichoilut tai.
Chuin ni sagi akho ngaiyin, chujouvin konga kon chun vakhu chu alhadoh kit’a ahile,

vakhu chu nilhah lamin ama heng lama ahung kile kit’in, vetau amuh a chun thah beh a ki lou lha olive thingna khat ahinpon, hijeh chun Noah in jong leiset chunga twipi akangsoh tai, ti ahedoh paiyin ahi.
Chujouvin aman jong ni sagi ma angah kit’in chuin vakhu chu alhadoh-in ahile ahenga ahung ki le tapoi.

Noah hinkho kum ja gup le kum khatna lha masapen, chuche lha ni masapen ni chun leiset chunga twipi abonchan akangsoh heltan, hijeh chun Noah-in jong kong husin chu ahoh lhan agahven ahile vetan leiset chung chu ana go heltan ahi.
Hiti chun lha ni lhinna chuche lha ni som le ni sagi lhin nin leiset agosoh tai.
Hichun Pathenin Noah jah a thu ahinseiyin hitin ati,
“Kong sunga kon chun potdoh tan, nangma nahin, najinu ahin, nachapate ahiuvin, chule namoute ahiuvin kilhondoh pin.

Tahsa a hing ganhing jouse, naum khompi ho chu, vachate ahiuvin, gancha ho ahiuvin, leiset chunga aop’a kitholtho ho ahiuvin, hiche ho chu leiset let the thua ahung chikhaiyuva, ahung hinphat uva chule ahung punjalna dinguvin hinpuidoh tan,” ati.
Hiti chun Noah chu achapate toh, ajinu toh chule amoute toh ahung potdohtai.
Chujongle sahem chengse chu kong sunga konin, aop’a kithol tho ho jong, vachate jong, leiset’a lamle thei jouse chu anupa pauvin ahung potdoh tauve.
Chujouvin Noah chun Pakaiya dingin maicham khat asemin, gancha theng lah a kon le vacha theng lah a konin adongkhom soh keiyin maicham chunga chun pumgo thilto dingin agouvamin ahi.

Chuin anam ngui heu chu Pakaiyin ajah doh phat’in alung sunga hitin aseiye, “Mihem jeh-in keiman leiset hi gaosap kit taponge, ajeh chu mihem lung ngaito him him hi aneocha kipat’a hung gilou pan ahitai; chule ganhing kasemsa ho jong hi sumang kit ta hih hel inge.
Leiset aumlai sen muchi tu phat, chang at phat, gamdap phat gamsat phat, nipi lai le phalbi lai, sun laile jan beilou ding ahi,” ati.
Pathenin Noah le achapate phatthei aboh-in chule ajah uva, “Cha le nao hinguvin, punguvin lang leiset lochansoh keiyuvin.
Chule leiset’a sahem jouse ahiuvin, chunga leng vachate ahiuvin, tola kithol ho ahin, twikhanglena nga ho ahiuvin abonchauva nangho naki chat cheh dingu ahi, abonchauva nangho khutna kapehdoh ahitai.
Ahing theiya avah le thei jouse nangho dinga anneh a pang thei cheh ahiuve, anche louhing kapeh bang banguva chu aboncha kapehdoh nahitauve.
Amavang ahinna athisan puma atahsa chu naneh tha louhel dingu ahi.

Ijeh-inem itile nangho dinga nahinna nathisanu chu keiman aman kahin del ding ahi, sahem thaneina kona jong kahin del ding, mihem khut’a kona jong kahindel cheh ding, mi khat thisan man chu asopi chunga kahindel ding, hitia chu mihem longman kahindel cheh ding ahi.
Koi hile mihem thisan sosah chu mihem ma man ama thisan aso ding ahi, ajeh chu mihem hi Pathenin ama lim a anasem ahiye.
Nangho vang leiset le asung dimset hin cha le nao hinguvin lang, punguvin chule hinlo chansoh keiyuvin,” ati.
Chule Pathenin Noah le aumpi achapate jah a chun hitin aseiye,
“Veuvin keiman nangho toh kakitep na chu kaphutdoh tai, hiche hi nangho nunga nachilhah teu ding jong,

ahing thei jouse nangho toh chengkhom jouse ding jong, vachate ahiuvin, gancha ho ahiuvin, chule leiset’a nalhat khompiu gamsa te ahiuvin, kong sunga kona nahin kilhondohpi chengseu, leiset’a ahing thei jouse ding ahi.

Keiman nangho toh kakitepna kaphudohna ajeh pen tah chu hiche hi ahi, tahsa a hingho twisanglena kisumang kit louhel ding ahin, chule leiset suhmangna dinga jong twisang letna umkit louhel ding ahitai,” ati.
Hiti chun Pathenin “Keiman hiche kitepna kaphudoh hi nangho le nalhatkhompiu ganhing namkim ho ahiuvin chule tonsot’a khangguiya mite ding ahin, ikah uva amelchihna ding hiche hi hiding ahi,
Keiman meilhang lah a kathalpi kakoi ding, hichu leiset le kei kah a kitepna khat aum melchihna hi ding ahi.
Chule leiset’a meilhang kahinjam sah tengle thalpi chu meilhang lah a hung kilahdoh a mutheiya um ding,

hiche phat le chun keiman nangho le ganhing namkim, tahsaa hing jouse toh ikah-uva kakitepna chu hin geldoh ing ting, chutengle gotwi chu tahsa hingte sumang dinga twisanga hung lenkit louhel ding ahiye.
Hitia chu thalpi chu meilhang lah a um ding ahin, keiman hichu kamudoh tengle Pathen le leiset chunga tahsaa hing ahing theijouse kah a tonsot kumkhoa dinga kitepna chu kageldoh ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun Pathenin Noah jah a, “Hiche hi leiset chunga tahsaa hing toh kei kah a kitepna kaphudoh chu amelchihna hi ding ahi,” ati.
Kong sunga kona hung kilhondoh Noah chapate chu Shem toh Ham toh Japheth toh ahiuve; Ham kiti pa hi Canaan pa ahung hidoh-e.
Hicheng thum hi Noah chapate ahiuve, amahoa kona hi leiset pumpi mihemin achansoh ahiye.
Chuin Noah chu leiset’a loulhou masa penin ahung pangin, lengpi lei khat aboltai.
Chujouvin lengpitwi chu adonin ahile akhamtan, aponbuh sunga chun del chenglou vin alumtai.
Canaan pa Ham chun apa del cheng louva akeova a um chu agamudoh-in asopite ni aseipehin ahile,

Shem le Japheth-in jong ponsil khat ala lhonin alengkou lhona abang lhonin, anung lam ngan anung toi lhonin apa akeova um chu agakhu khum lhonin, amai lhon vang aheimang gel lhonin apa akeova um chu amu lhonpoi.
Chuin Noah chu alengpitwi kham alimdoh a ahung khah lo phat’in achapa neopenin analim bolna chu ahedoh tai.
@@Ahin aman hitin ati. @1“Canaan vang gaosap cheng hen, @2Asopi teni henga soh jouse soh-in @3hung pang hen,” atin;
@@Chujongle aman, @2“Pakai, Shem Pathen chu thangvahin umhen, @2Canaan vang ama soh-in lut hen.
@@1Pathenin Japheth punsah hen lang, @2Shem ponbuh sung dunga jong @3chensah hen; @1Ahin Canaan vang ama soh-in hung @2pang hen,” ati.
Twisang let nung chun Noah kum ja thum le kum som nga ahing nalaiye.
Hiti chun Noah hin nikho abon bonin kumjako le kum som alhingin, chujouvin athitai.
Hichengse hi Noah chapate Shem, Ham chule Japheth chilhah khanggui thusim ho chu ahiye; twisang let nung chun amahon chapa tampi ahinguvin ahi.
Japheth chapate chu Gomer toh, Magog toh, Madai toh, Javan toh, Tubal toh, Meshech toh chule Tiras toh ahiuve.
Chule Gomer chapate chu Ashkenaz toh, Riphath toh chule Togarmath toh ahiuve.
Javan chapate chu Elishah ahin, Kittim ahin, chule Dodanim ahiuve.

Hiche hoa kona hi twikhanglen pang dunga cheng miho hung kondoh ahiuve. Hicheng hi Japheth chapa te ahiuvin, ama ama gamsung cheh a ama ama pao cheh akithouvin, ainko kouvin amite lah a achenguvin ahi.
Ham chapate chu Cush ahin, Egypt ahin, Put ahin chule Canaan ahi.
Cush chapate chu Seba ahin, Havilah ahin, sabtah ahin, Raamah ahin chule Sabteca ahiuve. Raamah chapate ni chu Sheba le Dedan ahilhone.
Cush-in leiset chunga mihat’a hung pang masapen Nimrod chu ahing-in ahi.
Pakai mitmun hichepa chu gamlen sadel hat tah ahunghin, hijehchun, “Nimrod banga Pakai mitmua gamlen sal del hat,” tin seichah-in ana um e.
Ama lenggam sunga khopi aluchang cheh chu Babel toh, Erech toh, chule Accad toh Calneh toh ahiuvin, abonchauva hi Shinar gamsunga um cheh ahiuve.
Ashur chu hiche gama hi hung kondoh ahin, chuin amahin Nineveh khopi toh, Rehoboth-ir khopi toh chule Calah khopi toh ahin phutdohin,
Nineveh le Calah kikah a chun Resen khopi aphutdoh-in, hiche hi khopi lenpen tah ahi.
Egypt chun Ludim toh, Anamim toh, Lehabim toh, Naphtuhim toh,
Pathrusim toh Casluhim (Philistine te hung kondoh napa) toh, chule Caphtorim toh ahingin ahi.
Canaanin jong achapa tahpen Sidon le Heth ahingin,
chule Jebus mite ahiuvin, Amor mite ahiuvin, Girgash mite ahiuvin,
Hivi miho ahiuvin, Arki mite ahiuvin, Sin mite ahiuvin,
Arvad mite ahiuvin, Zemar mite ahiuvin, Hamath mite ahiuvin, ama hinsa ahi cheh-uve. Khonung nungin Canaan insung kon mite chu gamtina akithe cheh soh keiyuvin ahi.

Chule Canaan mite gamgi chu Sidona pat Gerar lang jonin Gaza geiyin akilhung lut peh-in, Sodom lang jonin akilhungin, Gomorrah aphan, Admah ahinphan, chule Zeboiim ahopan Lasha geiyin akilhung lutpeh-e.
Hichengse hi Ham chapate ahiuvin, ama ama insung dungjuile apao dungjuiyu, agam dungjuiyu chule ajat dungjuiyuva ahiye.
Japheth upa, Eber chapate konna abulpi pau Shem jong chun cha aneinai.
Shem chapate chu Elam toh, Asshur toh Arpachshad toh, Lud toh chule Aram toh ahiuve.
Chule Aram chapate chu Uz ahin, Hul ahin, Gether ahin, chule Mash ahi.
Arpachshad chun Shelah ahingin chule Shelah chun Eber ahingin ahi.
Eber chun cha ni ahingin, khatpa chu ama khanglaiya leiset pao kikhen ahijeh-in amin Peleg akitin chule asopipa min chu Joktan ahi.
Joktan chun chapa hicheng hi ahinge, Almodad ahin, Sheleph ahin, Hazarmaveth ahin, Jerah ahin,
Hadoram ahin, Uzal ahin, Diklah ahin,
Obal ahin, Abimael ahin Sheba ahin,
Ophir ahin, Havilah ahin chule Jobab ahi, hichengse hi abonchauva Joktan chapate ahi cheh-uve.
Chule amaho hi achenna gamu agamgi Mesha a pat’in Sephar langjonin ahung kilhungin, nisolama thing lhang gamsung geiyin ahung kilhung lutpeh-in ahi.
Hichengse hi ama ama insung luitgjuile ajat dungjuiyu, agam dungjuiyu le ajat dungjuiyuva Shem chapate chu ahiuve.
Hiche ho hi amaho jat lah a akhanggui dungjuiyuva Noah insung koncheh ahiuvin, hicheng nam jat’a kona hi twisang let nunga chu leiset chunga mi hung kithe chansoh ahiye.
Hiche lai chun leiset pumpia mi pao khat bou ahin, apao cheng manu jong thakhat cheh anahi.
Chuin niso lama konin ahung khochauvun ahile Shinar gamsunga chun phaicham mun khat amudoh-uvin, hikoma chun achengtauve.
Hichun amaho khat le khat akihouvun, “Hunguvin cheh gadengu hitin goutah lhengu hite,” akitiuvin; hiti chun song panna pang dingin cheh amanguvin, song lou dingin leingan amanguve.

Chujouvin amahon jong, “Hunguvin khopi khat kisah uhitin, chule insang khat atingvum vantoh kibang khat sadoh uhitin, imin kithan sah uhite, achutiloule leiset chunga ikimoh thethang gam dingu ahi,” atiuvin.
Chuin mihem chapate khopi sahdoh chuleh ainsang sahdoh-u chu ve dingin Pakai ahung kum lhatai.

Pakaiyin jong, “Vetan amaho hi mihem jat khatseh ahiuvin, pao khatbou athouve; chule hiche hi ipi ahinbol thei dingu ham ti akipatna bou ahi nalaiyin, hijeh chun tua pat hin bol dinga agot jouseu chu abolmou hung umlou hel ding ahi.
Hunguvin, kum lhau hitin apao-u gasuh khen peh uhite, chuti le khat le khat athusei kihet mon umtauvinte.” ati.
Hiti chun Pakaiyin chukom muna kon chun leiset chung chansoh helin amaho chu ahin the thangsoh keiyin ahile amahon jong akhopi sah banu jong anga tauve.

Hijeh a chu hiche khopi chu amin Babel kisah ahi, ijeh-inem itile hikom muna chu Pakaiyin leiset mite pao asuh khenpeh ahin, chule hikoma kona chu Pakaiyin abonchauva leiset chung chansoh a alhinthe thangsoh kei ahitai.
Hiche ho hi Shem khanggui thusim ho ahiye. Twisang let nung kum ni jouvin Shem chu kum ja khat alhingin achapa Arpachshad chu ahinge;
Arpachshad pen nung chun Shem kum ja nga ahing nalai yin chapa dang chanu dang jong aneibei.
Arpachshad chu kum somthum le kum nga alhinin Shelah ahinge.
Shelah pen nungin Arpachshad chu kum ja li le kum thum ahingin, chapa dang chanu dang jong ahinbei.
Shelah chu kum som thum alhinin Eber ahinge;
Eber pen nung chun Shelah chu kum ja li le kum thum ahingin chapa dang chanu dang jong ahinbei.
Eber chu kum som thum le kum li alhinin Peleg ahingin ahi.
Peleg pen nung chun Eber kum ja li le kum som thum ahingin chapa dang chanu jong ahing nalaiye.
Peleg chu kum som thum alhinin Reu ahingin ahi.
Reu pen nungin Peleg chu kum ja ni le kumko ahingin chule chapa dang chanu dang jong ahing nalaiye.
Reu chu kum somthum le kum ni bo alhinin Serug ahingtai;
Chule Serug ahin nung chun Reu kum ja ni le kum sagi ahinbe nalaiyin, chapa dang chanu dang jong ahing nalaiye.
Serug jong chu kum somthum bou alhinin Nahor ahingtai;
Nahor pen nungin Serug kum ja ni ahingin chapa dang chanu dang jong ahinbei.
Nahor chu kum som ni le kumko bo alhinnin Terah ahingtan ahi;
Terah pen jouvin Nahor jong kum ja khat le kum som le kum ko ahin ben, chapa dang chanu dang jong ahing nalaiye.
Terah vang chu kum som sagi jen ahung lhinin Abram, Nahor chule Haran ahin hingin ahi.
Terah chilhah khanggui chu hicheng hi ahi. Terah chun Abram, Nahor chule Haran ahingin; chule Haran chun Lot ahinge.
Haran chu apa Terah thi masangin, apenna Chaldea gama Ur khopia chun athitai.
Abram le Nahor vang chun ji aneigel lhonin, Abram jinu chu amin Sarai ahin, Nahor jinu min chu Milcah ahin, Haran chanu ahiye; amapa chu Milcah le Iscah hingpa apa lhon ahi.
Ahin Sarai chu achingin cha hing louvin aumtai.

Terah chun achapa Abram ahin, Haran chapa atupa Lot ahin, amou nu, achapa Abram jinu Sarai ahin, akipuiyin abonchauvin Chaldea gam khopi Ur a kon chun Canaan gam jon dingin achetauve; Hilran khopi ahinphah phat uvin hikoma chun achengtauvin ahi.
Hichun Terah hin nikho kum ja ni le kum nga alhingtai; chujouvin Haran khoa chun Terah athi den tai.
Pakaiyin Abramjah a chun, “Nagam leiset le naphung nachang chule na inkote dalhan lang keiman vetsah dinga kagotna gam chu jon tan.
Ajeh chu keiman nangma nam lentah a kasemdoh a phatthei kaboh ding, chujongle namin kakithansah ding ahin, hitia chu namin hi phattheina khat hidoh ding ahi.
Chule nangma phat thei naboh te chu phatthei boh ing ting, nangma nagaosap chu kagaosap ding, chujongle nangma jeh a leiset chunga phung namkim phatthei chang ding ahiuve,” ati.
Hijeh chun Pakaiyin ajah a aseipeh bang bangin Abram achetai, chule Lot’in ama akilhonpi. Haran dalha akichaodoh chun Abram kum som sagi le kum nga alhingtan ahi.

Abramin ajinu Sarai le asopipa chapa Lot akipuiyin, akilamdohu agou chengseu akichom khomuvin, Haran khoa peng amite chengseu toh Canaan gam jon din ahung kipatdoh-uvin; hiti chun Canaan gam ahung lhungtauve.
Abram chun agamsung chu Shechem mun geile Moreh a gangpi thingphung geiyin ahinjotpan ahile hichelai chun agamsunga Canaan miho jeng anachenguvin ahi.

Chuin Abram henga Pakai ahung kilah-in chule ajah a. “Hiche gam hi keiman nason nachilhah ho kapeh ding ahi,” atipeh-e. Hijeh chun ama pan jong ahenga hung kilah Pakaiya dingin hikoma chun maicham khat asemin ahi.

Chukoma pat chun Bethel niso lama molsang lam ajonin, nilhum lama Bethel khopi, niso lama Ai khopi, akah a chun aponbuh akisonin aki ngai. Hikoma chun amapan Pakaiya maicham khat asemin chule Pakai minin ataotai.
Chuin Abram chebe kit nalai dingin akipat doh kit’in, hiti chun Negeb lam jonin achepai paiye.
Hiche lai chun gamsunga kel anathan, hijeh chun Abram jong Egypt gama puhsui dingin achesuh tai; ijeh-inem itile gamsunga kel ahahsa behseh jengin ahi.
Ahin Egypt gamsung alut ding phat’in aman ajinu Sarai jah a, “Veteh, mitvet’a numei mel hoitah nahi hi keiman kahet sa nahin,
Egypt miten nahin mu uhen lang hile, ‘hiche nu hi ajinu ahi,’ tiuvin tin, chutengle keima eithat’uvin tin nang naki hing hoi dingu ahi.
Nang chu kei sopinu hi kahi tin’kiseiyin lang hile chun kei dingin phapenin tin chule nangma jala chu kei jong eihing hoi dingu ahi,” ati.
Abram chu Egypt ahung lhun phat’in Egypt miten ajinu chu aveuvin ahile mitvet dingin amel hoi lheh jengin ahi.
Chule Pharaoh lengpa chapaten amudoh phat’uvin Pharaoh koma amanu chu aphatsei lheh jengtauve. Hijeh chun numeinu chu Pharaoh insunga apuilut tauvin ahi.

Chujongle amanu jeh chun amapan Abram chu aphatbol lhehjengin, kelngoite ahin, bongchalte ahin, sanganchal ho ahiuvin, soh pasal hihen soh numei ho hileh, sa-nganpi ho ahin sangongsang ho ahiuvin aneidoh sah lo tai.
Ahinla Pakaiyin Pharaoh le ainsung mitechu Abram jinu Sarai chunga thilsoh jeh chun gimna lentah-in abolgim lheh jengtan ahi.
Hijeh chun Pharaoh in jong Abram chu akouvin ajah a, “Kachunga ipi dinga hitobang thilpi hi nabol hitam? Hiche nu hi najinu ahi tia ibola neiseipeh lou ham?
Ipi dinga ama hi “kasopinu ahibove,” tia nasei ham? Kei chunla kaji dingin kana kipui man tan! Ven, tun jong hikoma najinu aume, kipuiyin lang chedoh tan,” ati.
Ama chung chang thudola chun Pharaoh’in miho thu apen, hijeh chun amahon amapa chu ajinu toh chule anei chengse chutoh asoldoh thatauvin ahi.
Hiti chun Abram amatah ajinu toh, anei chengse toh chule Lot toh kilhonin Negeb jonin achetoutai.
Abram chu ganchan jong, dangka jong chule sangan jong ahao lheh jengtan ahi.
Negeb a kon jong chun Bethel geiyin achen, masanga ponbuh anasondoh na mun Bethel le Ai kikah chan gei,
amasa maicham anasemdohna mun gei chun achepeh-in, hikoma chun Abram Pakai minin ataovin ahi.
Abram toh hung kilhondoh Lot jong chun kelngoi jong bongchal jong chule ponbuh jong aneidoh tai;
hijeh chun thakhat’a achen khom lhon ding chu agamin jong atoh tapoi; ipi jeh-inem itile anei agou lhon atam behseh jeng tan, hijeh chun thakhat’a cheng khom theidan ahilhon tapon ahi.
Chule Abram gancha chingho leh Lot gancha chingho kah a kitomona alengtai. Hiche lai chun Canaan mite le Periz mite agamsunga chun ana chenguve.
Abram injong Lot jah a chun, “Ahipoi katao ahi, nang le kei kah ahin, nagancha chingho le kei gancha chingho kah ahin kitomona len dabeh le aphai, ajeh chu eiho inko khat cheh ihibouvui.

Namasanga gam hi apumpia nachan theiya um hilou ham? Katao ahiye, kei koma konin nabungin ki-inchontan. Nangman veilam nalhah dingle keima jetlama cheng ting, jetlama nache dingle keima veilama cheng kate,” ati.

Hichun Lot jong akhodah in avet le Jordan vadung phaicham chu amudoh-in, amun tina twi atha lhingin, Pakai honsung abang jengin, Zoar lam jotna Egypt gamsung abang jengin ahi. Hiche lai chu Pakaiyin Sodom le Gomorrah asuhmang masang anahi.
Hijeh chun Lot’in jong Jordan vadung phaicham pumpi chu akilhenin, hiti chun Lot chu niso lamjonin akitoltai; hitobang hin amani aki-inkhen lhontan ahi.
Abram chu Canaan gamsunga acheng denin, Lot chu chuche phaichama khopi dunga chun achengle len, Sodom khopi geiyin aponbuh aga songdoh peh-in ahi.
Sodom mite chu mi gilou jeng ahiuvin, Pakai koma melse tah tah a chonse jeng anahiuve.
Lot’in aki-inkhenpi nung chun Pakaiyin Abram jah a, “Khodah-inlang na umna muna kon chun sahlam, lhanglam, niso lam nilhum lam golvet vet temin;
ajeh chu nangman namuphah chan gam hi aboncha nang nahin nason nachilhahte ahiuvin atonsot geiya nangho dinga kapeh ding nahiuve.
Nason nachilhahte chu keiman leiset’a leivui jat kaphahsah ding ahin, leiset leivui jat simjouva mihem chun nang son le chilhah jong asimjou bep ding ahibouve.
Kipatdoh-in lang agamsung hi adung avai asuh atungin gakholtoh-in, ajeh chu ken nangma kapeh ding ahi,” ati.
Hijeh chun Abramin aponbuh akijeldoh-in ahungpeh in Hebron khopi vela Mamre muna gangpi phung dunga chun achengtai; chule aman hikoma chun Pakaiya dingin maicham khat asemin ahi.
Hiche lai chun hiti hin thu anasohe : Shinar gam lengpa Amraphel nikho lai, Ellasar gam lengpa Arioch nikho lai, Elam gam lengpa Chedorlaomer nikho lai chule Goiim gam lengpa Tidal nikho laiyin,
amaho hin Sodom lengpa Bera douna le Gomorrah lengpa Birsha douna, Admah lengpa Shinab douna le Zeboiim le Zoar kiti Bela lengpa Shemeber dounan gal aboltauve.
Hichengse hi abonchan akithouvin, chi dillen kiti Siddim phaichama khun ahung kikhom tauvin ahi.
Kum som le kum ni sunga amaho hi Chedorlaomer soh natonga anapang ahiuvin, kum som le kum thum lhin kum chun adouvin ahung pangtauve.

Kum som le kum li lhin kum chun Chedorlaomer le apankhompi lengho chu ahung konuvin, Rephaim mite chu Ashteroth-karnaim achun ajouvun, Zuzim mite chu Hama chun ajouvun, Emim mite chu Shaveh-kiriathaim a chun ajouvun,
chule Hor mite chu agamuva amolsangu Seir a pat’in gamthip lang gamgi Elparan chan geiyin aga joupeh-uvin;
chuin ahung kinung le kit’uvin Kadesh kiti Enmishpat a chun Hazazontamar a cheng Amor mite leh Amalek mite chu agam pumpin ajoutauve.
Chutah chun Sodom lengpa ahin, Gomorrah lengpa ahin, Admah lengpa ahin, Zeboiim lengpa ahin, Zoar kiti Bela lengpa ahin akonuvin Siddim phaichama chun gal asat’uvin,
Elam lengpa Chedorlaomer le Goiim lengpa Tidal toh, Shinar lengpa Amraphel toh chule Ellasar lengpa Arioch chutoh akisat’uvin, hicheng leng li ho chun leng nga ho chu anadouvun ahi.
Siddim phaichama chun bon ngan bol tampi aveiyin, Sodom lengpa le Gomorrah lengpa ajamna lam lhona bolsung dunga chun alhalut lhontan, adangho vang chu molsanglama ajamtouvun ahi.
Chuin galmi ten Sodom le Gomorrah mite thilkeo le aneh achah dingjouseu abonchan akichom khomuvin achetauve.
Amaho chun Abram sopipa chapa Lot, Sodom a chengpa jong chu, athilkeo pumin akimat’uvin akipui tauve.

Chuin gala jamdoh mi khat ahungin Hebrew mi Abram jah a athusoh chu ahung seipeh tai; hiche lai chun ama Eshcol le Aner sopipa, Amor mi Mamre gangpi thingphung vel dunga chun anacheng nalaiye, amaho jong chu Abram toh kitepna neiya tha khat’a pangkhom ahiuve.
Abram chu a inkopa gal hingin akaitauve, ti ajah doh phat’in galbol kihil themsa cheh, ainsunga pengden mihem ja thumle som le get amatah-in alamkaiyin Dan geiyin aga nungdel peh-in ahi.
Janin ama le asohten amaho chu adelkhumuvin, anochehsoh keiyuvin, Damascus khopi nisolama Hobah chan geiyin agadelpeh-uvin ahi.
Hiti aman thilkeo jouse jong ainkopa Lot jong, athilkeo chengse toh, numeiho ahiuyin mipi ahiuvin abonchan ahin nung puisoh tai.
Abramin Chedorlaomer le apankhompi lengho agajoa ahungkile lam chun Sodom lengpan ‘lengpa phaicham kiti’, Shaveh phaichama chun alamto dingin ahunge.
Salem lengpa Melchizedek chun changlhah le lengpitwi ahinpoh peh-e; ama hi Pathen chungnung pen thempua pang ahi.
@@Hijeh chun aman Abram chu phatthei aboh-in hitin aseiye, @2“Van le leiset hinphutdoh a Pathen @3chungnung pen koma, @2Abram phatthei boh chang hen,
@@@1Chujongle nagalte nakhut luma lousah a, @1Pathen chungnung pen jong nunnom hen!” ati. Chuin Abramin Melchizedek chu thil jousea konin hopsoma hop khat khat apesoh keiye.
Hichun Sodom lengpan Abram jah a, “Thilkeo ho chu kilah paiyin lang miho chu neinungpeh tan,” atile;
Abramin jong, Sodom lengpa jah a chun, “Van le leiset hinphutdoh Pakai Pathen chungnung pen koma kakhut katunsa ahitai,
patse jang khatcha hihen lang kengchot khao jeng cha hijongle nang thil kiti pou pou khatcha kalah louhel ding ahi, nangman ‘Abram kahaodoh sah tai,’ tia naseithei louna dingin;
gollhanghon anehdoh u le kalhonpi hon akilah-u tilou keiman imacha ding katipoi; Aner le Eshcol chule Mamre’n vang ama ama chan dingdol cheh kilah uhen,” ati.
Hicheng thilsoh nung hin Abram in mu aneipet’in ahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhungin hitin aseiye, “Abram kicha hih-in, Keima nalumdal kahin, kipaman jong atama tam nachan ding ahi,” ati.

Ahinla Abram chun, “O Pakai ka Pathen ipi dinga kei ipi neipeh ding ham? Ajeh chu keila cha neilouvin kahiti ti jengin, chule ka insunga kagoulo ding jong hi Damascus khoa Eliezer chu hung hi ding ahibouve,” ati.
Abramin hitin jong ati, “Vetan; nangman chikhai dingla neipe pon, hijeh chun hinvetan, ka-insung bolam khat’in kagou alo ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun vetan ahenga Pakai thusei ahung lhung paiyin hitin aseiye, “Hichepa chun nagou alo deh louhel ding ahi, nangma taiguiya peng mong khat’in nagou alo ding ahibouve,” atin;
chuin polama ahinpuidoh-in, “Van lam vetemin, chule ajat nasimjou nah am ahisite khu simin,” ati. Hichun ajah a, “Nason nachilhah jong hito bang khu hung hi ding ahiuve,” atipeh-e.
Chuphat’in aman jong Pakaiya tahsanna det tah in aneitan ahile hichu ama dingin dih channan akisimpeh tai.
Chujouvin aman ajah a, “Hiche gam hi nato dingin napenge, tia Chaldea gam Ur khopia kona nangma nahinpuidoh a Pakai chu keima kahi,” atin ahile,
aman jong, “O Pakai ka Pathen, hiche hi kalo ding ahi, ti ipia iti kahetdoh ding ham?” ati.

Hijeh chun aman jong ajah a, “Bongla kumthum lhingsa khat le kella kumthum lhingsa khat toh, kelngoi chal kumthum lhingsa khat toh chule vahui nou khat le vapal nou khat toh kahenga hinchoitan,” atipeh-e.
Chuphat’in aman hichengse chu abonchan akaikhomin, athat’in ahapsat cheh-in, ahap langton ajam cheh-in, vachate ni vang chu asemkeh poi.
Ahin muthong hiche salong chung dunga chun ahung touvin ahile Abramin adel mang mangin ahi.
Nisa alhumsuh tel tul khun Abram chu ngui jenjuntah-in ihmutson ahinphan, chujongle vetan tijat umtah muthim lhangkhal ahungjingin amapa chu ahinjin khum tai.

Chutah chun aman Abram jah a, “Nason nachilhate chu agamsung hilou hel khat’a kholthama gapang ding ahiuve ti hi kichen tah-in kihettan; soh a gapang dingu kum ja li sunga mi bol genthei thoh aga um ding ahiuve;
hijongle keiman agasoh channau nam mite chunga thu kahintan ding, hiche joule chun amaho neile gou thalhingset’a hungdoh ding ahiuve;
nangman vang lung mong seta napate heng najot ding, nateh thia kivui ding nahibouve.
Chule amaho hi khangli lhin phatle hikoma hung kite kit ding ahiuve, ajeh chu tuchan gei hin Amor mite khan gitlouna akichai hih laiye,” ati.
Nisa alhum phat’in kho ahungjing pan tan ahile vetan, meikhu bel sung khat’a mei alleng lungin ahung kiton hichepi chu salong kihapsat teni kah dunga chun ahung kitolle len ahi.
Hiche nikho chun Pakaiyin Abram toh kitepna khat anasemin hitin anaseiye, “Keiman nason nachilhahte kapeh gam chu hiche hi ahi, Egypt vadunga pat luipi dung gei, Euphrates vadung gei,
Ken miho ahiuvin, Keniz miho ahiuvin, Kadmon mite ahin,
Hit mite ahin, Periz mite ahin, Rephaim mi ahin,
Amor mite ahiuvin, Canaan mite ahiuvin, Girgash miho ahiuvin chule Jebus miho gam ahiuve,” ati.
Abram jinu Sarai chun cha ahinpeh tapoi; ahin amanu chun Egypt mi soh numei khat ana neiyin amanu min chu Hagar ahi.

Saraiyin jong Abram jah a chun “Ven Pakaiyin keilah cha eineisah tapon, lungset tah-in kasohnu koma khun galut tan, ijem itile amanua kona khu ka-inchendoh sah thei nahi,” atile, Abram in jong Sarai thu angaitai.
Hiti chun Abram Canaan gamsunga achen kal kum som alhinin Abram jinu Saraiyin ama sohnu Egypt mi Hagar chu apuiyin ajipa Abram chun jia anei dingin agapetai.
Chuin ama jong Hagar koma agalut’in ahile amanun nao ahinvop tai, ahin nao avop akihetdoh phat’in aman apinu chu noise tah-in avetan ahi.

Hiche phat chun Saraiyin jong Abram jah a, “Hitobanga eikivetneo na hi nang chunga lhungjeng hen! Kenba kasoh nu nakikoipi dingin kanapen, aman nao avop akihetdoh phat’in noise tah-in eivetai. Kei le nang kah a Pakai thu tanin hung pang jeng hen!” atitai.

Ahinla Abram chun Sarai jah a, “Vetangem, nasohnu hiya nakhut’a um hiya khula em, namit vet’a nadeilam lamin bol jeng tangem,” atile, chuphat’in Saraiyin jong amanu thohda dan abolgimin ahile, akoma konin amanu ajam mangtai.
Amanu chu Pakai Vantilin gamthip’a twikhuh phung khat’a agamudoh-in ahi; hiche twikhuh chu Shur jotna lampia umah ahiye.
Ama chun, “Sarai sohnu Hagar hoilama kona hung nahiya hoilam jonding kigo nahim?” ahintin ahile, amanun jong, “Kapi Sarai koma kona hung jamdoh kahi,” ati.
Hichun Pakai Vantil in jong amanu jah a, “Napi henga kile kit’in lang anoiya gakithol jon,” atipeh-e.
Pakai Vantil chun amanu jah a hitin jong aseiye, “Keiman nason nachilhah hapun puna kapunsah ding ahin, hung tamval intin simjou hoi hilou ding ahiuve,” ati.
Pakai Vantil chun amanu jah a, “Ven nangman nao navop’in chapa khat nahin ding ama chu amin Ishmael nasah ding ahi, ijeh-inem itile Pakaiyin nagimna chu nakho ngaipeh tai.
Chule amapa chu mihem lah a gama sangan lungthim bei bang ding, mitin douna khut ahinlap a chule mitin khut ama chunga hung chu ding, chule aphunggol jouse toh kidoutoa hung khosa ding ahi,” ati.

Chuphat’in amanun ajah a thu hinsei Pakai chu aminin akouvin, “Nangma hi keima eimudoh a Pathen nahi,” ati; ajeh chu amanun, “Tahbeh monga keiman Pathen kamua chule ama kamu nunga kahinga kaumnah lai ham?” atin ahi.
Hiche jeh chun hiche twikhuh chu Beerlahairoi tin akiminvo tai; ven atwikhuh hi Kadesh le Bered kikah a umah ahiye.
Hiti chun Hagarin Abram chu chapa khat ahinpeh-in, Abram in jong Hagarin ahinpeh achapa chu amin Ishmael asahtai.
Hagarin Abram dinga Ishmael ahin pehchun Abram kum som get le kum gup alhing tan ahi.
Abram chu kum som ko le kum ko alhinin Pakai Abram henga ahung kilah-in ajah a, “Keima Pathen hat chungnung kahi, ka angsunga vahle jing jengin lang chule nolna beiyin um jingin.
Keiman kei le nang kah a dingin kakitepna napeng katin, chutengle hapun puna kapunsah ding nahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Abramin tola amai asuluttai, hichun Pathenin ahin houvin hitin aseiye,
“Vetan keima kitepna chu nanga umah ahitan; hijeh a chu nangma chitin namtin dinga pa nahung hi ding ahi .
Namin jong Abram kiti kit lou ding, namin chu Abraham joh kiti ding ahitai; ajeh chu keiman nangma hi chitin namtin dinga mipa kahisah nahitai.
Keiman nacha nanao hapun puna kapunsah a, nanga kona namtin vaipi kasemdoh ding chule leng dingho jeng jong nanga kona hung kondoh cheh ding ahiuve.

Chutia chu keiman kei le nang kah a kakitepna chu kaphudoh ding ahin, nangma nunga nason nachilhahte toh kakah ajong hichu akhang khanguva atonsot na kitepna hi jing ding, nangle nanunga nason nachilhahte dinga na Pathenu kahi jing ding ahi.
Chujongle nangle nanunga nason nachilhahte chu nakholjinna gam hi ahin, Canaan gam pumpi ahin, natonsot goulo dinguva kapeh ding, amaho dinga jong a Pathenu kahi jing ding ahi,” ati.
Pathenin Abraham jah a chun, “Nangma tah jengin jong kakitepna hi nanit jing ding, nang ding jong na nunga nason nachilhahte dinga jong akhang lhum keiyuva ding ahi.
Keile nangho kah a, ‘nanunga nason nachilhahte toh ikah uva nanghon nanit jing dingu ahi kati’ keima kitepna chu hiche hi ahi, nalah uva pasal tapou chu achep kitan cheh ding ahi.
Hitia chu natahsavun valu aboh lai chu nachep’u kitansoh kei ding, hichu kei le nangho kah a kitepna melchih jingna hi ding ahiye.
Nalah uva pasal tapou chu niget ahung lhin lhin le achep kitan jeng ding, nakhang khanguva ding ahi; na insung peng den hi hen lang,
na-insunga pengpa jong suma kichodohpa jong akoi koiya chu achep kitan cheh ding, hitia chu keima kitepna chu atonsot kitepna um dinga natahsavun uva naput dingu ahi.
Chep tanlou pasal tapou, atahsavun val aboh lai kitan lou jouse chu keima kitepna asuh keh ahitan, hitobang mihing chu amite lah a kona kipaidoh jeng ding ahi,” ati.
Pathenin Abraham jah a, chun “Najinu Sarai jong amin Sarai nati lou ding ahitai, ijeh-inem itile amanu min jong hi Sarah hijo ding ahi.

Keiman amanu hi phatthei kaboh a chujongle amanu a kona hi chapa khat kapeh ding nahi; hitia chu keiman amanu hi phatthei kaboh a ama jong chitin namtin nu hung hi ding, mitin vaipi leng ding ho jeng jong a manu a kona hung pengdoh ding ahiuve,” ati.

Hichun Abraham jong akunin chule anuitai, chuin alungthimin amale ama akihouvin, “Kum ja khat lhingsan jong cha ahinnah lai ding ham? Chule kum somko lhingsa Sarah jong khun cha ahin mong nah ding ham?” ati.
Chuin Abrahamin jong Pathen henga chun, “O kadeh, Ishmael chu nangma angsunga hingthei dol hivangle ong!” atileh;

Pathenin jong, “Thonlou hela najinu Sarah khun chapa khat nahin hinpeh ding ahin, nangman ama min chu Isaac nasah ding ahi. Keiman amale ama nunga ason achilhahte dinga keima kitepna chu atonsot geiya kitepna um jing dinga kaphudoh ding ahi.

Ishmael dingin jong keiman nathu ka ngaipeh tai: ven ama khu phatthei kaboh a chule acha anao kapunsah ding, ajat hakeh a kakikeh sah ding, gamvai pothei cheh pasal somle ni jong ahin hindoh ding ahin, hitia chu ama khu nam lentah kasosah ding ahi.
Ahinla keima kitepna vang chu Sarah-in khovei tulai phat’a nahin hinpeh ding Isaac chuto bou kaphudoh ding ahi,” ati.
Amatoh akihou chai phat’in Pathen chu Abraham koma konin chunglama akaltou tai.

Chujouvin Abrahamin jong achapa Ishmael ahin, sohho ama insunga pengden hihen suma achoh tho hijongle, Abraham mite lah a pasal tapou chu apuikhomin, Pathenin aseipeh bang bang chun, hiche nikho le le chun atahsavun valu athenglou lai chu achep atanpeh soh keiyin ahi.
Abraham chu atahsavun val athenglou lai achep akitan chun akum kum somko le kumko alhingtai.
Chule achapa Ishmael chu atahsavun val athenglou achep akitan chun kum somle kumthum analhingtan ahi.
Chuche nikho le lea chu Abraham le achapa Ishmael achep lhon kitan ahin,
chule ainsung pasal jouse, insunga pengden hihen lang gamdang mi chapa suma kichoh tho hijongle abonchan amatoh thakhat’a achep kitan thah cheh ahiuve.
Mamre gangpi phunga aponbuh kotphung bula chun sun nisa asat jeh-in anatouvin ahile Pakai ahenga a hung kilah-in ahi.
Ama jong akhodah-in agahvet’a ahile vetan amasangah mi thum ana dinguvin ahi. Amaho cheng chu amu phat’in aga lamdot dingin ama jong aponbuh kot bul lama chun alhaidoh loiyin tola agaboh khup’in,
chuin aman, “Ka Pakai, nang vet dinga lung lhaina kimu theidola ka uma ahile lungset tah-in nasohpa hi jotpai paiyin chetou paida tan.
Twi them khattou hung kidomin tin nakengphang te niu kisop-uvin lang hiche thing lima hin kicholdo ta diuvin,

keiman nakithado doh na dinguva naneh dinguvin changlhah kam khattou gahol ing katin, chujou tengle chepai pai nauvin nate, nasohpa hi neihinjotpa ngalu ahitah a ahileh,” ati. Chuphat’in amahon jong, “Nasei bang chun hinboltan,” ati tauve.
Hichun Abraham jong ponbuh sunga Sarah henga alhailut loiyin, “Kinloi tahin changbong ate na dimthum tedoh-in lang twitoh meh nangin, chule changlhah hin kangloi temin,” agatin;
chuin Abraham chu gancha umna langa alhaijelin bonggol nouchet amelput hoitah khat agakaidoh-in asohpa apen, aman jong kinloi tah-in ahinbol tai.
Akijo phat’in aman bongnoi ha le bongnoi toh chule bonggol ahonsa chu amaho angsunga chun agaluipeh-in, amaho an neh laisen ama jong thinglima chun ading jinge.
Amahon Abraham jah a, “Najinu Sarah hoiya ba um ham?” atiule, aman, “Ponbuh sunga aumnai,” ati.

Hichun Pakaiyin, “Keima chavang phatle kahung kittei tei ding ahin, vetan hiche phat teng chule najinu Sarah khun chapa khat anahin ding ahi,” ati. Anunga ponbuh kotbul le lama chun Sarah chun angai lhin ahi.
Hiche laiya chu Abraham le Sarah chu upa tah le nupi tah ateh a tehse gel ahi lhontan, Sarah jong chu numei ngaina lhaseh a athiche jong tangah ahitai.
Hijeh chun Sarah achangseh-in amale ama akinuisat’in hitin aseiye, “Tunung sanga kiti matna kinei jongle keiman anopje bon kihetalou dinga, kajipa jong tehsepu hita khu me?” atileh;
Pakaiyin Abraham jah a chun, “Ipi dinga Sarah khuti pia khu nuiya, ‘Kateh nunga keiman cha kanei tahbeh mong ding hinam?’ ati ham?
Pakai dinga thil ipi ahahsa umam? Kateppeh phat chavang phatle nehenga kahung kit ding ahin, hiche teng chule Sarah-in chapa khat anahin ding ahitai,” ati.
Chuphat’in Sarah atija tan, akilep’in, “Nuibon kinui louva,” tin aseitai. Ahinla aman, “Hilouve, nanui nah chu me,” ati.
Chujouvin miho chu chuche muna konin akipatdoh-uvin Sodom lang jonin akalsong tauve; Abraham jong amaho thahdoh dingin aga kilhonpi.
Pakai chun, “Keiman kathil bol ding hi Abraham koma ka im nah lai ding ham?
Ama hi la nam lentah le nam hat tah hung hidoh ding, ama jala leiset namtin vaipi phatthei kiboh ding ahingal-uvin.

Achapate le a ma bana a insung mi aman thu apeh a, chutia chu adih a bol theiyuva, thu adih a atan theina dinguva Pakai lampi ajui theiyuva, chutengle Pakaiyin Abraham chung changa athuseisa chu ahin molso theina dinga ama hi kalhendoh ahi ti hi la kahenan,” atin;
Pakai chun aseidoh peh-in, “Sodom le Gomorrah douna thu kisei anasa behseh tan chule achonsetnau jong aseval tai,
Keima chesuh ing katin kahenga thu hung kisei dungjuiya hi abol cheh-u ham, ahilou ham gapho chen inge,” ati.
Hiti chun miho chukoma konin akiheiyuvin Sodom lam jonin achetauve; ahinla Abraham chu Pakai masanga chun ading chah den jengin ahi.
Chuin Abraham jong ahung nailut’in, aseiye “Nangman midihte chu migiloute toh nasuh mangtha mong ding hitam?
Ijem tin khopi sunga chun midih som nga bang um ta leh, asunga midih som nga ho jala jong chu akhomun chu khen deh louhela nasuh mang jeng ding ham?
Nang dinga hitobang thil nabol a, midih le migilou agoma natha cheh a, midih le migilou akibah ding chu bolda hel jengle chun kati! Leiset pumpi thutanpan adih a a tan lou ding ham?” atileh;
Pakai chun, “Keiman Sodom khopia chu midih som nga bang kamudoh jouva ahile amaho jala akho pumpia kahing hoi ding ahi,” ati.
Abrahamin adonbut’in “Vetemin keima leivui le meivam bou kahin hijongle ka pakai koma thu hindonsei sei teminge.

Ijem tin midih som nga lhinna ding chun mi nga lhinglel ta hen lang hile mi nga lhah sam jeh chun kho pumpi chu nasu mangjeng ta dem?” atile; aman jong, “Amuna chu somli le nga kamudoh jouva ahile sumang ponge,” ati.
amanavelin ajah a asei kit’in, “Ijem tin som li bou kimudoh ta leh?” atileh, aman, “Somli jeh chun sumang pong kate,” ati.
Aman, “Ka Pakai nei lunghan peh hih beh-in thu sei nalaiyinge; ijem tin somthum bep kimudoh jouta leh la?” ati leh; “Somthum kamudoh jouva ahile ima loponge,” ati.
Chujouvin jong aman, “Vetemin ka Pakai nakoma thu hindon sei sei jeng ding kagot ahitai; ijem tin som ni bou kimudoh jou leh?” atin ahile, aman “Som ni gelkhoh nan sumang pong kate,” ati.

Hiche jou jong chun aman, “Ka Pakai neilung han hih beh-in khatvei seh seh thu seibe kit ing kate; ijem tin som khat seh seh kimudoh joule itin tem?” atileh aman, “Somkhat khotona chu kasuh manglou ding ahi,” atipeh-in;
chuin Abraham henga athusei ding aboncha aseisoh phat’in Pakai chu achetai; Abraham vang chu ain mun lama ahung kile kittai.
Nilhah lamin Vantil ni chu Sodom ahung lhung lhonin ahile Lot chu Sodom khopi kelkot’a anatoupet ahin, amani amu phat’in Lot jong alamto dingin akipatdoh-in chule tolla agaboh khup’in,

chule “Khongai lhon temin Pu teni, lungset tah-in nasohpa inlam hinjon lhonin lang jan geh lhontan, chule nakeng phang lhon jong kisop lhonin lang, jingpi tah-in thou lhonin natin lam jot lhon nannate,” atileh; ama nin, “Ahi hih-e, keini kholai dunga geh khovah ding kahi lhon bouve,” ati lhontai.

Ahivangin aman jong khohtah-in ajol tan ahile amani jong aheng lama ahung kihei lhonin amapa ina chun ahung lhung lhontai, hichun aman amani chu golvah abolpin, cholsolou changlhah akanpehin, amanin jong anelhontan ahi.
Ahin alup masanguvin akhopi sung miho, Sodom miho chu aneo alen akhothingin mipi abonchan ahung kikhomuvin, in chu ahin umuvin,
chule Lot chu ahin kouvun, ajah a, “Tujana nahenga hung lhung miho chu hoilama um hitauvam? Kahenguva hinpuidoh in numei bola kabol dingu ahi,” tin athumtauve.
Chuphat’in Lot chu kot phunglama apotdohin kotpi anung kha chah-in ahenguva agachen,
“Kasopite katao tho jeng ahi, hitobang lom hin khang gilou hih behuvin,

kho ngai temuvin keiman chanu ni kaneiyin, amani khu pasal khat cha to jong kiti mat kha lou lai ahilhone; amani khu nahinpui dohpeh uving katin napetau vinge, nadei deiyin bolmai tauvin; hiche miho vang khu imacha lo hih beh-uvin, ajeh chu keima inlim bela hunglut ahibouve,” tin ajoltai.

Ahinla amahon “Kinung chen,” atiuvin, chujongle amahon, “Hichepa hi ahung khopem len chule thutana pang ding akigoveh ta! Tua amaho kabol gitlou ding sanguva nangma agilou cheh a kabol dingu nahi,” atitauve. Hiti chun Lot kitipa chu hatah-in anouvin kotpi jong chu phutjal dingin ahin gotauve.
Ahin mite ni chun akhut lhon ahin lhangdoh lhonin Lot chu aheng lhona akailut loi lhonin chuin kotpi chu akhah tauve.
Chutah chun amanin jong in kotpi phunga miho chu aneo alen abonchan amit’u achotsah lhonin ahile abonchauvin kotphung holmon akisulung dong gamtauve.

Mitenin Lot jaha, “Hikomahi koi dang dang nanei nah laiyam? nachanu jipa ho hihen nachapate hihen, nachanu ho hiuhen lang koi dang dang hijongle khopi sunga nangma mi pou pou chu abonchauvin hiche muna kon hin puidoh tan;

ijeh-inem itile keinin hiche mun hi kasuh mang lhon ding ahitai, ajeh chu hiche mite douna thu kisei chu nasatah-in Pakai heng ahung lhungtan, hijeh a chu Pakaiyin akhopi sumang dinga hi eihin sollhon ahiye,” ati lhontai.

Hijeh chun Lot apotdoh-in achanute ni jipa ding teni jah a chun, “Hung kipatdoh loi lhonin lang hiche muna kon hin potdoh loiyuvin, ajeh chu Pakaiyin hiche khopi hi asuh mang ding ahitai,” agati leh, achanu teni jipa ding te nin atot danin anagel lhone.

Jingkah khovah phat’in Vantil te nin Lot anoloi lhonin asei lhone, “Kipatdoh loiyin lang najinu le nachanute ni kipuiyin lang potdoh loiyuvin, achutilou le akhopi chonsetna puma nakisuh gamtha dingu ahitai,” ati lhone.

Ahivangin amapa chu alung opkai le le nalaiyin ahile Vantil tenin amapa chu Pakai yin ahepi ahi ahetjeh lhonin, amapa ahin, ajinu ahin, achanute ni ahilhonin, akhut uvin akai pheng jeng lhonin khopi pam lama agathah doh lhontai.

Amaho chu apuidoh lhon phat’in amanin, “Nakihinso thei theina dinguvin jamdoh loiyun, hung jong hung kinung hei hih uvin lang phaicham dunga jong bangpa hih heluvin, thinglhang lama jamloiyun achutilou le nakisuh gamtha dingu ahiye,” atipeh lhone.
Hichun Lot’in ajah lhona, “Ahipoi ka Pu teni!

Vetan nasohpa hi namitmun lungsetna kachangin, chule keima hinkho huhhingnan nangin jong hepina lentah neipetai; thinglhang lama vang lhaidoh jou ponge, manthahna chun eilap dena kathipa beh beh ding ahibouve.
Vetemin hiche khopi khu, jamlutna dingin abailamin chule naichabou ahi; gamjong agam la hih helin ahi, kakihinso sona dingin hikoma neijam lutsah tan,” atileh;
aman jong ajah a, “Chuti ahile vetan tua nasei jong hi nanoppeh ing ting, hiche khopi nasei jong khu suhmangda tange.
Kinoloiyin lang hikoma khun jamlut loiyin, ajeh chu hiche kom chu nalhun masanga keiman imacha kabolthei lou ding ahi,” ati. Hijeh a chu hiche khopi chu amin Zoar kisah ahiye.
Lot in Zoar khopi ahin phah chun nisan leiset ahinsal soh tai.
Chujouvin Pakaiyin Sodom le Gomorrah khopi teni chunga chun vana Pathen koma konin kath le meikong go ju bangin ajuh alhah sah-in,
akhopi teni jong, aphaicham geiyin, akhopi teni sunga cheng jouse ahin, tola kehdoh thingna louna abonchan asugam heltai.
Lot jinu ma chu akiheiyin anung lam agah vetle chilhang asoh-in khom bangin akitung dentai.
Ajing jingkah-in Abraham achejelin Pakai angsunga adinna muna chun
Sodom le Gomorrah lam gamkai se sechu agah vesuh patep inahile, vetan agam meikhu pi chu meihol kilhut bangin akhu kitundoh jen jun jeng chu amudoh tai.
Hiti chun Pathenin chuche phaicham khopi teni asuh mang chun Pathen in Abraham ageldoh jing in, thina lah a konin Lot asoldoh-in, chujouvin Lot chenna khopi teni chu asumangtai.
Zoar khopia chenden ding akichat jeh-in Lot chu Zoar khopia konin achanu teni toh apotdoh-in, thinglhang lam ajon in, songko sung khat’a achanu teni chutoh achengkhom tauve.
Chuin a unu chun anao nu jah a, “Ipa la atehtan, leiset chonna ngaiya eini chunga hungkal doh ding la hiche gamsunga pasal khat cha jong aumpon;
hungin ipa hi ju donkham sah hitin chu tengle lup khompi hite, chutile ipaa kona chikhai theiya ium lhon ding ahi,” atin;
hiti chun amanin hiche jan chun apa ju adonkham sah lhonin, chuin aunu chu agalut’in apa agaluppi tai, amapan vang itih a hung lum a itih a thoudoh kit ham ti ahepha poi.

Chuin ajing nikhon a unun a naonu jah a, “Veteh jan nilhah a chu keiman ipa kaluppia kabon, tu nilhah injongju donkhamsah kit hitin, chutengle nangma galut’in galuppin, chutile ipaa kona chi khai theiya ium lhon ding ahi,” atin;
hiti chun chuche jan jong chun apa ju adonkhamsah lhon tai; chuin anaonu chu athouvin agalup khompin, amapan la itih a chu hung luma chule itih a chu thoudoh kit hitam ti ahepha deh poi.
Hichea kon chun Lot chanu te nin apa lhona konin nao avopgel lhontan ahi.
A unun chapa, khat ahingin ama chu amin Moab asahtai, ama chu Moab mite penna pa ahi tin tuni geiyin akiseiye.
Anaonun jong chapa khatma ahingin, amin Ben-ammi asah-e. Hichepa hi Ammon mite penna pa ahi tin tuni geiyin akiseiye.
Hichea kon chun Abraham Negeb gamlanga akichonin Kadesh le Shur kikah a achengtai; chuin Gerar geiyin akichonpaiye.
Abrahamin ajinu Sarah chu “Kasopinu ahi,” ati leh, Gerar lengpa Abimelech chun mi asolin Sarah chu agapuisah tai.
Ahinla Pathen in Abimelech henga chun ajan mangin ahungin, ajah a, “Kivetemin hiche numei nakipuinu jala chu athisa nahitai, ijeh-inem itile amanu hi mi ji hisa ahibouve,” ati.
Hiche geiya chu Abimelech chun amanu henga anavah lut loulai ahinai; hijeh chun aman, “Pakai nangman themmona bei miho jong natha ji ham?

Hichepa tah khun jong kajah a, “Hichenu, hi kasopinu ahi,” tia aseiya, chule amanun jong, “Hichepa khu kasopipa ahi,” atia, hijeh a chu kalungthima jong themmona beihela chule kakhut phang tenia jong abohkhoi kha louhela hiche hi kabol ahibouve,” ati.

Hichun Pathenin ajan mangin ajah a, “Nangma nalungthim thengsela hiche hi nabol ahi ti keiman kahenai, chujongle kei doumah bolna anachonset sah louva hoidoh a jong keima ma kahi, hijeh a chu amanu chu kakhoi khahsah lou nahi.

Tun hiche mipa jinu chu nungpeh tan, amapa khu themgao ahin, nataopeh hen lang hile nahin thei ding ahin, hichenu chu na nungpeh louva ahivang le nang jong nathi tei tei ding, chule nanei jouse jong mang ding ahi ti kihet’in,” ati.
Chuin Abimelech chu jingpi tah-in athouvin asohte akoukhomin ajah-uva hichengse chu abonchan aseipeh tai, hichun mi jouse akicha lheh jengtauve.

Abimelech-in jong Abraham chu akouvin ajah a, “Ipi bola hiti pia hi neihung bolu hitam? Itobanga nang douna kanachonset hita, hita hi kei le kalenggam chunga hitobang chonset nasa tah hi nahinpoh lut ham? Bol louhel ding thil nangman neibol khum ahitai,” ati,
chuin Abimelech-in Abraham jah a, “Ipi nagela hiche nabol mong mong ham?” atileh;
Abrahamin jong, “Kei gela chu hiche muna hin Pathen ginna him him la umpon tin, kajinu jeh hin eithat get uvinte kati ahin.
Atah tah-in amanu hi kasopinu jong ahinai, kanu sunga peng ahilou vangin kapa chanu ahinai, hita chu keiman jia kanei ahiye.

Chujongle Pathen in kapa ina kona eihinvadoh sah a pat’a chu keiman ama jah a, “Keima neibolpeh tei tei ding hepina chu hiche hi ahi, iva le na muntina kei hi, “Hichepa hi kasopipa ahi,” tin seijin tia keseipeh ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Abimelech chun kelngoi jong bongchal jong chule soh pasal soh numei jong Abraham chu apen, ajinu Sarah jong anung peh tai.
Chule Abimelech-in, “Ven namasanga chengse hi kei gam jeng ahi, nadeina lai laiya chengin,” ati.
Sarahjah a chun aman, “Ven keiman nasopipa dangka sang khat kapen, hiche sum hi nakoma um chengse mitmua jum ong huhna kapeh ahin, japi angsunga them nakichan ahitai,” atipeh-e.
Chuphat’in Abrahamin jong Pathena ataopeh a ahile Pathenin Abimelech jong ajinu jong chule asoh numeiho jong adamsahin, hichea kon chun cha ahing cheh tauvin ahi.
Ipi jeh-inem itile Abraham jinu Sarah jeh a Pakaiyin Abimelech insung a numei naobu jouse anakhatan peh ahiye.
Pakaiyin anaseisa bang chun Sarah ahung vilin, chule Sarah jah a athusei bang bangin Pakaiyin abolpeh tai.
Hijeh chun Sarah-in nao ahinvop’in Abraham chu atehset nungin, Pathenin ajah a ateppeh phat dontah chun chapa khat ahinpeh tan ahi.
Sarah-in ahin hinpeh achapa chu Abrahamin amin Isaac asahtai.
Pathen thupeh dungjuiyin achapa Isaac chu niget alhin nin Abrahamin achep atanpeh-in ahi.
Achapa Isaac hungpen chun Abraham kum ja khat analhing tai.
Sarah chun, “Pathenin anui nui dinga eibol ahitan, ajapha chanin jong einui hu dingu ahi,” a tin;
chule aman “Sarah hin chale nao noi hinchep sah inte tin koipenin Abraham koma anasei ngamdem ong? Ahinla keiman atehset nungin chapa khat kahinpeh tan ne,” ati.
Naosen chu ahung khandoh a anoichep aban phat’in Abrahamin Isaac noichep ahainin golvah guntah-in abolpeh-e.
Hichun Sarah-in jong achapa Isaac chu Egypt mi Hagarin Abraham ahinpeh achapa chutoh akichep khom amudohtai.
Hijeh chun amanun Abraham jah a, “Hiche soh numeinu khu achapa toh nodoh tha tan, ajeh chu hiche soh numeinu chapa hin kei chapa toh gou lokhom thei ponte,” ati.
Achapa chung chang thudol ahijeh-in athil umdan chu Abraham dingin thoh nom a um hih beh jenge.
Ahivang chun Pathenin Abraham jah a, “Hiche gollhang chule nasohnu thudola chun lung himo hih-in, Sarah-in naseipeh peh chu bol jengin, ajeh chu Isaac a kona nangma chilhah kisim ding ahibouve;
nasunga peng ahijeh-in sohnu chapaa konin nam khat hinsemdoh nange,” ati.

Hijeh chun Abraham jingpi tah-in athouvin, changlhah alan twipaiya twi akhumin Hagar chu apen, alengkouva akhaipeh-in, anao pumin amanu chu asol mangtai. Amanu achen Beersheba gamthip noiya avah le lei.
Twipaiya twi abeiphat’in amanun anao Ishmael chu hampa nang noiya aleh lut’in,

ama achepaiyin amapa agalmu na don khat gamla thimtah, thalpi kap phahna khopset khat a hin agatoutai; ijeh-inem itile amanun, “Nao thi ding chu kave ngam poi!” atin; hitia chu chapangpa gal lang dona agatouva ahile nao chu hapen in ahung pengin akaptai.

Chuphat in Pathenin chapangpa ka-gin chu ajan, chule vana konin Pathen Vantilin Hagar ahinkouvin ajah a, “lpi dinga chuti nahim Hagar? Kicha hih-in, ajeh chu Pathenin chapangpa chu aumna kona ahung kagin ajatai.
Dingdoh-in lang nao khu gakidop loiyin nakhut’in kipom chah jon, ijeh-inem itile keiman ama khu nam lentah kahisah ding ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin Pathen chun Hagar mit teni ahasah in ahile amanun twikhuh khat amudoh tai; amanu jong achen twipaiyin twi agathal dimin nao chu agadon sahtai.
Pathenin chapangpa chu akivoppin, amajong ahung khangdoh tan, gamthip noi jenga achengin, thalpi kap’in ahung them lheh jengin ahi.
Paran gamthip noiya anachengin, anun Egypt gama ama ji dingin numei khat agapuipeh-in ahi.
Hichelai chun Abimelech le asepai lamkaipa Phicol chun Abraham jah a hitin aseilhone, “Nanghi nathil bolna chana Pathenin nakivoppi jinge;

hijeh chun tun keiman hepi tah a kabol na bang banga hi nanginjong neibola nahung khopemna gamsung jong hi nabola keijong jouva neibol louna dingle kasung pengte jong kason kalhah ho jong jouva nabol louna dingin kahenga hin Pathena kihahsel temin,” ati.
Abrahamin, “Kihahsel nange,” ati.
Hichun Abimelech sohten twikhuh khat alahpehjeh-u chun Abrahamin Abimelech chunga phunna aneiyin ahile,
Abimelech chun, “Koi ham hitobang thilbola chu ken bon kahepoi; nanginla neiseipeh pon, tuni geiya hiche thu chu kajah khah loulai ahibove,” ati.
Chuin Abraham chun kelngoi khat le bongchal khat agakaiyin, anigel chun Abimelech a pen, chuin amanin ani lhona dingin kitepna khat asemdoh lhontai.
Abraham chun kelngoihon lah a konin kelngoipi sagi atumbeh-in agahoidoh-in ahile,
Abimelech-in jong Abraham jah a, “Ipi bolna kelngoipi sagi jen khu atumbeh a nagahoikhen ham?” tin adongtai.
Aman, “Hiche twikhuh keima kilaisa ahi, tia ahetoh a neipanpeh na dinga hiche kelngoipi sagi hi kakhut’a nakisan ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche jeh a chu hichelai mun chu Beersheba kisah ahiye. Ijeh-inem itile hikoma chu amani anigel lhon dinga kihahselna khatseh a kihahsel cheh ahi lhone.
Hiti chun amanin Beersheba muna kitepna khat anasem lhontai. Abimelech le asepai lamkaipa Phicol jong akipatdoh lhonin Philistine gam langa akile kit lhontan ahi.
Abrahamin Beersheba a chun chah thing khat aphut’in aphung laitah a chun Pakai tonsot Pathen minin ataove.
Philistine te gamsunga chun Abraham ana khopem sot lheh jengin ahi.
Thil hijatpi kichai nung hin Pathenin Abraham apatep’in ajah a, “Abraham!” atileh, amanjong, “Hikoma ka ume,” ati.
Aman, “Nangailut tah nachapa changkhat seh Isaac chu puiyin lang Moriah gama chen keiman kahin ko peh ding molsang khat pen pen chunga ama chu pumgo thilto din gatohdoh tan,” ati.

Chuti ahile tin Abraham jingpi tah-in athouvin, asangan akigonin chule gol lhangho mi ni akipuiyin achapa Isaac apuiyin, pumgo thilto govamna dingin thinglom egoisan akipoh-in, akipatdoh-in Pathenin aseipehna mun chu ajontai.
Nithum jen alamjot jouvin Abraham akhodah-in ahile ajotna mun chu gamla thimtah-in amu nalaiye.

Hichun Abrahamin jong gollhang teni jah a, “Hikoma hin sangan hitoh anaum tauvin, kei le boipu hilam gei khun gache lhon ing ting gatao lhon ing kating chujou tengle nangho henga hung kile lhon tange,” a tin;
Abrahamin pumgo thilto govamna ding thinglom chu achapa Isaac chu alengkouvin aputsah-in, aman akhut’in mei le chemcha akichoiyin, hiti chun anitah lhon chun akijot lhontai.
Chuin Isaac in apa Abraham jah a, “Hepa” atile; aman jong, “Hoiyo kacha,” ati. Aman, “Veteh mei le thinglom la aumtan, pumgo thilto kelngoi hoiba ham?” atileh;
Abrahamin jong, “Kachapa, pumgo thilto a pang ding chu Pathenin ama chamin hinkigel nante,” atipeh-e. Hiti chun akijot lhonin ahi.
Pathenin aseipeh na mun ahung lhun lhon phat’in Abraham chun maicham khat asemin, thinglom chu agol chan ajamin, chuin achapa Isaac chu asomin maicham chungah chun alupsah tai.
Abraham chun achapa thana dingin akhut alhangin chemcha chu agah lap’a ahile,
Vana konin Pakai Vantilin ahin kouvin, “Abraham, Abraham,” ahinti; chuphat’in aman, “Hikoma kaume,” ati.

Ama chun, “Chapangpa chunga chu nakhut nalha lou hel ding, imacha jong nalo lou ding ahi, ijeh-inem itile Pathen nagin jeh-in nangman nachapa jeng jong keima thapeh dingin nakhut kihpoi, ti tun kichentah-in kahedoh tai,” ati.

Chuin Abraham akhodah-in avet leh, vetan anung langa kelngoichal khat aki te nin hampa nang tom lah a anakihenin ahi; hichun Abraham jong achen kelngoichal chu agakaiyin achapa khel chun pumgo thilton atoh-in ahi.
Abraham in hiche lai mun chu amin ‘Pakaiyin thilto akingaito na ding mun’ asah-in hijeh chun tunin jong, ‘Molvuma Pakaiyin thilto ding aki-ngaito na mun’ tin akiseitai.
Pakai Vantil chun anivei nan vana konin Abraham ahin kouvin,
“Keima katahsa tah a kihahsel kahitai, hitobang thil hi nabol ngam jenga nachapa chang khatseh chunga jong khut kih louva napan jeng phat’in tin Pakaiyin aseiyin,

Keiman nangma phatthei kaboh mongmonga nachilhah jong hapun puna kapunsah a vana ahsi jat, twikhanglen panga neldi jat kaphah sah ding, chule nason nachilhah jong chun amelmate kelkot phung ahintoupha ding ahi.
Chule nangman kathu sei nangai jeh a leiset namtin vaipi hi nason nachilhah vanga phatthei hung kiboh ding ahiuve,” ati.
Hichun Abraham jong gol lhangte ni henga ahung kile kit’in chule amani jong akipatdoh lhonin akilhon khom cheh uvin Beersheba ahinjon tauve; hiti chun Abraham jong Beersheba achengden tai.
Thilsoh hicheng hi akichai phat’in Abraham henga thu ahung kiseiyin hitin akiti, “Ven Milcah jong khun nasopipa Nahor cha le nao ahinpeh peh tai;
apeng masapenpa Uz ahin, anaopa Buz ahin, Aram hingpa Kemuel ahin,
Chesed ahin, Hazo ahin, Pildash ahin, Jidlaph ahin chule Bethuel ahiuve,” ati.
Bethuel chun Rebekah ahinge. Abraham sopipa Nahor chu Milcah cha hicheng get hi anahin peh-e.
Hicheng valin jong athai kemnu amin Reumah kitinu jong chun Tebah toh, Gaham toh, Tahash toh chule Maacah anahinge.
Sarah hin kumkho saodan chu abonchan kum ja khat le kum som nile kum sagi alhinge.
Chujouvin Canaan gamsunga Kiriath-arba, Hebron kiti, khoa chun Sarah athin, Abraham chu Sarah op dingle akap dingin ahunge.
Chuin aangsunga amithilong phunga konin Abraham akipatdoh-in Hit miho jah a hitin aseiye,
“Keima nangho lah a khopem kahin, nangho lah a lhan muna kanei ding khat neipeuvin, hiti chun kamithilong kakoma konin kivuidoh ing kate,” atileh;
Hit mihon Abraham chu adonbut’uvin ajah a hitin aseiyuve,

“Kapu kathuseiyu ngaiyin, nangma Pathena lengchapa banga keiho lah a uma, keiho lhan khuh aphapen khat’a khun nathilong chu vui jengin, kalah-uva mihem khat cha jong hi alhan khuh naitpeh a nathilong navuisah lou ding a umpoi,” atiuve.
Chuphat’in Abraham adingdoh-in agamsung mite Hit miho chu salam bol dingin abohkhup tai.
