Hichea chun amaho toh akihouvin hitin aseiye, “Nangho tah-in kakoma kona kathilong vuidoh ding lung nahom theiyuva ahile kathusei ngaiyuvin lang chule Zohar chapa Ephron henga neithumpeh-uvin,
agamgi china um ama Machpelah songlhan keo khu eipeh theiya ahile ken jong lhan muna kaman jing dingin nangho umpet tah hin aman alhingset’in peng kate,” ati.
Ephron chu Hit miho lah a atoupet anahin, hijeh chun Hit mipa Ephron chun Abraham adonbut’in Hit miho leh ama khopi kelkot phunga hung kikhom chengse jah dingin hitin aseiye,
“Ahipoi kapu, kathusei ngaiyin, keiman agam jong kapen, agamsunga songlhan keo jong khu kapen, hiche hi kamite mitmu tah a kapehdoh mong mong ahitai, nathilong chu kivuina jengin,” ati.
Chuin Abraham chun agam mite angsunga salam bol dingin abohkhup tai.

Chule aman agam mite jah chang tah in hitin aseiye, “Pha nasah lou ham, kasei chu ngaijon lang agam man chu sum napeng ting nangin jong keiya konin kilah mong mongin lang, chutengle hikoma khun keiman kathilong kivui nange,” atileh;
Ephron chun Abraham adonbut in ajah a hitin aseiyin,
“Kapu kasei ngaiyin, leimun dangka shekel jali man bep chu kei le nang kah a ipi tahpi ham? Nathilong chu kivuijengin,” ati.

Abrahamin jong Ephron thusei angaiyin, chule amapan Hit miho jah chang tah a jong aseidoh jat dangka shekel ja li chu, kiveiho chena toh kitoh-in, Abraham in Ephron dingin aleptoh peh-in atedoh peh tai.

Hiti hin Mamre niso lam Machpelah muna Ephron leimun chu aleimun ahin, alei laiya songlhan keo chu ahin, alei laiya keh thingphung jouse ahin, agamgi chin kimvela keh chengse ahin, abonchan akilheh khenin,
Hit mite mitmu chang tah in amapa khopi kelkot phunga hung kikhom chengse mitmun gouthila anei dingin Abraham achangtai.
Achuti kichai phat’in Abrahamin jong ajinu Sarah chu Mamre niso lam, Canaan gamsunga Hebron kiti, Machpelah lei laiya songlhan keo sunga chun avuitai.
Aleimun le alei laiya songlhan keo chu Hit miten alhan mun dingin Abraham achansah tauve.
Abraham chu ateh lheh jengtan, anikho jong atama tam alhingtai; Pakaiyin Abraham chu imalam jousea phatthei abohsoh keiye.
Chuin Abrahamin athil nei jouse chunga thu neiya akoi, ainsunga aupa pen asohpa jah a chun, “Kataigui noi lai tah a hin nakhut hin koitemin,
chutengle keiman Pakai van Pathen le lei Pathen koma nakihahsel sah ing katin, kachenkhompi Canaan mite chanute lah a kona kachapa ji ding nahin puipeh theilou hel ding ahi;
ijeh-inem itile keima gamsung ka-inkote lah a nachea kachapa Isaac ji ding nagapui peh ding ahi,” ati.
Sohpan ajah a, “Ijem tin numei nu chun hiche gama hunga kanung hinjui ding da taleh, nachapa hi nahung kondoh na gama chu kanung pui nah nah ding-ham?” ati.
Hichun Abrahamin amapajah a, “Kichih theiyin, achutilou le kachapa hi khulama lepui jeng khat nin nate.

Pakai Van Pathen, kapa insung le kapenna gama kona eihin puidoh pan kahenga thu aseiyin kakoma akihahselin hitin aseiye, “Keiman hiche gam hi nachilhah te kapeh ding ahi,” ati; ama chun Avantil nalamkaisah in tin hilama khu kachapa ji ding napui ding ahi.
Ahin numeinun nangma nung ahin jui nom louva ahivangle hiche kahahselna kona hi aongthol nahitai, kachapa vang khulama nale pui theilou hel ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Chuphat’in sohpan apu Abraham taigui noi lai tah a akhut akoiyin ama koma hiche thudol hin akihahsel tai.
Chujouvin sohpan apu sangongsao som khat akigot’in, apua konin thilpha lai laijat namkim akilah-in akipatdoh tai; hiti chun akipatdoh-in Mesopotamia gama Nahor khopi ajontai.
Aman jong khopi pama twikhuh phunga chun nilhah lama numeiho twithal ahung phat don khun asangongsao ho chu anabohsah-in ahi.
Chuin aman, “O Pakai kapu Abraham Pathen, tunia neipilhin sahna dingin na-angsunga kataove, kapu Abraham dingin khotona hin neiyin.
Vetan keima twikhuh phunga hin kadingin, chule akhopi sung miho chanute twi thai dingin ahunguve.

‘Lungset tah-in natwibel neihin lip temin doning kate’ katia ‘Donin, keiman nasangongsao ho jong khu twi penge,’ tia seipen pen nu chu, hiche nungah’nu chu nangman nasoh Isaac dinga nalhendoh hi jeng hen. Chule hichea chu, nangman kapu dingin khotona naneiye’ti kahet ding ahi,” ati.
Aman athusei ding aboncha aseisoh masangin, vetan, Abraham sopipa Nahor jinu Milcah chapa Bethuel chanu Rebekah chun alengkouva twibel ahin kiput’in ahungdoh pai jengtai.

Nungahnu chu nungah thah cha, vetnom noma melhoi khat ahin, chule pasalto jong kitimatna neikha lou hellai ahiye. Amanu chu twikhuh sunga achelut’in atwibel dimset’in twi aga kithalin chujouvin ahung kaldohtai.
Hichun Sohpa chu amanu henga alhai lut’in, “Lungset tah-in na twibela twi chu themkhat neihin lip’in lang neidonsah temin,” atileh;
amanun jong, “Hung don-o hung don-o kapu,” atin; atwibel chu akhut’in aloikun peh loi jengin amapa chu adonsah tai.
Amapa adonsah jou phat’in amanun, “Nasangongsao ho ding jong khu adohchim kahseuvin twi gathal peh nange,” ati;
hiti chun aki kinno loiyin atwibel chu gancha twi kong sunga alheilhan, twikhuh lama chun twi thai dingin alhaijel kit’in, amapa sangongsao ho abonchauvin twi athalpeh soh keiyin ahi.
Chuphat’in mipan jong akholjin lo napen chu Pakaiyin alolhinsah ding khat hitam, hilou ham tin photchen ding gon amanu umchan chu thip beh chan ave vejengin ahi.
Sangongsao ten twi adonsoh phat’uvin amapan jong sana bilba shekel keh khat gih a gih le amanun akhut te nia akibu dingin sana chaokol ni shekel som khat gih a gih aladoh-in,
chule, “Koipen chanu nahim lungset tah-in kajah a kiseidoh tem in; chule keiho chengse lhunna ding hin napa ina chun mun ong theiyin tem?” tin adongtai.
Amanun jong amapa jah a, “Keima Nahor jinu Milcah chapa Bethuel chanu kahiye,” atin,
chujongle amapa jah a chun, “Keihon chang pol le gancha anneh tampi kaneiyuvin chule ge na ding jong mun kaneinauve.” ati.
Hichun amipa jong chu akunin Pakai chibai aboh-in,
chule aseitai, “Pakai kapu Abraham Pathen, kapu dinga ami hepina le akitahna sumil loupa chu nun nom jing hen; keima hiche lam pia hin kapu sopipa ina eipui lut tai,” ati.
Hichun nungahnu jong alhaijelin hiche thilsoh ho chu anu insung mite jah a agaseipeh tai.
Hiche pet chun Rebekah in sopi pasal khat aneiyin amin Laban akiti. Hiche Laban chu khopama twikhuh phunga mipa henga chun alhai jelin ahi.

Aman anaonu chaokol teni le abilba amua, chule anaonu Rebekah in, “Mipa chun hiti ti hin thu aseiye,” ti ajahdoh phat’a hiche mipa henga chu che-ah ahi, vetan mipa chu twikhuh phunga chun sangongsao ho koma ana ding jinge.
Chuphat’in aman, “Hung jengin Pakaiya phatthei boh chang nahi, ipi dinga khopama nadin din ham? Keiman inmun jong katheh ngim peh a chule sangongsao ho dingin jong mun gonsan kakoipeh tai,” ahungti.

Hiti chun Abraham sohpa chu insunga ahung lut’in, Labanin jong sangongsao te chu asut lha lhan, chuin amapa chu sangongsao te neh dingin changpol le gancha anneh chengse chutoh chule ama le ahung kilhonpi ho kengphang silna dingin twi toh apen ahi.
Chuin amapa angsunga ankong aluipehin ahile, aman jong, “Kahung kholjinna thudol kaseidoh masangin an nepong kate,” ati. Aman jong, “Seiyin seiyin,” atin ahi.
Hijeh chun aman jong, “Keima Abraham sohpa kahi.

Pakaiyin kapu chu kidang tah-in phatthei aboh-in, ama ahao lheh tai; kelngoihon aneisah-in, ganchate ahin, dangka le sana ahin, soh pasal le soh numei ahiuvin, sangongsao ho le sa-ngan ho ahin apesoh keitai.
Chule kapu jinu Sarah chun ateh nungin kapu chu chapa khat ahinpeh-in, hichepa hi aman jong agou jouse jong apetai.
Kapun eikihahsel sah-in, ‘Kachapa ji ding hi kachenna Canaan gama Canaan mite chanu ho nahin jon peh thei louhel ding ahi;
kapa inkote heng, kaphunggolpi lah a nachea kachapaji ding nagapui joh ding ahi,’ tin aseiye.
Ken jong kapu jah-a, ‘Ijem tin anumei chun kanung hinjui ta hih le la,’ kati leh;

aman kajah a, ‘Aangsung lhachah louva kalhat le jingna Pakai chun Avantil nangma toh naki lhonsah intin, nakhol jin hi apilhinsah tei ding, nangin chutia chu kachapa ji ding hi kaphunggol ho, kapa inkote lah a kona nahinpuidoh tei ding ahinai;
ahin ka-inkote henga nachea amahon numei napeh louvu va ahivangle hiche kahahselna hin nakan lou ding, keiman kahahselna a kona hi aongdoh ding nahitai,’ atin;
“Tunia twikhuh kahung geiyin ken jong, “O Pakai kapu Abraham Pathen, nangman kakholjin kalamjot na hi napi lhinsah dinga ahile,
vetan keima twikhuh panga kadinge; twithala hung nungah lah a, “Lungset tah-in natwibel neihin lip temin twi them khat doning kate,” katia,
kajah a, “Donin, keiman nasangongsao ho jong khu twi penge,” tia seipen pen nu chu; hiche numei chu Pakaiyin kapu chapa dinga alhendoh hijeng hen,” katin;

“kalungthim sunga kathusei chu kaseisoh masangin, vetan Rebekah hin alengkouva atwibel ahin kiput’in ahungdoh pai jen tai; chuin amanu twikhuh a agakum lhan twi agathal tai. Hichun ken jong ajah a, ‘Lungset tah-in twi neidonsah tem o,’ katile;

aman jong kin loi tah-in atwibel chu alengkouva konin ahin heilhan, ‘Hung donin, keiman nasangongsao ho jong twi donsah inge,’ atin hijeh chun keiman twi chu kadonin, chule aman sangongsao ho jong twi adonsah cheh-in ahi.

Hichun ken jong amanu jah a, ‘Koipen tah chanu nahim?’ tia kadoh le, aman, Milcah chun Nahor anahinpeh Bethuel kitipa chanu chu kahi,’ a tin hijeh chun keiman anah benga sumkol kakhai peh-in, aban te nia chaokol kabupeh tai.
Chujouvin kakunin Pakai chibai kaboh in, chule kapu chapa jinu pui thei dinga ainkote henga lamjang keiya eihin pui lhung Pakai chu kathang vah-in ahi.

Hijeh chun tun hepi tah le kitah tah a kapu chu nabol ding jongle neisei peh-in lang nabollou ding jongle neiseipeh jengin, chutengle kijet hei ding hihen kivei hei ding hijongle kakihei thei ding ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Laban le Bethuel-injong adonbut’in hitin asei lhone, “Hiche thilsoh hi ahile Pakaiya kon hibouva chu la em, keinin nang koma asei aphai iti kati thei lhon ding ham.
Ven Rebekah jong na masanga aumnai, kipuiyin lang che jengin; Pakaiyin aseidoh bang chun hiche nu hi napu chapa jinu hisah jengin,” ati lhontai.
Abraham sohpan amani thusei ajah phat chun tola abohkhup’in Pakai chibai abohtai.
Chujongle sohpa chun dangka le sana kijepna thil manlu lu leh ponsil aladoh-in Rebekah chu apen; asopipa le anu jong chu kijepna thil manlu tah tah apen ahi.
Chujouvin mipa le alhonpi chengsen an aneuvin twi adonuvin ageh khovah tauve. Jingkah jingpi tah a akithodoh phat’uvin aman jong, “Kapu henga neile soltan,” tin athume.
Ahin amanu sopipa le anun, “Boinu khu keiho koma ni chom khat beh, nisom tobang beh nichonsah tadin lang, chujoule chenante,” ati lhonin ahi.
Ahivangin amapan, ajah lhon a, “Neilho chon chon lhon hih beh-in, ajeh chu Pakaiyin bon kalamjot apilhinsah ngal ahitah a ahile neisol lhonin, kei jong kapu kom jon tang kate,” ati.
Hichun amanin jong, “Anu ngahnu kou lhonin ting ama kam sung dong lhon ta dinge,” tin asei lhonin,
hijeh chun Rebekah akou lhonin ajah a, “Hichepa tohin kilhona nache ding hi tam?” ati lhonle; aman jong, “Che tange,” atitai.
Chuphat’in amahon anaonu-u Rebekah le ajenlea pangnu, chule Abraham sohpa le amite asoldoh tauve.
Chujongle amahon Rebekah chu phatthei aboh-uvin ajah a, “Kanaonu-u mihem asang asangsom hingnun pangin lang, nachilhah ten jong amelmateu kelkot bulpi hintou phau hen!” atiuve.
Chuin Rebekah le asoh numeiho chu akipatdoh-uvin sangongsao ho chunga atoudoh-uvin mipa nung-chu ajuitauve; hiti chun sohpan Rebekah chu apuiyin achetai.
Isaac chu Beerlahairoi a agachen ahungin Negeb gamsunga anachenge.
Chuin Isaac chu nilhah-in tollhanga lung ngaito gun dingin apotdoh-in, aga dadoh-a avetle sangongsaote ahung kijot chu amutai.
Rebekah jong chu akhodahin ahile Isaac chu amun, hijeh chun sangongsao chunga konin ahung kum lhan,
chule sohpa jah a chun, “Gal langa eiho lamto dinga tollhanga hungpa khu hoi koi ham?” atile; sohpan jong, “Kapu chu ahi,” ati. Hichun amanun jong apon lukhuh akilah-in akikhuh tai.
Sohpan thilsoh chu abonchan abol bang bangin Isaac aseipeh soh keiyin ahi.

Chuin Isaac-in amanu chu aponbuh sunga akipuilut’in, hiti chun Rebekah chu akichenpin, amanu jong amapa dingin ajinu ahidoh tai; chule Isaac-in jong Rebekah chu alungset lheh-in ahi. Hiti hin Isaac chu anun adalhah lunghela konin alung mong lheh tan ahi.
Abrahamin ji khat aneibe kit’in, hichenu chu amin Keturah ahi.
Amanu hin Zimran le Jokshan toh, Medan toh, Midiam toh, Ishbak toh chule Shuah ahinpeh-in ahi.
Jokshan chun Sheba le Dedan ahinge. Dedan chapate chu Asshurim toh, Letushim toh, Le-ummim ahiuve.
Midian chapate chu Ephah ahin, Epher ahin, Hanoch ahin, Abida ahin, chule Eldaah ahi. Hicheng hi abonchauva Keturah chapate tupate ahicheh-uve.
Abrahamin anei abonchan Isaac a pen;
athaikem ho chapate vang chu thilpeh phabep bep apen, ahinlai sungin abonchauvin achapa Isaac koma konin aki-inchonsah soh keiyin, niso lam, solam gamsunga asoltai.
Abraham ahinkho akum abon bonin kum ja khat le kum som sagi le kum nga alhingin;
chujouvin Abraham chu ahin kumkho lhingset’a ahin, tehsepu mong mong ahiphat’in athin; ama mite toh akivuitha tai.
Achapa teni Isaac le Ishmael in ama chu Machpelah a songlhan keova chun avui lhontai, hiche hi Mamre niso lama Hit mi Zohar chapa Ephron leimun chu ahin,
Abraham in Hit mitea kona anachohdoh leimun chu ahi. Hikoma chun Abraham jong ajinu Sarah toh akivui thai.
Abraham thi nungin Pathenin achapa Isaac chu phatthei aboh-in, Isaac jong Pathen mit’a kimua hindohna twikhuh a chun achengtai.
Hichengse hi Sarah sohnu Hagar in Abraham anahin peh, Abraham chapa Ishmael chilhahte ahiuve.
Ishmael chapate min chu apen dungjuiya kiminvo ahin hicheng hi ahiuve; Nebaioth chu Ishamel chapa apeng masapen ahin, chuin Kedar ahin, Adbeel ahin, Mibsam ahin,
Mishma ahin, Durhah ahin, Massa ahin,
Hadad ahin, Tema ahin, Jetur ahin, Naphish ahin, chule Kedemah ahi.
Hicheng chu Ishmael chapate ahiuvin, aminu jong akisei cheng chu ahi; akhosona akisima angahmun dungjuiya akilah le aphung khaiyin haosa chapa cheh som le ni alhinguve:
Ishmael hin nikho akum jat abonchan kum ja khat le kum som thum le kum sagi alhingin, ahaitanin chuin athitai; ama jong aphunggol mite lah a akivuitha tai.
amaho Havilah a pat Shur chan gei, Assyria gam jotha Egypt gamtoh kigaldot laiya chun achenguvin, amavang chu asopi jouse masanga akidoupi gunset in ana um jinge.
Abraham chapa Isaac khanggui hiti hi ahi: Abraham in Isaac ahingin,
chuin Isaac chu akum kum som li alhinin ajinu Rebekah, Paddan-aram gama Aramea mi Bethuel chanu, Aramea mi Laban sopinu chu akipuiyin ahi.
Ajinu achina cha neilouva aum phat’in Isaac jong Pakai henga ataovin ahile Pakaiyin ataona asangin ajinu Rebekah chun nao avoptai.
Asunga naosen teni chu ahung kisaito ji lhonin ahile amanun jong, “Ahiti ti jeng dinga ahile hichepi hi iti kadou ding hi tam!” atin, Pakai dongtoh dingin achetai.

@@@1Pakaiyin amanu jah a, @2“Na naobu sunga nampi ni aumin, @3Nasunga peng chu vaipi ni hung kiso @4ding ahi; @1Khatpa chu khatjoh pa sangin hung @3hatjon tin, @2A upan anaopa anga lhacha na ahintoh @3peh ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Amanu anaoso phat nikho alhinna anavah phat’in vetan anaobu sunga asohkop ucha ana um lhone.
Ahung peng lha masapa chu asanin, atahsa samul ponmul pi tobanga amul jeh-in amahon amin Esau asahtauve.
Ama nungin asopipa a hung penglhan, akhut’in Esau khotaljum akoldet kheh jengin ahile amin Jacob asahtauve. Ajinun amani ahinpeh pet hin Isaac kum somgup alhingtai.
Nao teni chu ahung kikhan lhit lhonin ahile Esau chu mi khut them sadel hat khat, gamnoi mi ahung hi khan, Jacob vang chu mi mong khat ahin in um mi ahi.
Isaac chun asadelsa aneh jing jeh-in Esau alungset’in, Rebekah vang chun Jacob alungset’e.
Khatvei chu Jacob in annoi akihonin ahile Esau jong agamva naa konin gilkel tah-in ahung lhungin,
hijeh chun Esau’n Jacob jah a, “Kagil akel lheh jenge, na-annoi hon sanleng lung chu them khatbeh neihopsah teiyin!” ati. Hijeh a chu amapa min Edom kisah ahi.
Hichun Jacob’in jong, “Amasan na-upat chu neichoh sah masah ta din,” atileh;
Esau’n jong, “Akelthi pai ding kihita a hiche upat chu ipipena pang dinga ka-it dinga nabol ham?” ati.
Chuin Jacob’in, “Kihahsel masa tadin,” atileh ama jong akoma akihahselin chule au-pat chu Jacob henga akijohdoh tan ahi.
Chuphat’in Jacob chun changlhah le abechim hon minsa chu Esau apen, aman jong anehjou adonjou phat’in akipatdoh in achetai. Hiti hin Esau’n aupat chu imacha loutheh-in ana geldauve.

Hichelai chun gamsunga kel ahung lhan, hiche kel lhah chu masang laiya Abraham nikho laiya kel lha masa sanga achombeh ahiye; hijeh chun Isaac chu Gerar langa Philistine lengpa Abimelech henga achetai.
Chuin ahenga Pakai ahung kilah-in hitin aseiye, “Egypt langa nache suh thei lou hel ding ahi, ‘keiman chengin’ kati na gam sunga chun chengin.

Hiche gamsunga hin khopem tadin, keiman naumpi jinging ting chule phatthei naboh jing nange; ijeh-inem itile keiman hiche gam hi aboncha nangle nachilhahte kapeh a, napa Abraham koma kaki hahselna kakigahna kamolso tei ding ahi.

Keiman nachilhahte hapun puna kapunsah a vana ahsi jat kaphah sah ding, chujongle nachilhahte chu hiche gam aboncha kapeh ding, chutengle nangma chilhahte jala leiset namtin vaipi abonchauva phatthei kaboh ding ahiuve.
Ajeh chu Abraham kitipa chun kathu ana ngaiyin, keiman kathu lhah na ahin, kathu peh ahin, kachondan thu ahin, chule kadan thu ahin anitsoh keiye,” ati.
Hijeh chun Isaac jong Gerar a achengden tai.

Chuche muna mihon ajinu chu ‘koiham’ tia adoh phat’uvin aman jong, “Hichenu hi ong, kasopinu hiya hi,” atipeh-e; ajeh chu, “Ajole hiche muna miho hin Rebekah jeh hin keima eithalo get’uvin te,” tia anagel jeh a, “Kajinu ahi,” tia seidoh ding kicha ahiye; ipijeh-inem itile amanu vet vet toh a mel hoi anahi jeh ahi.
Chuin Isaac dinga nikho asot tah khuh khuh phat’in Philistine lengpa Abimelech chun bangkot’a konin agahve suh-in ahile vetan Isaac-in ajinu Rebekah aji bola akinoupi pet amudoh tai.

Hijeh chun Abimelech-in Isaac akouvin, “veteh, veteh najinu ahibouvin, i-atile ‘Kasopinu ahibouve’ tia nasei ham?” atile; Isaac-in jong a mapa jah a ‘Ajole amanu jeh a hi keiman kathilo jeng ding khat hitam’ tia kanasei ahinai,” ati.
Abimelech-in jong, “Ipi dinga hitipia chu neibolu ham? Ilou themkhat’in mipi lah a mi khattouvin najinu chu analuppi khah taleh, nangin keiho themmo neichan dingu hita chula em?” atin ahi.
Hichun Abimelech-in mipi abonchan thu apesoh keiyin hitin aseiye, “Hiche mipa hi hen ajinu khu hijongle ahin khoiloh pen pen chun thina achan louhel ding ahi,” ati.
Hiche kum chun Isaac-in chuche gama muchi akitun ahile ajat ja khat jena tamjon aki-at’e. Hiti chun Pakaiyin ama phatthei anaboh-in,
chua konin Isaac chu ahung haodoh tan, hahao haova ahao khong geiyin aneibe cheh aneibe cheh jengin ahi.
Hitobang chun kelngoi hon jong, bong hon jong sohte jong ahao lheh jeng phat’in Philistine miten athangsetpi tauve.
Chujongle apa Abraham hinlaiya apa sohten twikhuh analaisau chu abonchan Philistine ten ahubinguvin leiset avuh dimpeh tauvin ahi.
Chule Abimelech jong chun Isaac jah, a “Kakomuva konin chedoh tan, ajeh chu nangma keiho sangin natha lhing jotai,” tin aseipeh-in ahi.
Chuphat’in Isaac chu chu koma konin achen Gerar phaichama ngahmun asemin hikoma chun achengtai.

Apa Abraham hin laiya anakhotsa twikhuh ho chu Isaac-in akile khot kit’in ahi; ajeh chu Abraham thi nunga Philistine miten avuh dim gamu ahitai; abonchan a pan anamin vo na aminu chun athah-in aminvo soh kei kit’in ahi.
Isaac sohten phaicham laiya chu twikhuh alaiyuva ahile twisam phung khat alaidoh tauve;

hichun Gerar gama gancha chinghon Isaac gancha ching ho chu akinah piuvin, “Hiche twi hi keihoa ahibouve,” atiuvin ahi; hijeh chun hiche twikhuh chu amin Esek akisah tai, ipijeh-inem amahon Isaac akinahpi jeh-u ahiye.
Chujouvin amahon twikhuh achom khat alai kituvin ahile, hiche chung changa jong chun akinah lo kit tauve; hijeh chun hiche jong chu amin Sitnah asah kit’uve.

Chuin chukoma, kon chun akichonin twikhuh chombeh khat alaiya ahile hiche chung changa vang chun akinahpi tapouve; hijeh chun aman a min Rehoboth asah-in hitin aseiye, “Tun vang Pakaiyin eiho dingin mun eihon peh tauve, chule agamsunga hi eiho jong cha le naovin pungjal tau hite,” ati.
Hichea kon chun Beersheba ajontouvin ahile,

hiche janle le chun ahenga Pakai ahung kilah-in, “Keima napa Abraham Pathen chu kahi; nakichat louhel ding ahiye, ajeh chu keiman nangma kaumpi jingin chule kalha cha Abraham jala nangma phatthei kaboh a nachilhah te kapun sah cheh cheh ding ahi,” ati.
Aman jong hikoma chun maicham khat asemin Pakai minin ataovin, chule hikom le lea chun aponbuh jong akison tai. Hilai tah a chun Isaac soh ten twikhuh khat akhot’uve.
Abimelech jong Gerar a pat’in athumop pa Ahuzzath le asepai lamkaipa Phicol toh Isaac henga agachei.
Isaac-in amaho jah a chun, “Ipi dinga kahenga hung nahiuvam, neivet dauva nakomuva kona neisol mangu hita lou ham?” anatileh;
amahon jong, “Pakaiyin nangma naumpi ti hi keihon kamu chen mong mong tauve; hijeh a chu keihon ikah-uva kigahna khat aumtei ding kadeiyuvin, chule nangtoh kitepna khat kasem nomuve;

keihon nangma bol jong bolse louva imacha lo louva thilpha kabolpehuva lung monga kasoldoh bang banguva nangin jong keiho neibolset louna dinguvin; nangma hi tua Pakai phatthei boh nahi ahitai,” ahung tiuve.
Chuphat’in aman golvah abolpin aneuvin adonuvin ahi.
Jingkah jingpi tah-in akithouvin, khat khat’in agolpa khat khat toh akihahsel cheh-uvin ahi; chuin Isaac chun amaho agam languva agasol doh-in, amaho jong akoma konin lung mongin achedohtauve.
Hiche nikho chun Isaac sohte ahenga ahunguvin atwikhuh khot thudolu ahung seipeh uvin ajah a, “Keihon twi kakhot doh tauve,” tin aseiyuve.
Aman hichu Shibah asahtai; hijeh a chu hiche khopi chu tuni geiya amin Beersheba kiti ahiye.
Esau chu kum som li alhin phat’in Hit mi Beeri chanu Judith le Hit mi ma ma Elon chanu Basemath chu jin akipuiye.
Ahin amani chun Isaac le Rebekah hinkho abol hesoh lheh jeng lhonin ahi.
Isaac atehset’a amit te nin kho amu theilou phat’in achapa lenjo Esau chu akouvin ajah a, “Kachapa,” atile, aman “Hoijo,” ahinti.
Chuin aman “Ven keima kateh lheh tan, itih ni pena kathi ding ham jong kahetapoi.
Hijeh chun tun naman chah ho, naliva thei le nathalpi kigot’in lang gam lah a chen lang kei dingin sa gadeltan;
chutengle kathi masanga nangma phatthei kaboh theina dinga kaneh dingin keiman kadu lam tah-in althet’in neihin honpeh-in lang neihin dop peh-in,” ati.
Isaac chun achapa Esau jah a thu asei pet’in Rebekah-in jong ana ngai lhijingin ahi. Esau gamlah a sa gadela hinpo dinga achedoh phat’in,
Rebekah chun achapa Jacob jah a hitin aseiye, “Ven keiman na-upa Esau jah a napa thusei kajan hitin ati,
Sa neigadel peh-in lang chutengle althet’in neihin honpeh-in, keiman ne ing ting kathi masangin Pakai angsunga phatthei naboh inge,” ati.
Hijeh chun tun keiman kaseipeh got thu hi ngai phan kachapa.
Kelngoi hon lah a khun chen lang anou ni ahoitah cheh alah a kon khun kahenga hinkaiyin, keiman ani lhon chun napan adulam tah-in althet’in honpeh ing katin,
chutengle nangman napa gapen natin, aman aneh a athi masanga phatthei naboh theina dingin,” ati.
Chuphat’in Jacob chun anu Rebekah jah a, “Veteh ka-upa Esau atimul mihem hiya keila timul bei mihem kahin,
ijem tin kapan eihin julle ta leh ama daithanga kabah ding ahitan; phatthei boh ma lah a keiman kachunga gaosapna kakiloi khum jeng ding joh ahibouve,” ati.
Ahinla anun ajah a, “Kachapa, nangma nagaosapna chu kei chunga lhung nante, kathu sei hi ngaipou pouvin, chen lang kahenga hinkai loiyin,” tin aseitai.
Hijeh chun ama achen, aga manin chule anu henga ahin kai luttai; chuin anun jong apa dulam tah-in althet’in ahonpeh tai.
Chuin Rebekah chun achapa alenjo Esau von apha lai cheh insunga ama koma um chu alan, achapa neojo Jacob chu avonpeh-in,
chule kelngoinou teni vun chu akhut teni le angong mulbei lai chu atomnan,
chuin sa althet’a ahonle changlhah chu achapa Jacob khut’a aluiyin ahi.
Hiti chun Jacob apa henga agalut’in, “Hepa,” aga ti leh, aman jong, “Hoi jo, koi nahim kachapa?” ahinti.

Hichun Jacob’in apa jah a, “Keima nachapa apeng masapa Esau chu kahi; nangin neihil bang bang chun kahin boltai, lungset tah-in hung toudoh-in lang, hiche jeh a hi phatthei neiboh theina dingin kasa pohsa hi hung netan,” ati.
Hichun Isaac-in achapa jah a, “He katei, hichepi chu man gang tah-in nagavaidoh loi jengin ne, kachapa!” atileh, aman jong, “Pakai na-Pathen chun eito khahsah jeh hiya chu,” ati.
Chuin Isaac chun Jacob henga, “Hung nailut temin kachapa, nangma hi kachapa Esau nahi mong hi nam, na hilou ham najulle tem minge,” atitai.
Hijeh chun Jacob’in apa Isaac anai lut’in ahile aman jong ama ahin jul len, “A oso hi la Jacob oso ahin akhut teni hi la Esau khut teni ahi ngalin ne,” atin ahi.
Akhut teni aupa Esau khut teni banga amul jeh a chu ahetdoh thei lou ahitai; hiti chun aman Jacob joh chu phatthei aboh-in,
“Nang kitipa hi kachapa Esau nahi mong mong hinam?” atile, aman jong, “Kahinai,” ati.

Chuphat’in aman, “Kahenga hindom nai temin, kahai hai pet’a hi nangma phatthei kaboh theina dingin kachapa sa-lhutsa chu neng kate,” a tin; chuin ahin doppeh phat’in anen, chule lengpi twi jong ahindop peh-in ahile Isaac chun adontai.
Hichun apa Isaac chun ajah a, “Eihin nailut’in lang neihin chop’in kachapa,” atile;
@@Jacob’in jong ama chu anailut’in achoptai; chuin akivonna ho gimnam chu anah le len, phatthei aboh-in aseiye, @2“Vetan kachapa gimnam hi, @3Pakai phatthei bohsa gamlah gimvui abange!
@@@1Pathenin vana konin daitwi nape @3jing hen, @2Leiset’a leichang phalai lai chansah @3jing hen; @1Chule changle juning ning lhinsah @2jinghen.

@@@1Mitinin nangma kin bol henlang, @1Namtin vaipi nahenga kun cheh hen. @2Nasopite chunga athu neipenin @3pangin lang, @1Nanu sung kon pasal jouse nahenga kun @2cheh-u hen. @2Koi hile nang nagaosap chan chu @3gaosap chang hen lang, @1Nangma phatthei naboh chan chu @2phatthei boh chang hen!” ati.
Isaac chun Jacob phatthei aboh chai chaiyin, Jacob jong apa Isaac angsunga konin agapot doh man nah nah-in ahile aupa Esau chu agamlenna konin ahung lut pai jen tai.
Aman jong neh ding sa althet’in ahonpeh-in apa henga ahindop peh-in, apa jah a, “Hepa hung kithouvin lang, nahai hai pet’a phatthei neibohna dingin, nachapa thasa hi hung ne-o!” atileh;
apa Isaac chun ajah a, “Nang koi nahi hinga na?” ahintin; amanjong, “Keima nachapa peng masapen Esau chu kahi chula em!” ati.

Chutah chun Issac jong ati akihot setsut jengin, “Nangma hung masanga sa gakap a kahenga hinchoiya, keiman kaneh jousoh kei phat’a phatthei kanaboh pa chu koiba hiya hitam? Ama chu phattheiboh chang den ding ahitai,” tin aseitai.
Apa thusei ho pi chu ajahdoh phat’in Esau jong ha ka kan akap’in, ha lungnat’in alungnan, apa jah a chun, “Hepa kei jong phatthei neiboh tei tei bouvin ong!” ati.
Ahinla aman, “Nanaopa du ha hung kilep’a hung nangma phatthei chan ding akisandoh hita bep’a chu,” atipeh-e.

Chuin aman, “Hiche jeh a hi amin Jacob kisah hiteiyinte ong? Ajeh chu aman nivei jen hiti pi hin eilhem lhan, ka upat eina lahpeh-in, chule vetan tun kaphatthei chan ding anakilahdoh kit’e,” atin hichun, “Kei dinga phattheina neina khendoh peh lou hitam?” atileh;

Isaac-in adonbut’in Esau jah a hitin ati, “Vetan keiman ama chu nangma chunga thu nei dingin kasemtan, nasopite chengse jong ama lhacha dingin kapedoh tan, chang ahin juning ahin ama kivahna dingin kakoipeh tai; tua hijat nunga chu nangma ipi kabolpeh thei nah lai ding ham kachapa?” atitai.
Ahivangin Esau’n apajah a, “Phattheina khat beh nanei nah lai lou ham hepa? Hiche chun keima phatthei neiboh tei teiyin ong, hepa!” atin; apeng jengin akaptai.
@@Chuphat’in apa Isaac-in ahouvin ajah a, @1“Vetan leichang phalou lah lah a cheng @2ding nahitan, @1Van daitwiyin jong hinvat khah @2taponte;
@@@1Nachem hemhat’a nahin a, @2chule nanaopa kinbola napan ding @3ahi, @1Ahin tin nahung ki-ondoh teng vangle, @2Nangonga kona ama namkol chu @3napai lhah ding ahitai.” ati.

Hiche phat chun Esau’n Jacob chu apan phatthei anaboh jal chun aho tan, Esau’n alungthim sunga hitin ageltan, “Kapa selnit a puldouna ding la ani kho khon ahung naitul tul tan, akichai tengle keiman kanaopa Jacob katha ding ahi,” ati.

Ahin achapa lenjo Esau thu ngaito ho chu Rebekah jah akiseidoh khatan, hijeh chun amanun jong mi asolin achapa neojo Jacob chu aga kousah-in ajah a, “Ven na-upa Esau khun nang thana ding ngaiton ama le ama akilung mon tai.
Hijeh chun tun kasei ngaiyin kachapa, kipat’in lang napu Laban kom, Haran langa jam mang tan,
chujongle ama koma chun ni ijat hijongle ga umtan, naupa lungdam kahsen,

na-upa alungdam mong monga nangman nabolna chu asuhmil hel masangsen; keiman mi hinsol ing ting khulanga konin nahung holdoh sah nange; ipi dinga nani lhontah a ni khat tah a kalhaso lhon ding ham?” a tin ahi.

Rebekah chun Isaac jah a, “Keiman kahin kho hin Hit mite chanu ho katheichim behseh jengtai; ijem tin Jacob’in agamsung chanute, Hit chanute lah a konin hitobang numeinu khat hi hin kipui lut jeng ta leh keima hinkhoa ipi soh ding hitam?” agati.
Hichun Isaac-in Jacob akouvin, phatthei aboh-in chule athu lhah-in ajah a, “Nangman Canaan chanute lah a kona ji nakipui thei lou ding ahi;
kipatdoh-in lang Paddan-aram a nanu pa Bethuel ina chen, chukoma kon chun nanu sopipa Laban chanu ho khat naji dingin gakipuitan.
Pathen hat chungnung chun phatthei naboh hen lang nacha nanao tha lhin sah hen napunsah hen, hiti chun vaipi hon khat’in hung umdoh teiyin.
Abraham phatthei kibohna chu nangle nakijoppi nachilhah te nahinpeu hen lang, hiti chun Pathenin Abraham apehsa nakho pemna gamsung hi nalosah tei tei hen!” ati.
Hiti chun Isaac-in Jacob chu asol mangtai; ama jong Paddan-aram langa Jocob le Esau hingnu Rebekah sopipa Aramea mi Behtuel chapa Laban henga achetai.

Esau chun Isaac-in Jacob phatthei aboh a, Paddan-aram langa aji ding gakipui dinga asol manga chule phatthei aboh pet’a agihsala, “Canaan mite chanu lah a kona numeijia nakipui theilou hel ding ahi,” tia aseipeh a,
chule Jacob’in apa le anu thu angaiya Paddanaram langa ache chu amulhitai.
Esau chun apa Isaac-in Canaan mite chanu ho adeipoi, ti amudoh phat’in
Esau jong Ishmael henga achen, Abraham chapa Ishmael chanu Nebaioth sopinu Mahalath chu aji masa teni belap dingin agakipuiben ahi.
Jacob chun Beersheba adalhan Haran lang ajontai.
Gamkim lai khat ahung geidon hin nisan alhum den tan, hijeh chun ama jong hiche jan chun chukom muna ageh den tai. Age na muna song ho khat chu alan lukhap’in aneiyin chukom muna chun alumin ahi.
Janin mang anei yin, vetan leiset’a konin kalbi lei khat akido touvin amongin van agaphapeh-e; chujongle vetan akalbi leiya chun Pathen Vantilte akaltou jing akumsuh jing uve.
Chule ven achung vuma chun Pakai atouvin hitin ati, “Keima Pakai napu Abraham Pathen, Isaac Pathen kahi, nalupna gam chu keiman nangle nachilhahte kapeh nahiuve;
nachilhahte leiset leivuijat hung phantin, nilhum lang niso lang, sah lang lhang lang nahin khokhong soh ding, nangle nachilhahte jeh a leiset’a phung namkim phatthei kaboh ding ahiuve.

Chule ven nangma ka-umpi jingin, nachena chana naching jing ing ting, chujoule hiche gama hi kahin lepui lut kit ding nahi; ajeh chu hiche najah a kaseidoh hi kabolpeh masangsea kada lhah lou he! ding nahi,” ati.
Jacob chu aimut ahung khah lo phat’in, “Hiche muna hi la Pakai um mong mong ahin, ken la kana he hih beh in’e!” atin;
akicha lheh jengin aman jong, “Hiche munpi hi iti tijat kichat umah hitam! Hiche lai hi Pathen in ahiloule thil dang imacha ahita poi; chujongle hiche lai hi vangam kelkot phung ahibouve,” ati.
Jacob chu jingpi tah-in athouvin alukhap song chu alan khom phun aphut’in achunga chun thaotwi asun khumin ahi.
Chule hiche lai mun chu amin Bethel asah tai; amasaa vang chu hiche khopi hi amin Luz anahi.
Hichun Jacob’in kigahna khat aneiyin hitin aseiye, “Chutia Pathenin eiumpi jinga, hiche kache na lam dung lhunga jong eichin jinga, neh ding changlhah le silding ponsil eipeh a,
kapa in lama lung monga kahung ki le kit theiya ahivangle Pakai chu kei dingin ka-Pathen hin tin,
chule hiche song khomphua kaphudoh hi Pathen in hung hi ding, chutengle nangman neipeh jouse hi hopsoma hop khat nangma kapeh ding ahi,” ati.
Jacob chu akal song jom pai paiyin, solam mite gam alhung tai.

Chuin agahven ahile tollhanga chun twikhuh khat amun, vetan akoma chun kelngoi hon loithum akol’uve; ijeh-inem itile hiche twikhuh a kona chu kelngoiten twi adon jiu ahi. Twikhuh kamsin song chu lenpi ahin,

kelngoite hikoma chu ahung kikhop kim tengule kelngoi chinghon twikhuh kamsin song chu atahdoh jiuva kelngoite twi achip sah jiu, chule song chu akikoina ngai ngai twikhuh kama chu atahlut kit jiu ahiye.
Jacob’in amaho jah a chun, “Kasopite hoilam kon nahiuvam?” atileh, amahon jong “Keiho Haran khoa kon kahiuve,” tin aseipeh-uvin ahi.
Aman ajah uva, “Nahor chapa Laban chu nahet khah hih uvam?” a tile, amahon johg, “Kahenauve,” atiuve.
Chuin aman ajah uva, “Ama chu dam dam a hinam?” tia adoh leh, amahon, “Dam damna chu, vetang achanu Rachel in jong kelngoi ahin hoinah khu!” atipeh-uve.
Hichun aman jong, “Veteh nisa sangtah hinalaiya gancha hoikhom phat bon hilou lai, kelngoiho chu twi chipsah-uvin lang cheuvin gavah phauvin,” atileh;
amahon, “Kelngoi jouse ahung kikhop kim masangin bolthei pouvinge, twikhuh kamsin song khu akitahdoh tengle bou kelngoite hi twi kachipsah dingu ahibouve,” atiuvin ahi.
Jacob amaho toh ana kihoulim nalaiyin ahile Rachel chu apa kelngoite toh ahung kijot lut tai; ajeh chu ama jong kelngoi ching ma ma ahiye.
Jacob chun anu sopipa Laban chanu Rachel le anu sopipa Laban kelngoite chu amu phat’in anai lut’in, twikhuh kamsin song chu atangdoh-in, anu sopipa Laban kelngoi honte chu twi achipsah tai.
Chujongle Jacob’in Rachel chu achop’in othongje jun akap’e.
Jacob chun Rachel jah a ama Rachel pa tupa ahiya Rebekah chapa ahi chu asei peh-in ahile Rachel jong alhaijelin apa jah a agaseipeh tan ahi.

Laban chu asopinu chapa Jacob thupoh ajah doh phat’in alamdot dingin alheijelin, apumpin akoiyin achop jengin chuin ainlama ahinpuitai. Jacob’in jong thusim jouse chu a bon chan Laban aseipeh soh keiye.
Labanin ama jah a, “Nang hi la kagu kachang, kaphe kavou mong mong nahibouvin,” atin; Jacob jong Labantoh lha khat jen acheng khom tai.
Hichun Labanin Jacob jah a, “Katupa nahi jeh a chu iti nangin kei na namoh toh toh jeng thei ding ham, natoh man ipi hi ding ham neiseipeh tem in?” tin adongtai.
Laban chun chanu ni aneiyin, alenjo nu chu amin Leah ahin, aneojo nu min chu Rachel ahi.
Leah chu amit leo thimin, Rachel vang chu amel hoi lheh jengin vetnom nom aum jenge.
Jacob’in Rache! chu adeichan, hijeh chun aman jong, “Nachanu neojo nu Rachel kilo nan kum sagi sungin keima nalhachan panging kate,” ati.
Hichun Labanin, “Hiche nu hi midang khat kapeh sanga nangma kapeh ding chu thilphajo ba ahibouve, kakoma cheng tan,” atin ahi.
Hijeh chun Jacob’in kum sagi sungin Rachel chu akitha lon, amanu adeichat behseh jeh chun kum chujatpi chu ni chomcha abahsah-in ahi.
Chujouvin Jacob chun Laban jah a, “Kaji ding nu chu nei pedoh jengtan kanikho jat jong alhingah ahitan, kei jong ahenga lut tange,” tin athum tai.
Chuphat’in Labanin jong akhomun a mi jouse akou khomin golvah aboltan ahi.
Ahin jan ahiphat’in aman jong achanu Leah joh chu apuiyin Jacob henga agathah tai; chule Jacob’in jong amanu chu aluppi tan ahi.
Labanin asohnu Zilpah jong chu achanu Leah dia soh-a pang dingin apeh thai.

Jingkah kho avah phat’in vetan Leah joh anahin, hijeh chun Jacob’in Laban jah a chun, “Ipi itia hitobang pia hi neibol hitam? Keiman Rachel lo naa nangma na katoh hilou ham? Ipi dinga hitia hi nei jou lhep hitam?” tin aseitai.
Chuin Laban chun, “Aunu sanga anaonu lhah doh masah chu keiho kho chonna ngai lou ahi;
hiche hapta khat lhing hin kichenpi pou pouvin, khatnu jong khu kum sagi ma kana natoh kit man dingin nape nange,” atipeh-e.
Jacob’in hiti chun abolin, amanu chu hapta khat lhingin akichen pin, hiche jou chun Labanin jong achanu Rachel chu amapa ji dingin apetai.
Laban chun asohnu Bilhah jong chu achanu Rachel soh-a pang dingin apeh thai.
Jacob chun Rachel jong agaluppin, chujongle Leah sang chun Rachel adeijon, kum sagi sungma Laban na atong kit’in ahi.
Pakaiyin Leah kihotbol chu amudoh phat’in cha neithei dingin anaobu ahonpeh-in, Rachel vang chu cha neilouvin achingtai.
Hiti chun Leah-in nao avop’in chapa khat ahingin amin Reuben asah-e; ijeh-inem itile amanun “Pakaiyin kagimna eimupeh-in, chujongle tua hi kajipan eilungset tei tei ding ahitai,” ati.
Leah chun nao avop kit’in chapa khat ahing kit tai, chule “Keima eikihotbol hi Pakaiyin ajahdoh phat’a chapa hiche jong hi eipeh kit ahiye,” a tin; hijeh chun amin jong Simeon asah-e.
Leah chun nao avop kitleuvin, chapa khat ahin kit phat’in, amanun jong, “Tun vang kajipan eikiti khatpi tei teiyinte, chapa thum jen kahinpeh tai,” atin, hiche jeh chun amin Levi asah-in ahi.
Chujouvin jong nao avop kit’in chapa khat ahingin, “Tuchunga vang Pakai kathangvah na ding ahi,” atin; hijeh chun amin Judah asah-e. Chujouvin vang cha a bang tan ahi.
Rachel chun Jacob cha ahinpeh lou hel akimudoh phat’in aunu athangsetpin, hijeh chun Jacob henga, “Kei jong cha le nao neihin pin achuti loule thidoh jeng ing kate!” atin ahile;
Rachel chunga chun Jacob alung hang jah jengin, “Pathen khela panga nachikhai na ding nanaobu khah tana chu keima kahibeh ham?” ati.

Chuphat’in aman jong, “Vetemin kasohnu Bilhah aumnai, amanu khu galuppi tan, chutile kapheichunga kapom ding cha eihinpeh intin, chutia chu kei jengin jong amanu jala hi cha le nao kanei thei ding ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun Rachelin Jacob chu asohnu Bilhah jia anei dingin apedoh-in, Jacob’in amanu chu agaluppin ahile,
Bilhah chun nao ahinvop’in chapa khat ahinpeh tai.
Hichun Rachelin, “Pathenin kachung thu eitan peh-in chule kataona asangin, chapa khat eipetai,” atin, hijeh chun amin Dan asah-e.
Rachel sohnu Bilhah chun nao avop kit’in Jacob chu achapa ni lhinna ahinpeh kit tan ahi.
Hichun Rachelin, “Keima Pathen kibotna jousen ka-unu toh kakibonin keiman kajoutai,” atin, hijeh chun hichepa min chu Naphtali asah tai.
Aman cha aban akihetdoh phat’in Leah chun asohnu Zilpah apuiyin Jacob’in jia anei dingin agapetai.
Hijeh chun Leah sohnu Zilpah-in jong Jacob chu chapa khat ahinpeh-in ahi.
Leah chun, “Hamphat aumbouve,” atin, hichepa chu amin Gad asah-in ahi.
Leah sohnu Zilpah chun Jacob dingin chapa ani lhinna ahing kit’in ahile,
Leah chun, “Anun noma kahiye, numei jousen’anun nom nu’eiti cheh dingu ahitai,” atin, hichepa min chu Asher asah-in ahi.

Suhlou chang at laiyin Reuben chu vai akonin ahile loulaiya chun joldei ai phabep agamu doh-in, abonchan anu Leah ahinpoh peh-in ahi. Hichun Rachelin Leah jah a, “Lungset tah-in nachapa joldei ai poh chu them khat beh neipe tei teiyin,” tin athumtai.

Ahinla Leah chun Rachel jah a, “Kajipa neilah peh jong chu thil neocha nabola, kachapa joldei ai ho san jong lahpeh ding neiti ham?” atile, Rachelin, “Chuti ahile nachapa joldei ai man dingin aman tujan nangma naluppi thei nante,” atin;

Jacob chu nilhah louvai kon ahung lhun phat’in Leah chu alamdot din agapot doh-in chule, “Kahenga nahung lut tei tei ding ahi, ajeh chu kachapa joldei ai ya kachoh nahitai,” anati. Hijeh chun amapan jong hiche jan chun Leah alup khom pin ahi.
Pathenin Leah taona asanpeh jeh-in Leah chun nao ahinvop’in Jacob dingin chapa nga lhinna ahinpeh tai.
Hichun Leah-in, “Kasohnu chu kajipa kapehdoh jeh-in Pathenin kachoh doh man eipetai,” atin, hichepa min chu Issachar asah-in ahi.
Chujouvin jong Leah chun nao avop kit’in Jacob dingin chapa gup lhinna ahing kit tai.
Hichun Leah-in, “Pathenin keima numei thilken kenphatah eikenpeh-e, kajipan jong eijabol lheh tante, ajeh chu chapa gup kahinpeh ahitai,” atin, hichepa min chu Zebulun asah-e.
Hiche nung chun chanu khat ahingin amin Dinah asah-in ahi.
Chujou chun Pathenin Rachel gelkhohna ahin neiyin ataona asangin chule anaobu ahonpeh tai.
Hijeh chun Rachelin jong nao avop in chapa ahin hinphat in, “Pathenin kajachatna asubeitai”, atin;
hijeh chun hichepa chu amin Joseph asah-in, hitin aseiye, “Pakaiyin chapa khat jong eihinsah kit tei tei hen o!” ati.
Rachelin Joseph ahinphat chun Jacob’in jong Laban jah a, “Neisol tan kakho langa che tange.
Kakilo dohsa kajite ahin kachate ahiuvin neipedoh-in lang neichesah tan, ajeh chu itobanga nangma na katoh peh nahim nangman nakihetnai,” atileh.
Hichea chun Labanin ajah a, “Namitmua kalung lhaisah thei khat ding ahile nangma jeh a hi la Pakaiyin keima phatthei eiboh ahi, tin keiman phunin kagah sandoh tan;
hijeh chun natoh man ding jong seiyin keiman kapeh ding nahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Jacob’in ajah a, “Itobanga nangma na katoh a na gancha itobanga hung phadoh ham, nangin nahet chu me.

Ijeh-inem itile kahung lhun masang chun themcha bou na na neiyin, hiche chu tha-lhingset’in ahung pungjaltai; chujongle kakalsena chana Pakaiyin nangma phatthei naboh jinge. Ahile tukal beh a keima insung ding jong kakitoh le iti ham?” ati.
Ahile, “Ipiba kapeh ding nahim?” tia adoh leh, Jacob’in jong, “Imacha neipeh lou hel ding ahi, hiti chun hiche chu bol kit leng nakelngoi te kavah kit’a kachinpeh kit ding ahin;

tun keiman na kelngoi hon gakholsoh keiying ting, alahuva kon chun kelngoi apol thimle hapol pola pol ho ahin, kelngoi lah a kona kelngoi vom jouse ahin, chule kelcha ho lah a jong hapol pola pol hihen lang apol thim hi jongle galhengdoh ing ting, hiche ho chu katoh man ding hitauvinte;

jing teng keima tohman sutoh dinga nahung tengle kathilbol dihna chun kei khelin achamin nadonbut nante; kelchate lah a chu apolthim lou hihen hapol pola pol lou hijongle akimudoh khah a, kelngoi lah a jong avomlou khattou aum khah a ahile kaguh a kisim jeng thei ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun Labanin, “Apha lhehjenge! Nasei bang bang hi jeng hen,” atipeh-e.

Ahinla Labanin hiche nikho chun kelcha akangpol thimle hapol pola pol chengse toh kelpi apolthim ho le hapol pola pol jouse ahin, ati chung them khat kang pol tapou le kelngoi vom jouse chu atoldohin, hiche ho chu achapate achinsah-in,
Jacob toh akah-u chu nithumjen lampia kigam lat’in asolmangtai; chule Jacob chun Laban kelngoi amoh chengse chu achingin ahi.
Hichun Jacob’in jong heng thing toithah le jonmot toithah chule theiba toithah asat khomin, asunga alai kanglai ho chu akhoh lha lhan, thing toithah ho akanglai jouse chu akhohdoh sohkeiyin,
chuin aman ahoh akhokangsa thingtoi chu kelngoi honte masang vakom lai twi lonna, kelngoite twichip dinga ahung ji nauva chun agolin ahi. Twi chip dinga ahung ji tengule kijang matji ahi jeh-u chun;
kelngoi ho chu thingtoi thah ho kom lai tah a chun akijang matjiuvin ahile kelngoite chun akangpol jong apolthim jong chule hapol pola pol ho jong ahin hingdoh doh tauve.
Jacob’in kelngoite chu ahoikhenin, Laban kelngoi hon lah a akangpol hole avom ho chu ahoikhomin, ama chan ding chengse chu abungin akhendoh-in Labana lah a chun ahoilut tapoi.
Chujongle kelngoi lah a asapha ho chun ajangmat tengule thingtoi ho amu’uva akijangmat theina dinguvin, Jacob’in jong thingtoi ho amasanguva twi lonna komlai laiya chun agajam peh jin ahi;
asapha lou ho vang chu ahitengle agajamle khoh poi; hijeh chun Laban a chu asaphalou jeng ahin, Jacob a vang chu asapha jeng ahiuve.
Hiti chun Jacob chu akhangtou tel tul jengin, kelngoila atama tam aneitan, soh numei ahin soh pasal ahin tamtah tah aneiyin, sangongsao le sangan jong tampi pi aneidoh tai.
Laban chapaten, “Jacob’in ipau neijouse abonchan akilah in, ahaona hichengse pi jong khu ipau thilkeova kona akilamdoh ahibouve,” tia athuseiyu chu Jacob’in akijah doh tan;
chujongle Laban maiso Jacob’in avet’a ahile vetan masanga bang chun alung lhaitapoi.
Hichun Pakaiyin Jacob henga, “Napu napa te gam langa na-inkote henga kile kittan, keiman naumpi jing nange,” tin aseipeh tai.
Hijeh chun Jacob’in mi asolin akelngoi hon umna tollhanga chun Leah le Rachel aga koudohsah-in,
chule ajah lhona, “Napa lhon maiso kavet le masanga bang chun eilung lhai tapoi; hijongle la kei pa-Pathen chun eiumpi jing nai.
Keiman katha hangsan jousen napa lhon natoh ding katonge, ti nangni tah-in jong nahe lhonin;
ahinah vangin napa lhon khun somvei jen katohman ding hi eiphalpeh hihlaiye.

Aman, ‘Hapol pola pol chengse chu nang tohman ding hitante,’ atile la kelngoi hon jousen hapol pola pol jeng ahing jiuvin; ahile ‘Akangpol jouse nang tohman ding hihen’ atile kelngoi hon jousen akangpol jeng ahing jin.
Hitia chu Pathenin napau ganchate ahinlah doh a keima eipeh ahi.
Kelngoite jangmat laiyin kajan mangin kakhodah-in kavet leh kelpi chunga kaldoh kelchal ho chu akangpol jong, hapol pola pol jong chule apolgel belbul jong kamui.
Chuin Pathen Vantil chun kajan mangin kajah a, ‘Jacob’ eihin tin, ken jong, ‘Hoi jo’ katileh,

aman, ‘Khodah-in lang kelpi ho chunga kaldoh kelchal ho khu vetemin, akangpol jeng hapol pola pol jeng chule apolbel bul jeng ahiuve; ‘ijeh-inem itile Labanin nabolna jouse keiman abonchan kamusoh keitai.
Keima Bethela song khom thao nanua kahenga nakigahna Pathen chu kahi. Tun kipatdoh-in lang hiche gama kon hin potdoh loiyin lang napenna gam langa kile kit tan,’ tin aseiye,” ati.
Chuphat’in Rachel le Leah in jong adonbut lhonin ajah a, asei lhone, “Kapa lhon ina chu kei ni chan ding khattou ahiloule gouva kalo lhon ding khattou kida lha um beh ham?
Aman kholgam mi bola eibol lhon hilou ham? Ajeh chu aman keini jong eikijoh lhona keini kichohna sum jouse jong anehjou gam ahitai.
Pathenin kapa lhona kona alah mang thilkeo jouse chu keini dingle ka chate lhon ding ahibouve. Hijeh chun tun Pathenin najah a asei jouse chu ipi hijongle bol jengin,” ati lhontai.
Hichun Jacob akipatdoh-in achapate le ajite sangongsao ho chunga atoudoh sah soh keiyin,
agancha abonchan akihoidoh-in, aki lamdoh agancha hing thei jouse abonchan, Paddan-aram gama alamdoh agoukhol chengse agosoh keiyin Canaan gama apa Isaac henga che dingin aumtai.
Laban chu kelngoi mul vou dinga avaikondoh phat’in Rachel in indoi Teraphim chu akiguh mangtai.
Jacob’in jong Aramea mi Laban chu alhim lhah-in ajamdoh ding lam cha jong aseidoh peh hih beh-e.
Hiti chun amapa anei jouse pumin ajamdoh tan ahi; hiti chun akipat’in Euphrates vadung apal galkaiyin, chule Gilead thinglhang lam ahin manotai.
Nithum lhinin Jacob ajamdoh tai tin Laban akiseipeh tai.
Labanin jong au anao ahin kipuiyin Jacob chu nisagi sungin ahin nungdelin, Gilead thinglhang gamsung geiyin anung ahinjui lutpeh tan ahi.
Ahin Pathen chu jan mangin Aramea mipa Laban henga ahungin chule ajah a, “Thupha hi hen lang thuse hileh thu cheng khat cha jong Jacob henga nasei louna dingin kichih theiyin,” ahung ti.
Laban chun Jacob nung aphatan, chule Jacob’in thinglhang lah a chun aponbuh anasongin chuin Laban le au anao tenjong Gilead thinglhang gamsunga chun ngahmun asemtauve.
Hichun Labanin Jacob jah a, “Ipi nabola nangin neijou lhep a chule kachanu teni geiya chemhem hat’a kila soh kaiya nakai mang hitam?
Ipi ding monga guhthim cha najam doh a nei jou lhep a semjang sai le khongbeh kithoa kipana la kilhah dohna thei ding beh a neisei peh lou hel ham?
Chujongle ibola kachapa chengle kachanu teni beh lhahdohna dinga kachop ding jong naphal lou ham? Tua nathil bol hi na-ngol chaloh lheh jenge.
Nangho bolsetna ding jong keiman tha kanei nan, ahivangin nangho pa-Pathen chun jan nilhah-in kahenga thu ahinseiyin hiti ati, ‘Kichih theiyin Jacob henga thupha jong thuse jong sei hih beh-in’ eiti.
Tua vang nangma achedoh mong mong nahi ahitai, ajeh-chu napa insung nalha ngai behseh jeng ahitan; ahile ibola ka indoi ho chu na naguh doh jeng ham?” ati.
Jacob’in adonbut’in Laban jah a, “Ajo khat le nachanu teni pum hat’a neilahpeh jeng khat ding ham, tia kagela kaki chat jeh ahiye.

Na indoi ho namudoh napen pen chu koi hijongle kihinghoi lou hel ding ahi, na-u nanaote masanga hin nang thil ipi pi kalah am lhengdoh inlang kilah jengin,” ati. Rachelin indoi ho anakiguh lam chu Jacob’in anahet lou ahi.

Hichun Labanin Jacob ponbuh sung akholin, Leah popbuh sung akholin, asoh numei teni ponbuh sung jong akholin amudoh tapoi. Chujouvin Leah ponbuh a ahung potdoh chun Rachel ponbuh sunga aga lut’in ahi.
Rachel chun indoi ho Teraphim chu anaguh a sangongsao pho kah a chu anasela chule achunga chu ama anatou ahi. Laban chun ponbuh sung aphetleh soh heltan jong amudoh deh tapoi.

Hichea chun Rachelin apa jah a, “Mit thip’in neive hih beh-in hepa ajeh chu numei che na ngai chun eiphah pet ahin na-masanga kading doh theipoi,” ati. Labanin adang aholsoh keiyin ahivangin indoi teraphim chu amudoh deh tapon ahi.

Chuphat’in Jacob chun alung alhason Laban chunga alung hang lheh jengtan; chujongle Jacob’in adonbut’in Laban jah a, “Ipi kathepmona uma ham? Kachonsetna ipi ham, nangin hibang tah a lung hanga kanung nahindel jengpi chu?
Kathilkeo hijatpi naphetleh soh hela chu nangma thilkeo ijat-mong namudoh hinam? Hikom laitah a kamite le nangma mite angsunga hin hinkoi temin, amahon eini kah a thu tan uhen.
Hiche kum som ni sung hin nang koma kana umin, nakelngoipi ho ahiuvin nakelpi ho ahiuvin apengsola jong aumpouve, chule ken jong nakelngoi bon lah a kelngoi chal khat beh jong kane khapoi.
Gamsa thasa jong nahenga kahin lhut ngaipoi keima sah dingin kakisim jin ahibouve; hiche chu sun kah ham jan kah hama aki gu mang ham hijongle keima neidit sah ji ahibouve.
Hitipi chun sun teng nisan eihal vam pai gon, jan tengle dap kathoh jin, kamit te nin la kei ihmutna him him amuphapon ahi.

Hiche kum som ni sung hin na-insunga ka umin, kum som le kum li sungin nachanu teni lo nan nangma na katongin, kum gup sungin nakelngoite kalon, nangin la somvei jen katoh man ding na-khel le len ahi.

Keipa-Pathen, Abraham Pathen, Isaac Ginpa chun eipanpi lou hile tua hi nangman khut keohel tah bah a neina solmang ding ahitai. Pathenin kagentheina le kakhut tah a katoh gimna hi amua jan nilhah a chu nagihsal ahiye,” ati.

Labanin adonbut’in Jacob jah a, “Kachanu teni la kei chanu teni ahi lhoni’n, cha le nao jouse la kei cha le kei nao jeng ahiuve, kelngoi hon ho hi la kei kelngoi hon jeng ahiuvin; chule ipi hita leh namuphah chan hi aboncha keiya jeng ahicheh nai. Hijongle la hiche kachanu teni hihen lang ahinsa achate lhon hi hitajongle keiman ikalo thei nah lai ding ham?
Hijeh chun tun hungtemin kitepna khat semdoh hite kei le nangin, hiche chu kei le nang kah a sakhin pang jing nante,” ati.
Chuti ahile tin Jacob chun song khat akhohdoh-in songkhom in aphuttai.
Chujouvin Jacob chun amite henga, “Song hinlhoh khomuvin,” atileh, amahon jong ahinlhoh khomuvin alhuh-in ase khomuvin chule song lhuh chunga chun an anetauve.
Songlhuh chu Labanin Jegarsahadutha a-sah-in, hiche ma ma chu Jacob’in Galeed asah-e.
Hichun Labanin, “Tuni nikhoa hiche song lhuh hi kei le nang kah a sakhia pangah ahitai,” tia. Hichejeh chun amin jong Galeed asahin,
Chule songkhom chu Mizpah asahe; hiche thudola chun aman, “Eiho mihem khat le khat ikikhen gamlat tengule Pakai chun keile nang kah jenga jong eivelhi jing jeng uhen.

Nangman kachanu teni nabol gentheiya ahiloule kachanu teni kalval la jong numei dang nakipuibe kit’a ahile, eini koma mihem dang aumlou vangin Pathenin amu jing jengin kei le nang kah a asakhin apang jinge,” ati.
Chujongle Laban chun Jacob jah a, “Ven, kei le nang kah a dinga keiman kaset khoma kaphudoh hiche songlhuh hile hiche songkhom kiphut hi
hiche songlhuh hi le songphu hi sakhia pang ahin, ken jong nangma suse dinga hiche hi kahin khokhel lou hel ding, nangin jong keima suse dinga hiche hi nahin khokhel louhel ding ahi.
Abraham Pathen, Nahor Pathen chule amani pa Pathen chu eini kah a thu tan ding ahitai,” ati. Hijeh chuh Jacob jong apa Isaac Ginpa panin akihahseltai.
Chujongle Jacob chun mol chunga chun kilhaina gan athat in aheng akom jouse anne dingin akouve; amahon an aneuvin mol chunga chun ajan geh khovah den tauvin ahi.
Jingkah jingpi tah-in Laban a thoudoh in atu te le achanu teni achop’in, abonchauvin phatthei abohsoh keiyin, chuin ainlama ahung kile kittai.
Jacob’in alampi ahinjuiya ahile Pathen Vantilten ana lamtouvin ahi;
Jacob’in amaho chu amuphat’in, “Hichepi hi Pathen ngahmun ahi!” atin hijeh chun hiche lai mun chu amin Mahana-im asah tai.
Chujouvin Jacob chun Seir gamsung, Edom gamkaiya aupa Esau henga dingin sottolle ho asol masan.
amaho chu athu lhah-in hitin aseiye, “Kapu Esau henga hitin gasei tauvin, ‘Nasohpa Jacob’in hitin ati, keima Laban koma tu chan gei hin kaga khopem tai;

hijongle bongchalte jong, sangante jong, kelngoi hon ho jong, soh pasal soh numei ho jong kaneitai; hijeh a chu namitmua lung lhaina kachan theina ding tia nangma seipeh dinga mi kahinsol ahiye,’ ati tin gaseitauvin,” ati.
Sottolle ho chu Jacob henga ahung kile kit uvin hi tin aseiyuve, “Keiho na-upa Esau koma kacheuvin, ahile ama jong nangto kimuto dingin mi ja li ahin kipuiyin ahunge,” atiuve.
Hichun Jacob akicha behseh jengin alung gim lheh jengtan, hijeh chun aumpi miho le kelngoihon ho, bongchal ho chule sangongsao ho chu hopni nin ahom khensoh keiyin,
ama gela chu, “Esau chun hop khat chu ahin nokhuma asuh mang tah jongle akikhendoh hop khat beh chu jamdoh nante,” ati ahi.
Chujouvin Jacob chun, “Vo kapu Abraham Pathen, kapa Isaac Pathen, O Pakai, ‘Nagam langa na-inkote henga kile kit tan, keiman nang dingin aphat phatnan bolpeh nange, tia seiya chu nangma nahi.

Nangman nasohpa nabolpeh hepi na hijat le kitahna hijat lah a aneopen chang dinga jong kilomhoi kahipoi, ajeh chu katenggol keoseh puma hiche Jordan hi hung galkajya kahin, tun mihem loi ni lhingset kalamdohtai.
Katao ahi ka-upa ban thahatna, Esau thanei na konin neihuh doh tei teiyin, ajeh chu ama kakicha behseh jengtai, achutiloule hung intin eitha gam dingu, anule achate khenlouva athagam jeng ding ahi.
Ahinla nangman, ‘Nang dingin aphat phat nan bolpeh nange, nachilhah te jong twikhang panga len neldi jat hung phantin, tambehseh jenga kisim jou lou ding ahi,’ tin naseiye,” ati.
Hiche laiya chun ama ajan geh khovah-in, anei chengsea konin aupa Esau ding thilpeh adong khomin,
kelpi ja ni toh, kelchal som ni toh, kelngoipi ja nile kelngoichal som ni toh,
sangongsao anoi kilhoh lai somthum le anoute toh, bongpi som li le bongchal som khat toh, sanganpi som ni le sangan chal som khat toh ahiuve.
Aman asohte khut’a apedoh-in, alup lup’in akiloisah-in, chule asohte jah a chun, “Kei masanga cheuvin lang gancha lup kah lah chu mun phabep bep ong hoiyuvin,” atin;
chuin amasapen pa chu thu apen hitin aseiye, “Kaupa Esau toh nakimaitoa, aman thu nadoh a, ‘Koi mi nahiya hoijya che ding nahim? Na-angsunga ho hi koi thil ham?’ tia nadoh tengle,
nangman, ‘Nasohpa Jacob thil ahi, hicheng hi kapu Esau henga thilpeh dinga hung kitol ahiuve, chule vetan ama jong keiho nunga ahunge, tia nasei ding ahi,” ati.

Aman alup ni lhinna pa ahin, athum lhinna pa ahin, alup lupma aban bana hung kitol ho ahiuvin, atobang bang thu apesoh keiyin hitin aseiye, “Nanghon jong Esau to nakimuto tengule hitobang thu ma ma chu naseipeh cheh uva,

chujongle, ‘Vetan nasohpa Jacob jong keiho nunga ahunge,’ tia naseipeh dingu ahi,” atin ahi. Ijeh-inem itile ama gela chu, “Kamasanga kitol thilpeh chengse hin ama jol lungdam thei khat ning ting, ajou teng amai kamu thei ding ahi; ijem a tile bon eina sangjeng khat ninte,” tia angaito ahi.
Hijeh chun thilpeh ding chengse ama masanga akitol masauvin, ama mong mong vang hiche jan chun ngahmuna ageh khovah den tan ahi.
Hiche jan le le chun Jacob akipat’in ajinu teni toh, asoh numei teni toh, achate somle khat chutoh akipuiyin Jabbok palmun apal galkaitai.
Amaho chu apuiyin vadung apal galkai sah-in chule athilkeo anei jouse jong athah galkai sohkeiyin ahile
Jacob chu achangseh in adalha tauve; hichea chun mihem khat hin amapa chu khovah lhah geiyin akibotpin,
mihempa chun amapa athatlel ding amu phat’in akhel hom ahehpeh a ahile akibotpi kit phat’in Jacob khelgu akipeldohtai.
Hichun amapan, “Neilha loiyin kho hung vah lhapai ding ahitai,” atile, Jacob’in la, “Phatthei neiboh lousea kalha louhel ding nahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in aman jong ajah a, “Namin ipi ham?” atile, aman, “Jacob ahi,” ati.
Chuin aman, “Nangma min Jacob kiti lou ding, Israel joh nakiti ding ahitai, ajeh chu nangma Pathento kibot’in jong nahat’in, mihemte jong nahinjo joh ding ahi,” atipeh-e.
Jacob’in jong adongin, “Namin ipi ham lungset tah-in neiseipeh tei teiyin;” atileh; amanla “Hitia pi chu ipi dinga kamin neidoh ham?” atin, chule hikoma chun Jacob chu phatthei abohtai.
Hijeh chun Jacob’in jong hiche lai mun chu a min Peniel asah-e: ijehinem itile, “Keiman Pathen kimaiton kakimupin ahivangin hing hoiyin ka um nalaiye,” atin ahi.
Penuel ajot doh doh-in nisan Jacob ahin kho khapai paiyin, akhelgu kibaijeh chun ahung kideo peh-in ahi.
Hiche jeh chun tu ni gei hin Israel ten khelpigu kitona khelgu hom sunga thapigui hi ane ngaipouve; ipijeh-inem itile aman Jacob khel hom sung, akhelpigua athapigui anahebal peh-in ahi.
Jacob chu akhodah-in avet’a ahile vetan Esau chu mihem ja li jen to ahung kilhonin ahungtai. Hijeh chun aman jong achate chu Leah le Rachel chule asoh numeite ni ahoppeh soh keiyin,
chule soh numei teni le achate lhon chu amasat sah-in, abana Leah le achate achesah in, Rachelle Joseph chu anukhah penin apansah-e.
Chuin ama mong mong amaho masanga chun achen, aupa heng ahinphah to kahsen sagi vei jen tola ahung dilsu pa peh-in ahi.
Ahinla Esau chu ama lamto dingin ahung lhaiyin, apum koi jengin, chule angong koiya achop’a ahile ani lhonin akika lhontai.

Chuin Esau jong akhodah-in ahile numeiho le achateu chu amun, hijeh chun aman jong, “Hiche nakilhonpi ho pi hi koi koiba hitauvam?” atileh Jacob’in “Pathenin lungset tah a nasohpa apeh chapangte ahiuve,” ati.
Hichun soh numeite ni le achate lhon ahung nailut’uvin abokhup’in asalam tauve.
Leah le achate jong ahung nailut’uvin abohkhup’in asalamuve; chule anukhah penin Joseph le Rachel ahung nailut lhonin abohkhup lhonin salam abollhontai.
Hichun Esau’n jong, “Kahin kitopi gancha honpi chu aboncha ipi dingba natina ham?” atileh, Jacob’in “Kapu mitmua lunglhaina kimuna tei ding kati ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in Esau chun “Keiman thalhingset’in kaneinai kanao, nang thil chu nang dingin um jeng hen,” atipeh tai.

Ahivangin Jacob’in, “Ahi hih beh-e, namitmua lunglhaina kachan mong ahitah a ahile kathilpeh hi kei khut mong monga konin kisanin, ajeh chu hitobanga nangma mai kamu hi Pathen mai kamu toh kibang ahitai, ipijeh-inem itile neilung lhai lheh jenge.
Nahenga hung kitol lut kathilpeh hi neisanpeh teiyin, Pathenin eina khoto jeh-in ken jong tampi kanei nalai nai,” atin angeh khoh ten phat’in, aman jong akilah tai.
Chujouvin Esau’n jong, “Khol lam jot uhitin chetau hite, keima na-masanga masa nange,” atileh;

Jacob chun ajah a, “Kapun nahet ahi, chapang ho lha sam jeng ahiuvin, kelngoite le gancha noichep lai ho jong kei khohsah cheh ding ahiuvin, ni khat bang kihoipai taleh gancha honte aboncha thigam jeng thei ahiuve.

Nasohpa masanga kapu namasa jengin lang, keiman olcha chan hin hoiyin ting, kamasa’nga ganchate akikalvan bang bangule chapangte akikalvan bang bangu hin, Seir gama kapu heng kahinphah kahsen hung nange,” ati.
Hiche phat chun Esau’n, “Kahin lhonpi miho hi phabep nadalhah peh ing kate,” atileh, aman, “Hiche chu ipi dinga nakhohsah ham? Kapu mitmua lunglhaina kachan pou poule ahijenge,” ati.
Hichun Esau’n jong hiche nikho chun Seir lam ajonin alampi ma ma ahung kinung le kit tai.
Jacob vang chu Succoth geiyin akitolin, hikoma chun in khat akisah-in, aganchate dingin lhambuh khat akaiyin ahile hijeh chun hiche lai mun chu amin Succoth akisah tai.
Jacob chu Paddan-aram gama kipat’a ahung chun Canaan gamsunga Shechem khopia damselin ahung lhungin, akhopi mai laitah a chun ngahmun asan ahi.
Aman Shechempa Hamor chate khut’a kon chun gam leiset phabep sum qesitah ja khatnin akichoh in, hikoma chun ponbuh akisontai.
Chujongle hikoma chun maicham khat asemin, hichu Pathen Israel Pathen asah tai.
Leah-in Jacob anahinpeh achanu Dinah chu agam mite chanu ho vele dingin aga kholai lenglen ahile,
agam sunga haosa chapa khat Shechem, Hivi mi Hamor chapan, amanu amudoh phat’in akipuiyin, aluppin chule asuthangtai.
Shechem chun Jacob chanu Dinah chunga chun alung angaidet jengin, chule nungahnu chu adei beh seh jeh-in odam heochan akijol jol jengtai.
Shechem chun apa Hamor jah a jong agaseiyin hitin ati, “Hiche nungahnu khu jidingin neipuipeh tei teiyin,” ati.
Shechem chun achanu Dinah asuthangtai, ti Jacob’in ajadoh tan, ahivangin achapate gamlah a gancha ching ahijeh-uvin, amaho hung lhun kahsen thipbeh chan aume.
Chuin Shechempa Hamor chu Jacob henga kihoulim dingin achedohtai.

Hiche thudol chu Jacob chapaten ajahdoh phat’uvin gamlah a konin ahung tauve. Amaho chu alung phamovin alung hang behseh jenguvin ahi; ijeh-inem itile aman Jacob chanu aluppia bolngai louhel thil abol jeh chun, Israel lah a ngol hoitah thil asosah-in ahi.
Hijongle Hamor chun amaho akihoupin hitin aseiye, “Kachapa Shechemin alungin nachanu-u angaibeh seh jengin ahi, lungset tah-in amanu hi aji dingin neipetauvin;
kei ho toh kijong tou hitin, nachanuteu kei ho neipeuvin lang chule kei ho chanute jong nanghon kipuiyuvin.
Nangho jeng jong ‘chengkhomu hitin, gam jong nangho dingin kihong in tin, nachenuva nakivei le dingu, chule asunga gou naki khol dingu ahi,” ati.
Shechem jong chun Dinah pa le asopite jah a chun, “Nangho mitmua lunglhaina kachan teina dingin ipi hijongle kahenga naseichanu chu peng kate;
keima chunga ijat mong mong numei man dingle lutom laisui dinga nangeh dingu ham, nanghon kahenga nangeh dungjui uvin pe jeng inge, nanghon jong nungahnu chu kaji djngin neipeuvin,” ati.
Jacob chapaten Shechem le apa Hamor chu Shechemin asopinu u Dinah ana suhthangsa ahijeh-in adonbut’uvin jouthun akihoupi tauve.
Hijeh chun ajah lhona, “Kasopinu-u pasal chep tan lou khat pehdoh ding kiti, hitobang thil chu keihon bolthei pou vinge, ajeh chu keiho dinga kisuh jachatna hi ding ahi.
Hiti hin nang jong keiho bang bangin hung umin lang chule na mite pasal jousen chep kitan sohkei le vang nangho dingin noppeh thei nauving kate.
Chutengle keiho chanute jong nangho napeuving katin, keihon jong nangho chanute kakipui dingu, nangho lah a kachenuva mihem jat khat ihidoh dingu ahi.
Nanghon la keiho thu ngaiyuvin natin nachep kitan pouvin natin, hisang chun kachanuu kipuiyu ving ting chetauvinge,” atiuvin ahi.
Athuseiyu chu Hamor mitmu dingle Shechem mitmu dingin apha lheh jengin,
hijeh chun Shechem chun Jacob chanu adeichat behseh jeh-in chutobang thil bol ding chu akinomta hih hel e. Shechem chu apa insunga sah chungnung pena umah ahiye.
Hichun Hamor le achapa chu akhopiu kelkot phunga ahung lhonin akhopi sungmiho jah a hi tin thu asei lhone.

“Hiche miho khu eiho dinga kigolpi thei cheh ahibouvui agam sunga hin chengu hen lang kivei ima boljeng uhen, amaho dinga agam jong thalhing jeng ahi, eihon achanuteu ji dingin kipuiyu hitin, chule eiho chanute jong amaho dingin peu hite.
Hiche miho eiho to chenkhom ding anop’uva chule mihem jat khat isodoh theina dingu chu thil khatseh seh aume, amaho chep akitan bang banga khu eiho lah a pasal jouse chep ikitan uva ahile ahijenge.
Amaho to kinop to pou pouvu hen lang cheng khom leu hen, aganchau ahin, athilkeovu ahin, aganchau aboncha khu eiho a hijeng lou ham?” ati lhone.
Hamor le achapa Shechem chu khopi kelkot phunga hungdoh jousen a thusei angaiyuvin, hijeh chun kelkot phunga gapotdoh pasal jousen chep akitan soh keitauve.

Ni thum lhinnin amaho amachan lai tah uvin, Jacob chapate mi ni Simeon le Levi, Dinah sopite ni chun chemjam akipat lhonin hetman louhelin khopi chu anin delkhum lhonin, pasal jouse athat gam lhontai.
Amanin Hamor le achapa Shechem chu chemjamin athat lhonin, Shechem insunga konin Dinah akipuidoh lhonin achedoh tauve.
Chuin Jacob chapate chun thilong chunga lama ajot’uvin, asopinuu kisuhthangna khopi chu achom thenghel uve.
Akelngoiteu ahin, aganchau ahin, asanganteu ahin, ipi pi hita leh khopi sungle tollhang dunga um thilkeo jouse akilah tauve.
Agou thil hou hihen acha anaoteu hihen lang ajiteu hita leh, insung dunga umtapou chu mangchomin achomtauve.

Chuphat’in Jacob chun Simeon le Levi jah a, “Nang nin keima lung gimna nei hin pohlut khum lhonin, agamsunga chengte Canaan mite le Periz mite hotlam tah-in neiboldoh lhontai; keimi lhomchabou ahin, kei dou dingin amaho hung kihou khomu hen lang eihin bulu jengtau leh, keijong kainsung mi jong asuh gamhel dingu ahitai,” ati.
Ahivangin amanin la, “Amanba kasopinu noti bola abol ding hiya ong?” ati lhone.

Pathenin Jacob henga, “Kipat’in lang Bethel lam jontouvin lang hikoma chun gachengtan, chule naupa Esau koma kona nahung jampet’a nahenga hung kilah Pathen ding chun hikoma khun maicham khat gasemin,” ati.

Hijeh chun Jacob’in jong ainsung mite le aumkhompi jouse jah a, “Gamchom mite indoi nangho lah a umjouse chu abonchan paidoh soh keiyuvin lang; nangma nangma kisutheng uvin chule navon kikhel soh keiyuvin,
chujoule ikipat’uva Bethel ijot tou dingu, hikoma chu keiman maicham khat Pathen, kagenthei nikhoa eihin houva kache na chana eikilhonpi pa dinga kasem ding ahi,” ati.
Hichun amahon jong gamchom mite indoi akoi jouseu chule abiluva abilbau abonchan Jacob apeuvin ahile Jacob’in abonchan Shechem naivela gangpi phung noi khat’ a agasel mangtai.
Amaho akitol doh jouvun akimvel dunguva khopi jouse chu abonchauvin Pathena kona kichatna khat hin ahin lhunkhumuvin, hijeh chun amahon Jacob chate chu anungdel ngam tapouve.
Jacob chu Canaan gamsunga Luz kiti Bethela chun a um pi miho toh kilhonin ahungin,
chule hikoma chun Jacob’in maicham khat asemin, hiche lai mun chu Pathen Bethel asah-e; ijeh-inem itile a-upa henga kona ahung jamdoh a chu hikoma chu Pathen ama mong mong ahenga hung kiphong ahi.
Rebekah jenle nu Deborah athia chu Bethel noiya gangpi phung noi khat’ a anakivui ahin, hiche jeh a chu hichemin chu lhi lonna gangpi phung kisah ahiye.
Paddan-arama kona ahung chun Pathen Jacob henga ahung kilah kit’in, chuti chun amapa phatthei aboh-in,
chule Pathenin ajah a, “Namin hi Jacob ahin, tukal namin Jacob kiti kit lou ding, nangma min ding hi Israel joh kiti ding ahitai,” atipeh-e. Hijeh a chu amin Israel kiti ahitai.

Chujongle Pathenin ajah a, “Keima Pathen hatchung nung kahi; cha le nao thalhingin lang pungin; nanga kona vaipi khat le vaipi hon khat hung kikhomdoh ding; lengho jeng jong nanga kona hung pengdoh-uva hung potdoh ding ahiuve.
Chule Abraham le Isaac kapehsa gam chu nangma napeng ting, hiche gam chu nangma nunga nachilhahte kapeh ding ahi,” ati.
Chujouvin amato akihoulimna munna kon chun akoma konin Pathen chu akaltoutai.
Jacob chun aman ahung kihoulimpi na muna chun khom khat aphut’in, hiche khom chu songkhom ahiye; chuin hiche chunga chun kilhaina ju asun khumin, chule hiche chunga chun thaotwi asun khume.
Pathenin ama ahung kihou limpina laitah mun chu Jacob’in amin Bethel asah-in ahi.
Amaho Bethela konin akitoldoh tauve; ahin Ephrath-a che ding chun gam leiset phabep bou agei panbep nalaiyuvin ahile Rachel chu ahung nakhol panin, soh dingin ha nat nat’in ahung natai.
Soh dinga hanat’a anatpet chun anaodomnun Rachel jah a, “Naoso ding kicha hih beh-in, ajeh chu tua jong nangin chapa khat neita dinga chu,” ati.
Ahinla amanu chu alhagao apotdoh tai, ajeh chu amanu thia ahitan ahi; hijeh chun aman jong amin Ben-oni asah leh, apan la ama chu Benjamin asahjo tai.
Hiti chun Rachel ana thin Ephrath lampi Bethlehem achun akivuitai;
alhankhuh chunga chun Jacob’in songkhom khat aphut’in, hiche hi Rachel lhankhom chu ahin, tuni geiyin aum nalaiyin ahi.
Israel akitol paiyin Eder intingvum gala chun ponbuh asonge.
Israel chu chuche gamsunga acheng nalaiyin, ahin Reuben chu achen apa thaikem nu Bilhah chu agaluppi tai, chule athu chu Israelin jong ajatan ahi. Jacob chapate chu som le ni alhinguve.
Leah chapate chu Reuben, Jacob chapa apeng masa pen, Simeon, Levi, Judah, lssachat chule Zebulun ahiuve.
Rachel chapate ni chu Joseph le Benjamin ahi lhone.
Rachel sohnu Bilhah chapate ni chu Dan le Naphtali ahi lhonin,
Leah sohnu Zilpah chapa teni chu Gad le Asher ahi lhone. Hichengse hi Jacob’in Paddanaram gamsunga ahindoh achapate chu ahiuve.
Jacob chu Abraham le Isaac khopemna mun Mamre a Kiriah-arba, (Hebron tia jong kisei) khopia chun apa Isaac heng ahung lhung tai.
Hiche chun Isaac ahinkho kum ja khat le kum somget alhingtan ahi.
Chujouvin Isaac ahaibeiyin athi pai paiyin, ateh kemset'in anikho lhingset'in, amite toh akigomin, chule achapa te ni Esau le Jacob’in ama chu avui lhon tai.
Edom kitipa Esau chilhah ho hicheng hi, ahiuve.
Esau chun Canaan mite chanute lah a konin numei akipuiyin, Hit mi Elon chanu Adah le Hivi mi Zibeon chapa Anah chanu Oholibamah ahi lhone;
chule Nebaioth sopinu Ishmael chanu Basemath jong ahi nalaiye.
Adah chun Esau dingin Eliphaz ahinpeh-in, Basemath chun Reuel ahingin,
Oholibamah chun Jeush toh, Jalam toh, Korah toh ahinge. Hichengse hi Esau’n Canaan gamsunga ahindoh achapate ahiuve.

Esau chun ajite le achapate se, achanute ho chule ainsung mi abonchan akipuiyin, agancha jouse le agancha vul cheng ahin, chule Canaan gamsunga alamdoh athilkeo anei abonchan akipohin, anaopa Jacob koma konin gamlatah a ache mangtai.
Ajeh chu ahao thei bebseh lhontan acheng khom theidan ahi lhon tapoi; agancha jeh tah lhon jong chun agam chu amani khopem khomna thei ahitapon ahi.
Hiti chun Esau chu Seir thinglhang gam sunga agachengin ahi; Esau hi Edom jong ahi.
Seir thinglhang gamsunga cheng Edom mite pa Esau chilhah chu hicheng hi ahiuve,
hiche ho hi Esau chapate min ho chu ahi; Esau jinu Adah chapa Eliphaz ahin, Esau jinu Basemath chapa Reuel ahiye.
Eliphaz chapate kit chu aminu Teman ahin, Omar ahin, Zepho ahin, Gatam ahin, chule Kenaz ahi.
Timna chu Esau chapa Eliphaz thai kemnu ahin, amanu hin Eliphaz chu Amalek anahinpeh-e. Hicheng chu Esau jinu Adah chapate ahiuve.
Reuel chapate ho chu-Nahath ahin, Zerah ahin, Shammah ahin, chule Mizzah hicheng chu ahiuve. Amaho chengse hi Esau jinu Basemath chapate anahiuve.
Zibeon chapa Anah chanu Esaujinu Oholibamah chapate chu hicheng hi ahiuve; Esau chu Jeush le Jalam toh chuleh Korah toh anahinpeh-in ahi.
Hicheng hi Esau chapate lah a a-upa cheh ahiuve. Esau cha masapen Eliphaz chapate lah a aupa chengse chu mi-upa Teman ahin, mi-upa Omar ahin, mi-upa Zepho ahin, mi-upa Kenaz ahin,
mi-upa Korah ahin, mi-upa Gatam ahin, mi-upa Amalek ahin; hicheng mi-upa chengse hi Edom gamsunga Eliphaz inkon cheh ahiuvin, abonchauva hi Adah chapate ahi cheh-uve.

Esau chapa Reuelle achapate lah a mi-upa hicheng hi ahiuve; mi-upa Nahath ahin, mi-upa Zerah ahin, mi-upa Shammah ahin, mi-upa Mizzah ahi; amaho chengse hi Edom gamsunga Reud inkon mi-upa cheh ahiuvin, abonchauva Esau jinu Basemath chapa jeng ahiuve.
Hicheng hi Esau jinu Oholibamah chapate ahiuvin, mi-upa Je’ush ahin, mi-upa Jalam toh chule mi-upa Korah toh ahiuve; hichengse chu Anah chanu Esau jinu sung peng mi-upa cheh ahiuvin ahi.
Hichengse chu Edom kitipa Esau chapate leh a-upa chengseu ahitauve.
Agamsunga cheng Hor mi Seir chapate hochu hicheng hi ahiuve; Lotan le Shobal toh, Zibeon le, Anah toh,
Dishon toh Ezer toh chule Dishan toh ahiuve; amaho chengse hi Edom gamsunga Seir chapate Hor miho upa cheng chu ahiuvin ahi.
Lotan chapa teni chu Hori le Heman ahi lhonin, chule Lotan sopinu chu Timna ahiye.
Shobal chapate chu Alvan ahin, Manahath ahin, Ebal ahin, Shepho ahin chule Onam ahi.
Zibeon chapa teni chu Aiah le Anah ahi lhonin, Anah kitipa hi apa Zibeon sa-ngante achinna a kona gamthip noiya twisa putna; twinah phabep hin mudoh pa chu ahiye.
Anah cha teni chu Dishon le Anah chanu Oholibamah ahi lhone.
Dishon chapate chu Hemdan le Eshban toh, Ithran toh, chule Cheran toh ahiuve.
Ezer chapate chu Bilhan ahin, Zaavan ahin, chule Akan ahi.
Dishan chapa teni chu Uz le Aran ahi lhone.
Hor mite miupa ho chu mi-upa Lotan ahin, mi-upa Shobal ahin, mi-upa Zibeon ahin, mi-upa Anah ahin,
mi-upa Dishon ahin, mi-upa Ezer ahin, chule mi-upa Dishan ahi. Hichengse chu Seir gamsunga Hor mite aphung khaiyuva mi-upa cheh ahiuve.
Israel chate lah a koimacha leng vaipo ana um masanga Edom gamsunga leng vai anapo lengho chu hicheng hi ahiuve.
Beor chapa Bela chun Edom gamsunga lengvai anapon, ama khopi chu amin Dinhabah ahiye.
Bela athi phat in Bozrah khoa mi Zerah chapa Jabab chun ama khelin lengvai apotai.
Jabab athi kit phat’in Teman gamsunga kon mi Husham kitipa chun ama akhelin lengvai apotai.
Husham athi phat’in Bedad chapa Hadad kitipa Moab gamsunga Midian miho kisatpia hinjoupa chun ama khelin lengvai apon, akhopi min jong chu Avith ahiye.
Hadad athi phat chun Masrekah khomi Samlah chun ama khelin lengvai apotai.
Samlah athi phat’in Euphrates vadung pang Rehoboth khoa mi Shaul chun ama khelin lengvai apotai.
Shaul athi phat’in ama khelin Achbor chapa Baal-hanan chun lengvai apotai.
Baal-hanan, Achbor chapa jong athitan, Hadar kitipa chun ama khelin lengvai apon, akhopi min Pau ahin, ajihu min Mehetabel ahi; amanu hi Mezahab khoa Matred chanu ahiye.
Esau inkon mi-upa chengse min ho chu aphung khai dungjuile akhomun dungjuiyu chule amin dungjuiya hicheng hi ahiuve; mi-upa Timna ahin, ini-upa Alvah ahin, mi-upa Jetheth ahin,
mi-upa Oholibamah ahin, mi-upa Elah ahin, mi-upa Pinon ahin,
mi-upa Kenaz ahin, mi-upa Teman ahin, mi-upa Mibzar ahin,
mi-upa Magdiel ahin, chule mi-upa Iram ahi; hicheng hi leiset atouphana gamsunguva akho mun dungjui uva Edom inkon mi-upa ho chu ahiuve. Esau hi Edom pa anahi.
Jacob chu apa khopemna gamsung Canaan gamsunga achengtai.

Jacob insung thusim chu hiti ahi. Joseph chu kumsom le kum sagi alhinin asopite toh kelngoi achinguvin ahile, apa ji teni Bilhah le Zilpah chapate lah a chun ama chapang chabou ahinalaiye; ahin Joseph chun aphat lounau apau henga ahin lhut jing jin ahi.
Israel in jong Joseph chu ateh nunga ahin achapa ahijeh-in achapa dang jouse sangin angailun, hijeh chun sangkhol chol aban sao khat akhuipeh-in ahi.
Ahin asopite chun apauvin Joseph asopi dang jouse sangin angailu jotai ti amudoh ptiat’uvin abonchauvin ama chu ahotbol cheh-uvin, lung damselin jong akihoupi thei tapouve.
Joseph chun mang khat aneiyin, hiche chu asopite henga aseipeh-in ahile amahon la ahotlo cheh kit tauve.
Joseph’in amaho jah a chun, “Lungset tah-in ngai cheh temuvin hiche mang keiman kamangmat pi hi!

Ajeh chu vetemin, eihon loulaiya changphal ikankhom uvin ahile, vetan keima changphal chu ahung kiphongdoh-in jangpet in akitung dentan, chujouvin vetemin nangho changphal ho chu akimvela ahung kikhom uvin akun cheh-uvin keima chahgphal chu asalamtauve,” ati.

Hichun asopiten ajah a, “Nangin keiho chunga hi lengvai napoh mong monga chule keiho chunga thunei vaibola napan tahbeh mong ding hi jai mo?” atiuvin, amang neiho jeh tah le athuseiho jeh tah jong chun aha hot cheh tauve.

Chujouvin jong aman mang khat aneiyin, hiche jong chu asopite jah a aseipeh-in hitin aseiye. “Ven keiman mang kanei kit’in ahile vetan nisa le lha chule ahsi som le khat chu kahenga a hung kun uvin eisalamuve,” ati.

Aman chutia hiche chu apa le asopite aseipeh chun apan ama aphoh-in ajah a. “lti dana hitobang mang chu nanei ham? Keiho hi, kei kahi nanu ahi, nasopite ahiuva kahunguva nakoma chu tola kahung bohkhup uva kasalam mong dingu nahim?” ati.
Chuti chun asopiten athangset peh-uvin apan vang athusei chu aching jing jengin ahi.
Asopite chu apau kelngoi hon vah dingin Shechema achetauve.
Chuin Israelin Joseph jah a, “Nasopiten Shechema kelngoi hon avah-u hinai mo? Hung temin amaho henga nasol tem inge,” atileh aman jong “Henge,” ati,

Hichun aman a jah a, “Chejelin lang nasopite jong phathei theiya hinauva chule kelngoite jong phatthei theiya hinauvam, gaven lang kahenga hung seikit tan,” atin; hitia chu Hebron phaiya kona asoldoh leh, Joseph jong Shechem lang jonin achetai.
Ahin veteh, gamlah a lampi akimansah a ava koile na a mi khat’in atoh khan, mipa chun adongin, “Ipi ham nahol le?” atileh,
aman jong, “Kasopite kahol hiya lungset tah-in neiseipeh tango, hoilama ba kelngoi avah-u ham?” ati.
Chuphat’in mipan jong, “Hikoma kona kitoldph tauva chu-o, ‘Dothan langa chetau hite,’ tia aldhoulimu kana jah chu me;” atipehe, hijeh chun Joseph in asopite nung ajuile Dothana amaho agamun ahi.
Asopiten Joseph chu gamla thimtah-in agah mu uvin, ahengu ahin phah masangin ama douna dingin amaho chengse guhthim chan anakihou somuvin ama thadoh ding ana ngaito tauve.
Amaho khat le khat akihouvun, “Veteh mang neithempa hiche laiya hungta khu!
Khaiye, hunguvin thatdoh uhitin kokhuh sung dung khat’a khun sep lut tah tau hen; chutengle gam sa hangin anetai, itiuva amangho chu ipi hungsoh doh nam, ivet dingu ahi jenge,” akitiuve.
Ahin Reuben in ajahdoh phat’in akhut’uva konin agachudoh-in, “Ahinkho vang subei pou hite,” atin;

chujongle Reuben chun ajah-uva. “Thisan so hih beh-uvin, gamthip laiya hiche kokhuh a khun galeh lut’uvin lang achung a vang khut lha hih heluvin.” atin; hitia chu bola akhut’uva kona chudoh a apa henga nungsol pch ding ati ahi.
Joseph chu a sopite kom ahung lhun phat’in amahon Joseph chu asangkhol chol, sangkhol chol abansaova kikhui aki-ah chu, ahoh lhauvin;
chuin ama chu akaiyuvin kokhuh sung khat’a agaleh lut tauve; kokhuh vang chu anakeo tan twi jong anakangtai.

Amaho chu anne dingin atou tauve; ahin agadadoh-uva avet ule, vetan Gilead’a kona hung sumkol veile Ishmael miho asangongsao ho toh hung kilhona, bego le thing thao namtui toh chule lou namtui hinpoa Egypt gam lang jonsuh ding amu uvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Judah chun asopite jah a, “Isopipau ikithauva chule athisan isel manguva chu ipi iphat chompi dingu ham?
Hunguvin amakhu Ishmael mite henga khun kijoh mangu hitin, isopi nah nah iphe ivou nah nah chu achunga jong ikhut lhapou hite,” atileh asopiten jong asei angai cheh tauve.

Hiti chun Midian mi, kivei mihon ahinjotpa phat’uvin amahon jong Joseph chu akai dinguvin kokhuh sunga kon chun ahin kaidoh-uvin Ishmael miho koma Joseph chu dangka som ni man dingin akijoh tauve; amahon jong Joseph chu Egypt langa apuitauve.
Reuben chu kokhuh langa chun ache kit’ in ahile vetan Joseph chu kokhuh sunga ana um tapoi, hijeh chun aman aponsil jouse abottel jengin,
chuin asopite henga ahung kile kit’in, “Boipu aum tapoi, kei hoilama ikatia, hoilam kasuh ding hitam!” tin aseitai.
Hichun amahon Joseph sangkhol chol alauvin, kelcha khat athat’uvin chule sangkhol chol chu athisan lah a chu ade lhop’uvin,
chuin sangkhol chol bansao chu apau henga dingin athot’uvin ahile mihon jong apau henga achoiyuvin, “Hichepi hi kamudoh uve, vetoh temin nachapa sangkhol chol hiya ham hilou ham?” atiuve.
Aman hiche chu avettoh phat’in, “Kachapa sangkhol chol hina hi lah em, gamsa hang khat hin aneh doh ding hita hi me; Joseph hi a-tel adah a ajen thang hita hi me!” atin;
Jacob’in jong aponsil jouse abottel’in ataibuh a khaodip akichenin, nikho tamtah sungin achapa pul adouve.

Achapa jouse le achanute a bonchauvin akipat’uvin alhep vanguvin amala amaho lhep lung mongjou danin aumtapon, “Ahipoi, kei jong kachapa heng, noimi gama pul douvin chesuh tange!” atin, hiti chun apan ama aka ka tai.
Midian mite ma chun Joseph chu Egypt lengpa Pharaoh leng inpi ngah sepai lamkai Potiphar henga anajoh doh tauve.
Hiche lai chun ahitin ahi, Judah chu asopite koma konin achesuh-in Adullam mi amin Hirah kitipa chu agabeltai.
Hikoma chun Judah-in Canaan mi amin Shua kitipa chanu chu amudoh phat’in amanu chu akipuiyin aluppi tai.
Amanun nao ahinvop paiyin chapa khat ahingin amapan amin Er asah-e,
Amanun nao ahinvop kit’in chapa khat ahingin ama chu amanun amin Onan asahtai.
Amanu ahung naovop kit nalaiyin chapa khat ahin hing kit’in amanun amin Shelah asah-e. Hiche pa ahinpet chun amanu Chezib a aume.
Judah chun achapa masapen pa Er dingin numei khat jin apuipeh-in, ama chu amin Tamar ahiye.
Judah chapa amasapen Er chu Pakai mitmua akhan gitlou jeh-in Pakaiyin athattai.
Chuphat’in Judah chun Onan jah a, “Na-upa jinu henga lut’in ama navet ding, chule na-upa dinga chi nakhaipeh ding ahi,” ati.
Onanin acha hin ding chu ama achanlou ding akihet jeh-in a-upa jinu toh akitimat teng lhonle a-upa dinga cha ahinpeh louna dingin abotwi tola achelhah thojin ahi.
Athilbol chu Pakai mitmua lung lhaina ahitah lou jeh-in amajong chua that kittai.

Chuphat’in Judah chun amou nu Tamar henga, “Kachapa Shelah kikhan lhit kah-in napa ina meithaiyin ga umdoh tan,” ati. Ijeh-inem itile asopiteni bangin ama jong thiget’in te tia anagel ahi. Hijeh chun Tamar jong achen apa ina aga chengtai.
