Phat sotthim jouvin Shua chanu Judah jinu jong athi tai; ahin Judah chu aki-lhep lung mong dom phat’in agolpa Adullam mi Hirah chutoh Timnah a akelngoimul vou ho henga agache touve.
Tamar henga thu aga lhut’uvin hitin akiseiye, “Ven natehpu chu Timnah a akelngoimul vou dingin achetouve,” akiti peh-e.

Chuphat’in amanun jong ameithai von chu akhelloiyin, ponlu akikhun, akitom jolin Timnah lampia Enaim lamkot a chun atoutai; ijeh-inem itile Shelah kikhan lhit ahitan, aji dinga amanu akipeh lou akimu ahitai.
Judah chun amanu amudoh phat’in, amai ponlukhuh akikhuh jeh chun, noti khat hi ding ham atin,
amanu chu lampam langa apuidoh-in, “Hung temin nalup ping kate,” ati; ijeh-inem itile amounu ahilam ahet lou ahi. Amanun, “Neiluppi theina dinga ipipen neipeh ding ham?” atileh,
aman jong “Kel hon lah a kelcha nou khat nahin thah peh nange,” ati. Hichun amanun, “Hiche chu neihin thah kah a ding chu khamgahna thil khat neipeh le itam?” atileh,

Judah chun, “ltobang khamgahna thil kapeh ding nahim?” tin a dong tai. Hichun amanun, “Namohor le nakhao toh chule nakhut’a nachoi tenggol chutoh,” ati. Hijeh chun amapan hi chengse chu apen, amanu chu aluppin ahile aman jong nao avop tai.
Chuin amanu akipat’in ache mangin aponlu kikhuh ahoh lhan ameithaivon chu akivon kittai.
Judah chun kelnou chu agolpa Adullam mipa khut’a, numeinu henga khamgah na thil lhatdoh dinga agah thah sah a ahile, Adullam mipan amanu chu agahol motan ahi.
Aman jong chuche muna mi ho chu adongin, “Enaim lamkot’a lampama um noti nu chu hoiyaba um hitai mo?” atileh, amahon “Noti khatcha beh bon hilaiya hung umkha louhela,” atiuve.
Hijeh chun ama jong Judah heng lamah ahung kinungle kit’in, “Mithangnu kagaholmota-e, chule amuna mihon jong ‘Noti khat cha beh bon hilaiya hung umkha louhela,’ atiuvin ahi,” ati.
Chuin Judah chun, “Aman kilah paitante, eikimoh nuisat bep lhon ding ahi, vetange hiche kelnou naga kithah sah a nangin amanu hin holmo ta chu,” atitai,

Lha thum jou lam hin Judah henga thu ahung kilhut’in, hi tin akiseiye, “Namounu Tamar hi noti chonin achontai; chujongle hung vetan noti chona achona a konin agaitai,” akiti. Hichun Judah-in jong; “Hinpui doh-uvin amanu chu kigouvam jeng hen;” ati.

Amanu ahung kipuidoh phat’in aman atehpu henga mi ahinsolin hitin aseiye, “Hiche thil ho neipa a kona keima naovop kahiye,” atin; chujongle amanun, “Lungset tah-in hin vetoh temin hicheng mohor ahin, khao ahin chule tenggol ahin, koi thilpen hiya ham?” agatisah-e.
Judah chun ahetdoh phatin, “Keiman kachapa Shelah dinga amanu hi kanapeh lou jeh hin ama kei sangin adih jo tai,” a tin; hiche kal chun Judah chun amanu chu kitimatna aneipi kit tapoi.
Tamar anao so phat alhinin vetan anao bua chun apengkop ding nao ni ana um lhone.

Chuin amanu ahung so nat’a anavah got’a ahile khatjoh chun akhut ahindo sah-in ahi, hichun anaodom nun jong patjang asankang khat alan akhut’a chun akhipeh-in, “Hiche hi ahungdoh masa ahiye,” tin aseiye.

Ahin ama chun akhut anung loilut kit’in ahile vetan asopipa ahung pengdoh tai; hichun amanun jong, “lti nangin nachamtah a nangma ding nahin tum vang jeng hintem mo?” atin; hijeh chun hichepa chu amin Perez anakisah-e.
Anung chun asopipan akhut’a patjang sankang ahin kibun ahung pengdoh-in ahi; a ma chu amin Zerah anakisah-in ahi.
Joseph chu Egypt’a apuisuh-uvin ahile, chulai geiya puisuh Ishmael miho khut’a kon chun Egypt mi Pharaoh leng inpi ngah sepai lamkai Potiphar chun akichoh tai.
Pakaiyin Joseph chu aumpi jingin, hijeh chun amajong milo lhingtah ahung hin, chule apu Egypt mipa insunga chun achengin ahi.
Hichun Pakaiyin ama aumpi jinga chule aman atoh jouse chu Pakaiyin ama khut’a konin akhan tousahe, ti chu apu pan amudoh tan ahile,
Joseph chun ama mitmun lung lhaina akimutan, chujeh chun ama jenlen jong apangtai; Potipharin jong Joseph chu ainsung pumpi vetup din gin apansah-in, aneijousejongchu ama khut’a apedoh tai.

Aman Joseph chu ainsung jouse Je aneijouse vetup dinga apansah a pat chun Joseph jalin Pakaiyin Egypt mipa insung chu phatthei aboh peh-in, hiti chun Pakai phatthei bohna chu Potiphar neijouse chungle ainsung chung chule alouma chunga achutan ahi.

Hijeh chun aman jong aneijouse chu Joseph khut’a adalha jengin; ama aneitah jeh chun aneh ding anneh ti louvin thil dang thil dang imacha ahepha tapoi. Joseph chu mi mel hoitah vetnom nom um khat ahi.
Hicheng thilsoh nung hin apu jinun Joseph chu avelhi jing jengtan, chujongle “Neiluppin ong!” tin ajoltai.
Ahin Joseph anom hih-in apu jinu jah a chun, “Vetange, kei jeh a kapun insunga thil umjouse imacha hepha talou hela, anei jouse aboncha kei khut a pedoh jengta;

hiche insunga kei sanga jong ama kiletsah ta lou hel ahin, thil imacha cha jong kei dinga ait umlou, ajinu nahijeh a nangle le bou nahiye; chuti chu ahin, iti keiman hitobang thilse, gitlouna lentah hi kabola, Pathen douna kachonset dingham?” ati.
Amanun Joseph anisim aniseh-a ajol jol jeng vangin Joseph la amanu toh lupkhoma kitimatpi hihen lang umkhompi hijongle amanu thusei chu ngaisah-in aneipeh deh tapoi.
Ahin nikhat, chu Joseph jong anatoh ngai kitoh dinga insunga agasung lhah a ahile, ainsung mi pasal ho chu khat cha beh jong insunga chun ana umpouvin ahi.
Chutah chun amanunjong Joseph chu aponsil chun aman jengin, aseitai, “Ongin neiluppin,” tia atuh jeng phat’in amapan aponsil chu amanu khut’a adalhan ajamin inpo lama achedoh tai.
Akhut’a aponsil adalhah dena inpo lama ajamdoh chu amuphat’in,

amanun ainsung mi pasal ho chu akou loiyin ajahuva hitin aseiye, “Vetem uvin, hoilam Hebrew mi khat hi keiho jumso gunset dinga kahenguva ahinpui lut hiya ham; kahenga ahung lut’in lop khompi dingin eigon, hijeh a chu hapen pena kahung pen jenga ahile,
o sangtah a kahung pen ajah phat’in aponsil kakoma adalhan ahung jamin, polama ahung dohtai,” ati.
Hiti chun a man Joseph pupa ainlama ahung kahsen aponsil chu akoma akoi jingin,
chuin thilsoh chengse chu aseipeh-in hitin aseiye, “Hebrew sohpa kahenguva nahinpui lut pa khu kahenga ahung lut’in jumso dingin eihung gon;
keijong osang tah a kapenjah jeng phat’in aponsil kakoma adalhan inpo langa a jamdoh tai,” ati.
Apupa chun ajinun ajah a, “Hitobang bang pia hi nasohpan eiboljeng ahi,” tia ajah a athusei ho chu ajah phat’in a lung hangjah jengin,
hijeh chup Joseph chu apupan amanin lengpa sohchang ho kihenna songkul sunga songkul ina chun akhumtai; ama jong songkul sunga ina chun aumtan ahi.
Hijongle Pakaiyin Joseph aumpi jingin, achunga khotona anei jingin, songkul ngahpa mitmun jong lunglhaina apetai.
Hijeh chun songkul ngahpan songkul insunga sohchang umho chu abonchauvin Joseph khut’a apedohin, hiti chun ipi pi kiboldoh umta jongle a bola chu Joseph ahileng lengjin;
Pakaiyin ama aumpi jeh chun ama khut’a thil umjouse chu songkul ngahpan la vetsah-in aneitapoi; chujongle aman abolchan chu Pakaiyin aphattou sah jing jenge.
Hicheng thilsoh kichai nung chun, Egypt lengpa ju vaihompa le an vaihompan apupa Egypt lenga doumah abol lhonin achonse lhontai.
Hijeh chun Pharaoh jong avaihomte ni chung, ju vaihom ho lamkaipa chungle an vaihom ho lamkaipa chunga alung han gin;
amani chu songkul ngah lamkaipa mihenna in, Joseph kihenna songkul sunga ina chun akhumtai.
Songkul ngah lamkaipan amani jong chu Joseph,vettup dingin apedoh in, hijeh chun aman jong amani chu ajenle jin ahi; hiti chun chom khatpi kihenna, insung achun aum khomuvin ahile;
jan khat chun songkul in sunga kihen teni Egypt lengpa ju vaihompa le an vaihompa chun mang khat cheh, amang ledohna toh kilhon cheh-in anei lhonin ahi.
Jingkah-in Joseph chu aheng lhona ahungin ama ni chu aven ahile lung gimtah a ana um lhon amui.
Hijeh chun aman jong kihenna ina aumkhompi Pharaoh, vaihom teni chu adongin hitin aseiye, “Ipi dinga tunia nang ni mai ngui chet jeng nahi lhon hi tam?” atileh;

amanin jong ajah a, “Keinin mang kanei gel lhonin hiche ledoh ding chu koima aumtapoi,” ati lhone. Chuin Joseph chun amani jah a,“Thil ledohna kiti hi Pathenin bou anei hilou ham? Lungset tah-in kei jah a sei lhon temin,” ati.
Ju vaihompan amang chu Joseph henga aseipeh-in, ajah a, “Keima mang chun vetemin kama sanga lengpi gui khat anajamin,
chule lengpi guiya kon chun a bah thum ahung jamdoh-uve; ahung mum jou jouvin ahung pah lha paiyin, chuin alit ho chu lengpi chang alhinguvin amin pai paitauve.
Keiman Pharaoh khon chu kakhut’in kanachoiyin, chuin lengpi changho chu kalou lhan, Pharaoh khon sunga chun atwi kameh lha lhan, chuin khon chu Pharaoh khut’a kagapen ahi,” ati.
Hichun Joseph’in ajah a, “Hiche ledohna chu hiche hi ahiye, lengpi bah thum ho chu nithum kiseina ahin;
nithum sung hin Pharaoh’in nahin lhadoh intin masanga natoh na ngai chu natohsah a chutengle masanga aju vaihoma na pan lai banga chu nangman Pharaoh khon chu akhut’a naga peh ding ahi.
Chutia chu nang dinga thil aphatsoh tengle chun lungset tah-in keijong neihin geldoh-in lang neihin khoton, Pharaoh henga neihin geldoh-in, hiche ina kon hin neihin lhadoh teiyin.
Ijeh-inem itile keima hi Hebrew mite gama kona eikiguh doh tho mong mong ahibouvln, hikom jenga jong hiche lai kokhuh a eilelut jengna dinguvin imacha kabolse pon ahi,” ati.
An vaihompan jong akiledohna chu aven ahile apha thim lheh jengin hijeh chun aman jong Joseph jah a. “Ken jong mang kana neiyin veteh kalu chunga chang lhah kong thum dim kanapun,
achung nungpen kong sunga chun Pharaoh dinga gotchom choma kikangsa aumin, ahin hiche ho chu vachaten kaluchunga kong sunga kon chun ana neveh tau,” atileh;
Joseph’in jong adonbutin, “Hiche ledohna chu hiche hi hiya chu, kong thum ho chu nithum kiseina ahin,
nithum sung hin Pharaoh’in nangma nahin lhadoh intin, nachung lama thing chung khat’a ngakoiya nakhai lih ding ahin, chutengle vachaten nanga kona natahsa aneh dingu ahi,” ati.
Nithum lhinni chu Pharaoh pen nikho ahin, aman jong asohte jouse dingin golvah abolin, chule asohte lah tah a chun ju vaihom lamkaipa le an vaihom lamkai chu alhadoh gelin,
ju vaihompa chu aju vaihomna ma ma apansah kit’in, aman jong ju khon chu Pharaoh khut’a agapetai;
ahin an vaihom lamkaipa vang chu Joseph’in amani henga mang alepeh bang chun akhailih tan ahi.
Hichun ju vaihom lamkaipan Joseph chu ageldoh tapon asumil del tai.
Kum ni nungin Pharaoh chun mang ananeiyin ahile vetan ama vadung panga anadinge;
hichun vetemin vadunga kon chun bongpi sagi ajolsel cheh le athaotah tah cheh ahung kaldohuvin, pengdo lah a chun alhauvin ahi.
Chujouvin vetan amaho nunga chun bongpi sagi ma gudohset sot’a agona gong thei vadunga kon chun ahung kaldoh-uvin, vadung panga chun bongpi dangho koma chun adinguvin ahi.
Hichun agudohset sot’a agona gong thei bongpi ho chun ajolsil-sela athaova thao thei bongpi sagi chu anejou tauve. Hichun Pharaoh aihmut ahung khangtai.
Chuin aihmu kit’in ahile mang ani lhinna aneikit’e, hichea chun vetan chang kung vui sagi, bohlep a ahoiya hoithei chang phung khat’a ahung doh doh-in,
chujouvin ven hiche ho nunga chun niso lam khohuiyin ahinsem geosa changvui geothit thet sagi ma ahung doh doh kit’e.
Chuin changvui geosa ho chun changvui bohlep a hoitah tah sagi chu anejou tauvin ahi. Hichun Pharaoh ahung khangin ahile, vetan hichu mang anahi.

Hijeh chun jingkah-in alung atheh ten phat’in aman jong mi asolin Egypt gamsunga mitphel doi themho jouse le mi ching jouse agakousah tai; hiti chun Pharaoh’in jong amaho chu amang aseipeh-in ahile Pharoah henga aledoh peh thei khat cha jong aumtapouve.
Hichun ju vaihom lamkaipan Pharoah jah a hitin aseiye, “Keiman kana themmona ho pi tunin kageldoh-e.
Pharoah asohte ni chunga alung hana kei le an vaihom lamkaipa inngah lamkaipa mihenna ina eina koi lhonin ahile;
keinin jongjan khat sungin, ama ahin kei kahin, mang-khat cheh aledohna toh umtha cheh khat kana nei lhonin ahi.

Hikoma chun Hebrew mi inngah lamkaipa sohpa chu keini toh kana um khomin, keinin jong ama chu kaseipeh lhona ahile, aman jong kamang lhon kei ni dingin amichang cheh a ama ama mang dungjui cheh in eiledoh peh lhonin ahi.
Chule aman eiledoh peh lhon bang bang chun ahung guilhung cheh-e; keima kana toh ngai ngai eikitohsah-in an vaihompa akikhai lihtai,” ati.

Chuphat’in Pharaoh chun mi asolin Joseph chu agakousah-in, amahon jong Joseph chu songkul khuh sunga konin ahin lhoh doh loi jenguvin ahile, aman akhamul akivon, avon akikhelin chujouvin Pharaoh henga ahung lut’pai jengtai.

Hichun Pharaoh’in Joseph jah a, “Keiman mang khat kana neiyin hiche chu aledoh theiya aumtapoi, ahin nang hin mang kisei najah a ahile naledoh thei jeng jenge, tia nachung chang thu kisei kanajai,” ati.
Joseph chun Pharaoh adonbut’in hitinaseiye, “Kei hi pong katin, Pathenin Pharaoh chu lung monna lam khat’in hin don but tei nante,” ati.
Chuin Pharaoh’in jong Joseph jah a, “Ka mangin, veteh keima vadung panga kana dingin ahile,
ven vadunga kon chun bongpi sagi athaova thao thei tijolsil sel cheh ahung kaldoh-uvin pengdo lah a chun alhauvin ahi;
chujouvin amaho nunga chun vetan, bongpi sagi ma, halisit set’a gudohset sot jeng, agona gong thei, ahung kaldohuvin, hitobang gancha melse chu Egypt gamsunga kamu kha hih laiye.
Hiti chun hiche bongpi gongset sot gudoh setsut ho chun bongpi thao chet sagi chu anejou tauvin,
amaho chu anehjou tah vanguvin koiman anehjou lamu ahedoh deh pon ahi; ajeh chu amasanga bang bang chun alhep theh thuh nalaiyuvin ahi. Hichum kei jong kahung khangdoh tai.
Chuin keiman ka mangin kamun kit’in, vetemin, changkung vui sagi chang phung khatseh a anapeng khomuvin aboh alhingin apha thei lheh-e.
Chule changvui sagi ma chu akivei geosa akeoseh cheh, nisolam khohui mut geosa cheh, khat ho nunga chun ahungdoh doh-uvin ahi.
Chuin changvui geosa ho chun changvui pha chengse chu a val lhumsoh keitauve. Hiche thu hi keiman mit phel doithemho jah a kaseipeh-in, ahinla koima cha kakoma ahilchen theiya aumpouve,” ati.
Chuphat’in Joseph chun Pharaoh jah a, “Pharaoh mang teni hi thakhat ahin, Pathenin athilbol got chu Pharaoh koma ahin phondoh ahitai.
Hikoma bongpi hoi sagi ho chu kum sagi kiseina ahin, chule hikoma changvui pha sagi jong hi kum sagi ma kisei na ahibouve; hijeh chun amang hi thakhat ahibouvin ahi.

Chutengle hiche ho nunga hung kaldoh hikoma bongpi sagi lhep theh thuh a gudohset sot ho chu kum sagi kiseina ahin, chule nisolam khohuiyin asemgeosa changvui geosa sagi ho chu kum sagi kel lhah ding kiseina ahi’.
Keiman hita Pharaoh kaseipeh banga chu Pathenin athil bolding chu Pharaoh ahin musah ahitai.
Ven ahung lhung ding kum sagi sung hin Egypt gamsung pumpia ima ma hung thalhingset in tin,
hiche joule chun kum sagi ma kel hung lhantin, chutengle chun Egypt gamsunga ima ma anatha lhin chu kisumil gama, kellhah chun agamsung abah gam jeng ding ahitan;
chutia hiche nunga hung lhung ding kel lhah ding chu akhoh behseh jeh chun agamsunga ima ma athalhin lam kihedoh louhel ding ahitai.
Chuti chu ahin, Pharaoh’in mang a vela nanei kit na ajeh pentah vang chu athilsoh ding hi Pathenin agontohsa ahitan, ahintoh doh loi jeng ding ahitai, tina ahi.
Hiche jeh chun tun Pharaoh’in mi thil hetnem le chingtah khat lhengdoh hen lang amapa chu Egypt gamsunga pansah jeng hen lang,
chujongle Pharaoh‘in thilsoh vetup ding mi pansah henlang, ima ma athalhinna kum sagi sung chun agamsoh hop nga dongkhom hen;
chule amaho chun ahung lhung ding kum phasungsea anneh chengse chu lhoh khom uhen lang, Pharaoh thu thua dingin khopi sung dunga neh dingin lhoh khom uhen lang ngah uleh;
kum sagi sunga Egypt gamsunga kel hung lha ding doudoh na dinga chu neh dinga ana kikholdoh thei ding, chutia chu kel lhah chun gam hi asuh gam lou ding ahiye,” ati.
Athilsei chu Pharaoh mitmu le asohte jouse mitmun aphat toh lheh jengin;
hijeh chun Pharaoh’in asohte jah a chun, “Eihon midang hichepa tobanga achunga Pathen lhagao umna mi hi imudoh jou mong dingu hinam?” a tin;
hijeh chun Joseph jah a chun Pharaoh in, “Pathenin hichengpi-hi nahetdoh sah tah jeh hin midang koima nang banga thil hethemle aching umlou vah ahijeng,
nangma ka-insung semangpa nahi ding kami te jong abonchauva nangma kama bou chon ding ahitauvin, laltouna dola chubou keima nang sanga kaletjoh mai mai ding ahi,” ati.
chuin Pharaoh chun Joseph jah a, “Ven keiman nang hi Egypt gam pumpi semanga katun nahitai,” atin;
hiti chun Pharaoh‘in akhut’a amohor khutjem chu asut lhan Joseph khut’a abupeh-in, tupat ponnem hoitah tah ponsil asilpeh-in, chule angonga sana khivui agah opeh tan ahi.
Hichun ama chu akangtalai ahoipen, ni lhinna chun atousah-in amasanga chun mihon “Dilsu vo!” tin asamuvin ahi. Hiti hin aman Joseph chu Egypt gam pumpi semangin anapansah tai.
Hicheng kalval jong chun Pharaoh’in Joseph jah a, “Keima Pharaoh kahin, ahivangin nangma thulouva Egypt gamsung pumpia hi, mihem koimachan akhut alap a akal ason thei lou ding ahi,” ati.
Pharaoh’in Joseph chu amin Zaphenathpaneah asah-in, chule On thempupa Potiphera chanu Asenath chu aji dingin apetai. Hichun Joseph’in jong Egypt gam pumpi agakholsoh keiyin ahi.
Egypt lengpa Pharaoh koma anatong dinga alut chun Joseph kum som thum alhingtai. Chuin Joseph chu Pharaoh angsunga konin apotdoh-in Egypt gam leiset pumpi agakholsoh keiyin ahi.
Chujouvin ima ma thalhinna kum sagi sung chun leiset jong aga pha lheh jenge;
Egypt gamsunga ima ma athalhin pet kum sagi sung chun an neh ding alhoh khol kholin, chule khopi tina akholsoh keiye; akhopi tina chun akimvela loujaova kon an neh chu akhol khom cheh-in ahi.
Joseph chun chang chu asungkhom khom jengin, twikhanglen pang neldi jat aphahsah a, atam behseh phat’a ate naje um thei louva amoh ngah jeng masangsen asung khome.
Kel lhah kum hung lhun masang chun On thempupa Potiphera chanu Asenath chun Joseph dingin chapa ni anahinpeh-in;
Joseph’in apeng masapa min chu Manasseh asah-e; “ijeh-inem itile” aman aseiyin, “Pathenin kathoh gimna jouse le kapa insung pumpi eisuh milsah tai,” ati.
Achapa ani lhinna pa chu, “Kagentheina gamsunga Pathenin chale nao eineisah tai” atijeh-in amin Ephraim asah in ahi.
Chuin Egypt gamsunga haona kum sagi chu ahung beitan ahile,
Joseph sei bang chun kel lhah na ding kum chu ahung lhung pan tan ahi. Hiti chun gamtina kel alhasoh keitan, ahivangin Egypt gamsunga chun an neh aumnai.

Egypt gam pumpi jong ahung kel phat’uvin mipin Pharaoh henga an neh ahin thum cheh tauve; hichun Pharaoh injong Egypt mite jah a, “Joseph henga cheuvin lang aman naseipeh peh-u chu bol jenguvin,” atipeh-e.
Chuta gamsung pumpia kel alhahsoh phat’in Joseph‘in changsal jouse ahongdoh-in, Egypt gamsunga kel akhoh behseh phat chun Egypt mite henga ajoh joh tan ahi.
Hiche kalval jong chun leiset pumpia kel akhoh behseh phat chun leiset mi jouse Egypt gama Joseph henga chun chang kichoh din ahungtauve.
Egypt gama chang aume, ti Jacob’in ajah doh phat’in achapate ho jah a, “Ipi dinga kiveto chel chula umah nahiuvam?” a tin;

aman jong “Veteh, keiman Egypt gama chang au me, ti kajai hilanga chun chesuh-uvin lang ikihinso thei na dingu ahiya, ithi louna pou pou dingu ahile, eiho dingin khulama konin chang gacho tauvin,” ati.
Hijeh chun Joseph sopite mi som khat chu chang cho dingin Egypt gama achesuh tauve.
Jacob chun Joseph naopa Benjamin chu thilse khat’in toh khante tia agel jeh-in asopite chutoh asolthapoi.
Hiti chun Israel chapate jong chu Canaan gamsunga kel ahahsat behseh a puh cho dinga che mi dangho chutoh kilhonin acheuvin ahi.
Joseph chu Egypt gamsunga vaipon anapangin, gamsung mite dinga changjoh vaibol jong chu ama anahi; Joseph sopite jong chu ahunguvin ahenga ahung bohkhup uvin amaiyu tola asulut jenguvin ahi.

Joseph’in asopite chu amu phat’in abonchauvin ahesoh keiyin, ahivangin amaho chu hetphah lou bolin, hutot tah-in ahouvin chule ajah-uva, “Hoiya kona hung nahiuvam ong?” atileh, amahon jong “Canaan gama kon kahiuvin, puh cho dinga hung kahiuve,” atiuvin ahi.
Hiti chun Joseph’in asopite ahiu ahenan, amahon la amapa ahepha pouve.
Chuin Joseph chun amaho chung chang thudola mang ananei chu ageldoh-in, hijeh chun ajah-uva, “Nangho hi aguh lan mi nahiu hilou ham, agam lhahsamna vetohlea nahungu hiya hi,” atileh;
amahon jong ajah a, “Ahipoi kapu, nasohte hi puh cho dinga hung kahibouvui.
Kabonchauva pasal khatseh cha te kahiuvin, keiho mi kitahjeng kahinauve, nasohte hi aguh lan miho kahi hih heluve,” atiuve.
Hichun amanla ajah-uva, “Hilou chu, gam lhahsam dan vetohle dinga hungah nahibouvu chu,” ati nalaiye.

Chuphat’in ama hon jong “Nasohte keiho hi sopi som le ni kalhinguvin, Canaan gama mi pasal khatseh seh chapate kahibouvui; chujongle vetan alhumpenpa chu tuhin kapau toh aumin, khatpa la aum tapoi,” atiuve.
Ahivangin Joseph chun ajah-uva, “Hiya chu, keiman nahenguva kasei banga chu aguh lan mi nahiu hiya chu.
Hichea hi nakipatep dingu hiya chu, nasopiu alhumpenpa chu hikoma ahung lhun louva ahile Pharaoh kiti ahinlaisea hikoma kona napotdoh thei lou dingu hita chu!

Nangho lah a khatpen pen soluvin lang nasopipau chu gapuisah tangu, nangho adangse chu songkula um uvin lang, mitah nahiuvam nathusei chengseu chu kipatep’in tin, mitah nahi louvu va ahile Pharaoh kiti ahin laisea nangho chu aguh lan mi mong mong nahi dingu hiya chu!” atitai.
Hiti chun aman abonchauvin nithum sung dingin songkula akhumtan ahi.
Nithum lhinnin Joseph chun ajahuva, “Keima Pathen ging mi kahijeh-in nangho nahin theina dinguvin hiche boltauvin;
chutia nangho mi kitah nahiuva ahile nasopiu khatpen pen nasongkul lutnauva hin kihen densah jenguvin, adangse chun na-inkoteu kel douna ding chang gathah peh tauvin;
chutengle nasopiu alhumpenpa chu kei henga nahinpuiyuva, chutia chu nathuseiyu hi kisuchen ding, hiche teng le chunbou nathi lou dingu ahiye,” atipeh-e. Amahon jong chutin aboltauve.

Hichun amaho khatle khat akihouvun, “Isopipau chung changa hi eiho themmo chang mong mong ihibouvui, eihon alung gimpet tah imu uvin, ihenguva a tao tao jeng van gin ina ngaisah hih hel uvin, hichejeh a chu hiche gimna hi eiho chunga hung lhunga hita hi,” akitiuve.

Reubenin amaho chu ahouvin hitin aseiye, “Keiman najah-uva hita hi kanaseisa hi lou ham? ‘Boipu chunga chu’n chonse hih heluvin’ kati leh, nei ngaisah peh louvu hilou ham? Vetau ama thisan phu chu hung kidela hita hi,” ati.
Amaho kah a chu pao ledoh khat aum jeh-in, amahon akihounau Joseph’in ahet thei lam ahepouve.
Joseph amahoa kon chun akiheidoh-in agakap tai; chujouvin ahengulva ahung kile kit nin akomuva thu aseiyin, chuin Simeon chu alah-uva konin akaidoh-in, adangho mitmu laitah-in asomtai.

Joseph‘in amaho chu a dip cheh-u chang asun dim peh-uva , asum mu jong ama ama dip cheh-a alekhum peh-uva, chule akhol lampiuva anehpa dingu an neh ding agonpeh na dinguvin miho thu apen; hitobang chun amaho dlngin akibolpeh cheh tai.
Chuin amahon achang u chu asanganteu chung a akhangdoh, cheh-uvin chuche muna konin achetauve.
Ajan gepanau muna alah-uva mi khat’in asangan an peh ding agon, adip chu agah hopdoh a ahile, vetan ama sum ma ma chu adip kam china ana um amudoh tai;

hijeh chun aman jong asopite jah, “Ka sum chu eina kilekhum peh in, vetan kadip kam china hin ana um thop’e!” atileh; chutah chun alungthimu alinglao gamtan khat le khat ti kithing pum pumin akijon lut touvin hitin aseiyuve, “Pathenin ichunguva abol hi ipi thil hiya hitam?” atiuve.
Amaho Canaan gama apau Jacob heng ahung lhun phat’uvin achunguva thilsoh jouse ama jah a aseipeh uvin hi tin aseiyuve,
“Mipa agama pipu pa chun keiho hutot tho jengin eihouvun, keiho pi agama aguh lan mi jeng danin einabol uvin ahi.
Ahivang chun keihon jong ajah a, “Keiho mi kitah mijeng kahiuvin, aguh lan kahipouve;
keiho sopi som le ni kahiuvin kapau khatseh chapa jeng kahibouvui; khatpa la a um tapon, alhumpen pa chu tun jong kapau toh Canaan gama aum nai,” katiuva ahile,

hichun mipa agamsung pipu pa chun keiho jah a,‘Hichea hi nangho mi kitah nahiu kahet chet ding ahi, nasopiu khat pen pen kei koma dalhauvin lang, chule na-insung miteu kel douna dingin chang kipoh-uvin.

Chutengle nasopiu alhumpen pa chu kei henga hin puiyuvin, hiche le chun keiman nangho hi aguh lan mi nahi pouve, mi kitah nahinauve, ti kahetdoh a, chuphat leh nasopipau napeu ving ting nangho jong agamsunga hi nakivei le thei dihgu ahi,’ ati,” tin aseiyuve.
Adip’u chu alhei lhauvin ahile vetan amitakip in asum chun cheh chu ama ama dip sung cheh a ana umsoh keiye; amahon jong apauvin jong asum chun chengseu chu amudoh phat uvin akihot lhul gam tauve.

Hichun apau Jacob in amahojah a, “Nangho hin kachate neichan sah gamu hita hi la em! Joseph la a um tapon, Simeon la aum kit tapon, Benjamin puidoh kit’uvin lang hi leu chun! Hichengpi hi aboncha pul kadou dou ding ahita ong!” ati.

Hichun Reubenin apa jah a hitin aseiye, “Keiman ama hi nahenga kahin nung lhut kit louva ahi ngei ngeile kachapa teni khu natha jeng ding ahi, ama chu keima khut mong monga neipe doh-in lang, ken jong ama hi nangma henga hin nung lhut tei teiying kate,” atin ahi.

Ahivangin la aman, “Kachapa nangho toh kilhon suh theiponte, asopipa la thita a, ama achang leng lenga adalhah ahitan, lamkim lang nagei tengu le lam kah lah a toset khat tohkha ta hen lang hile kasam kan nungjenga jong lunghema thikhol khula neilhoh lut paitah bah dingu ahibouve,” ati.
Gamsunga chun kel akhoh lheh jengtai;
chule amahon Egypt’a kona achang poh chengseu aneh bei phat’uvin apau vinjong ajah uva, “Chekit uvin lang anneh them khat beh nei ga choh peh kit tauvin” atileh;
Judah chun ajah a hitin aseiye, “Mipa chun eiseipeh masah dim dem uvin hitin aseiye,‘nasopi pau toh nahung kilhon lou pou pou uva ahile kamai namu louhel dingu ahi,’ ati.
Kasopipau toh neisol tha dinguva ahivangle chesuh-u ving katin anneh ding nagachoh peh jeng uving kate;

ama toh neisol tha lou dinguva ahivangle chesuh deh pouving e, ajeh chu ami pan keiho jah tah a,‘nasopipau toh nahung kilhon lou pou pou uva ahile kamai namu louhel dingu ahiye,’ tia seita chu,” atin ahi .
Chuphat chun Israel jong, “Ipibep natiu ahile amipa jah a chu‘sopi khat kanei nalaiyuve’, tia nahinsei doh-uva hi bang loma hi nei engbolu hi tam?” a tile;

amahonjong; “Ami pan keiho eidong chen dim demuva, keiho thudol ahiya, kaki naipi chengu ahiya; aman hita seiya,‘Napau hing nalaiyam?’ tia keihon jong thu hichengpi eidoh jeh-uva kiseipeh a hichula am;‘nasopi pau nahinpuisuh dingu ahi,’ tia ahin sei jeng ding lam chu keihon iti kana het masah thei dingu ba ham?” tin aseiyuve.
Hichun Judah-in apa Israel jah a, “Boipu chu keima toh neisol tha jengin, kipat uving ting chetau vinge, chutile keiho kahiuvin nangma nahin, nacha natute ahiuvin ikihinso pen dingu ahibouve;
keima tah ama khel dingin kitung jeng ing kate, keima khut’a ama na ngeh ding ahi jenge. Ama hi kahin nungpuiya na-ang sung kahin lhut louva ahile hinkho lhum keiya themmo changin um jeng tange;
neina lho chon chon louvu hibonle tua hi nivei beh jong kakile phat’u ahitai,” ati.

Chuphat’in apau Israel chun ajahuva, “Chuti ding mong ahiya ahile hiti hin ki gonguvin; gamsunga thingga phalai cheh lheng khomuvin lang, thingnai, lou them khat le khoiju them khat toh, thil namtui toh, thei chang toh, chule jonmot chang toh nadip sunguva mipa peh ding chun posuh-uvin;
chule nakhut’uva sum jong ajat nia tamjon kigonuvin lang, nadip kamuva ana um sum hung kinungle jong chu kikhutsip tha cheh-uvin, mukhel khat touva jong kibol hithei ahiye;
chuteng nasopi pau jong kipui yun lang kipatdoh-uvin mipa henga chun kile kittauvin;

Pathen hat chungnung chun mipa angsunga khotona napeu hen lang, aman jong nasopiu khatpa le Benjamin nahinsol peh tei teiyu hen; kei vang chu pul kadou ngai banga chu pul dou gun ding hitang kate,” ati.
Hichun amahon jong thilpeh ding ahin, sum ajatnia tamjo chutoh akigontoh-uvin, chuin Benjamin jong akipuiyun, akipatdoh-uvin Egypt lama achesuh-uvin Joseph angsunga aga ding tauve.

Benjamin toh ahung kilhonu amudoh phat’in Joseph chun insung thil chingpa jah a, “Miho khu insung lama gapuilut’in lang gancha anathat’in, honsan anakoiyin, ajeh chu miho khun sun tengle an eineh khompi dingu ahiye,” atin ahi:
Joseph‘in aseipeh bang chun mipan jong abolin, miho chu Joseph insung lama agapuilut tai.

Joseph insunga akipui lut jengu amudoh phat’uvin miho chu akichauvin; “lche masah-uva idip sunguva sum anaki nung hetlut jeh a hikoma hi eipui lut’uva, chutia chu mi, khat hin hehset neu neuva, kitaole na einei dingu, chutengle eiho chengse soh a eineiyuva isanganteu aboncha akilah got hiya ahitai!’ akitiuvin;
hijeh chun Joseph insung thil chingpa henga chun acheuvin, inpi kotphung laitah a chun akihoupiuvin,
hitin asei yuve, “Vo kapu, amasaa puh kichoh mai maiya kahung suh-u chun,

ka jan ge na ding munu kagei phat’uvin kadip-u kahondoh-uva ahile ami takip kasumu abonchan ajat lhingset cheh-in ama ama dip kam cheh a ana umin ahi; hijeh chun keihon hiche chujong kahin po kit’uvin,
chule anneh chohna ding sum dang jong kakhut’uva kahin konsuh tha cheh nauve; koipenin kasumu kadip’uva anakoi hiding ham, ka he hih heluve,” atiuve.

Hichun amapan, “Lungmon nan umpiuvin, kicha hih heluvin, na-Pathenu, nahingpau napau Pathen chun nangho dinga nadip sunguva gou nakholpeh-u hitei ding hiya chu, nasumu jong kei kachang tae,” a tin, chuin Simeon chu ahenguva ahin puidoh peh pai paiyin ahi.
Hiti chun mipan Israel chate chu Joseph insung lama ahinpui lut’in, twi apen, amahon akeng phang akisiluvin, chule mipa chun asanganteu chu an anehsah tai;
chule amahon jong sun teng Joseph ahung teng peh ding thilpeh chu agong toh-uvin ahi; ajeh chu hikoma chu an aneh dingu ahi, ti anajah sau ahitai.
Joseph in lama ahung phat’in amahon akhut’uva thilpeh ding aneiyu chu insung lam ama henga ahin choi lutuvin, Joseph henga chun tola abohkhup cheh tauve.
Hichun aman jong amaho damle damlou thu adongin, chujongle “Napau tehsepu naseipau chu dam dama hinam? Tugeiya hing nalaiyam?” tin adonge.
Amahon, “Nasohpa kapau chu adam jingin tugeiyin ahing nalai nai, atiuvin; chujouvin akun cheh-uvin asalam cheh tauve.

Hichun ama akhodah-in ahile asopipa Benjamin anu sung peng mong mong chu amudoh-in, hijeh chun, “Kahenga nasopi, nanao lhumpenu naseipau chu hi chepa hi hiya ham? Pathenin nalungset hen O kachapa!” a tin,
Joseph chun asopipa avoujang natpi behseh jeh chun kin loi tah-in ka na ding aholin, hiti chun mun chom khat‘a achedoh loiyin hikoma chun aga kaptai.
Chujouvin amai akiphet’in, chule akitim nah nah-in, “Ankong hinsemu vo,” atin ahi.

Hijeh chun amahon Joseph ding atumin, amaho ding atumin, chule amatoh nekhom ding Egypt mite ding atumin ankong asemtauve, ijeh-inem itile Egypt miten Hebrew mite toh an aneh khom ngailouvu, neh khom ding chu Egypt mite dinga bohna khat hiya ahiye.

Amaho chu atahle adon dungjuiyuvin, apeng masapena pat adong pen geiyin Joseph angsunga abanchan atougol soh keiyuvin; hichea chun miho chu amaho le amaho khat le khat atinaje hetlou khop’in akiveto to jenguve.

Amaho chan ding chu Joseph chan lah a konin asoh doh-uvin ahi; chujongle Benjamin chan chu amaho khat chan jat sangin chan ajat ngan atamjoi. Hitobang chun amahon Joseph chutoh anekhomuvin adon khomtauve.
Joseph’in ainsung thil chingpa chu thu apen hitin aseiye, “Miho khu apoh khop cheh a akipoh dinguvin adip’uva neh le chah khumpeh-in lang, ama ama sum cheh khu ama ama dip kama koipeh cheh-in,
chule keima khon, dangka khon chu anao lhumpenpa dip kama khun achang achohna man ding sum chutoh khumtha peh-in,” ati. Aman jong Joseph sei bang bang chun aboltai.
Jingkah khovah lhah chun amaho ahiuvin asanganteu ahin asoldoh tauve.

Amaho chu khopia kon chun achedoh nauvin gamla pi agei masanguvin Joseph in jong ainsung thil chingpa jah a chun, “Kipatdoh-in lang miho nung chu del loiyin, amaho chu naphah tengle ajah-uva,‘Ipi ding pentah a kaphat nau thilpha chu thil gilouva nei lethuh-u hitam ong? Ipi dinga keima dangka khon chu nanaguh mangu ham?
Hiche khon hi kapu twi donna hilou hiya, chule hichea hi phun asan ji hilou ham? Hiche nabolu vang hi thilse naboldoh-u ahitai,’ tin gaseiyin” ati.
Aman amaho aphah phat’in hiche thu ho chu aseiyin ahile,
amahon jong ajah a, “lti dana kapun hitobang thu ho pi nasei hitam? Nasohte dinga hitobang thilbol kiti chu hithei him him lou hel ding ahibove!

Vetange, kadip kamuva kamudoh-u sum jeng jong chu Canaan gama kona nahenga kahin nungpoh peh kit’uva chu! chuti chan geipi chu ahile itidola napu ina kona keihon dangka ham sana ham chu kaguhdoh jeng dingu ham?
Koi hijeng jong le nasohte lah a akimudoh tha na pen pen chu ama jong kihing hoi pontin chule keiho jong kapu henga soh chang jeng uving kate,” atiuve.
Hichun aman jong, “Ahile nasei bang bangu chu hihen lang, chutia akimudoh tha na pen pen chu kei soh dingin um jeng hen, nangho dangse vang themmo chanda tauvin,” atipeh-e.
Chuphat’in abonchauvin ama ama dip cheh tola akidop lhah loiyuvin, amichan cheh chun ama ama dip cheh chu akihondoh soh keiyuve.
Aman a-upa pena pat’in alhumpen geiyin ahol soh keiyin ahile, khon chu Benjamin dip sunga akimudoh tai.
Chutah chun amahon aponsil lungsatah-in abottel gamuvin, amitakip ama ama thilpoh cheh chu asangan chunga akidop doh-uvin khopi lama ahung kinungle kittauve.
Judah le asopite Joseph ina ahungu chun Joseph ana um jing nalaiyin, amaho aangsung tola abohkhup cheh-uvin ahi.
Hichun Joseph’in amaho jah a, “lpi dinga thilbol hitobang pi hi nabol uham? Kei hi phun san thei mihem kahi nahet louvu ham?” ati.

Hichun Judah chun, “Kapu henga ipi ikatiuva, ipi kaseiyuva iti kakisei theng dingu hi tam? Pathen chun nasohte setna amudoh tai! neihin vetauvin kapu dinga keiho hi sohchang kahiu ahitan, keiho jong kahiuvin, akhut’a khon kimudohna pa jong ahitai;” ati.

Ahivangin aman, “Kei dinga hitobanga thil bol ding chu hithei him him lou ding ahibouve, akhut’a khon kimudohna pa chubou kasoh a pang ding ahin, nangho vang lung mong tah-in napau heng lam jontou tauvin,” ati.

Chuphat’in Judah-in jong Joseph anailut’in, “Vo kapu nahenga katao ahi nasohpa hi kapu jah dingin thu cheng khat beh neiseisah-in lang, nasohpa chunga lung hang loujen’in, ajeh chu nangma hi Pharaoh masap nahi jenge.
Kapun asohte nadongin hitin naseiye,‘Napau um nalaiyam ahiloule sopi dang khattou nanei nah laiyum?’ natin

hijeh chun keihon jong kapu henga,‘Kapau tehsepu khat aum nalaiyin, chule atehset nunga ahin kit kasopiu pasal khat aum nalaiye, ama sopipa la athitan, chule nusung khat peng lah a ama changseh bou umah ahitai, hijeh chun apan alungset lheh jengin ahi,’ katiuvin!
hichun nangman jong nasohte jah a hin,‘Kahenga hinpui suh-uvin keiman kamit tah in mu ing kate,’ natin ahi.
Keihon kapu jah a,‘Boipun apa dalha thei hih hel inte, dalha hen lang hi le apan athilo tahbah ding ahibouve,’ kanatiuva ahile;
nangman nasohte jah a hin,‘Nasopi nanao lhumpen pau nahin puisuh louvuva ahile kamai namu louhel dingu ahi, tin nanaseiyin;
hijeh chun nasohpa kapau henga kachetou phat’uvin kapu thusei abonchan ama koma kaseipeh soh keiyuve.
Chujongle kapauvin,‘Chekit’uvin lang neh ding them khatbeh neiga Chohpeh kit’uvin,’ tia asei chun,

keihon jong,‘Chesuh thei pouving kate! kasopiu alhumpenpa toh kakilhon vangule chesuh nauvinge, ijeh-inem itile kasopiu alhumpen pa toh kakilhon louvuva ahile keihon mipa mai chu kamu louhel dingu ahibouve,’ katiuva ahile,
hichun nasohpa kapauvin jong keiho jah a,‘Kajinun chapa ni le lei bou eihin peh ahi, ti nanghon nahet cheh-u ahin,
khatpan la eidalhatan, ama chu atel adah a kijenthang hitei ding ahitai, tin kanaseiyin, hiche kalsen amel him him kamu kha tapoi.
Kakoma konin hiche neipuidoh peh kit’uvin lang toset khat toh kha jeng ta leh, kasam kan nung jenga jong lunghema thikhol khula neilhoh lut paitah bah dingu ahibouve,’ tin anaseiye.
Hijeh chun tun nasohpa, kapa henga kache tengle boipu hi keiho toh kilhonta hih le, ama hinkho chu Boipu hin kho hi toh kikhen kang theilou ahijeh chun,
boipu hi keiho toh kaki lhonlouvu amudoh teng le chun thi lo bep’in tin, chuta chu nasohte hin nasohpa kapau samkangsa chu lunghema thikhol khula kalhoh lut pai tah bah dingu ahibouve.
Amonga jong nasohpa ni kapa henga boipu khela hi hung kitung doh jenga hitia hi,‘Keiman ama hi naheng kahin nung lhut kit louva ahile nahenga hinkho lhum keiyin themmo chang jeng ing kate, kati ahi.
Tun hiche jeh chun kataove, nasohpa hi boipu khel chun kapu soh dingin umden jeng inge, boipu chu asopite toh kilhontou sah jotan.
Ajeh chu boipu beiya iti pena jong kapa henga kachetou pen dingu hitam! Achutiloule kapa chunga hung lhung ding setna chu kamu tei ding ahiye,” ati.

Joseph chu akoma dingho angsunga ama le ama akitim lel hel phat’in ahung pengjah jengin, “Mihem jouse kahenga konin potdoh sah jenguvin,” ati. Hijeh chun Joseph asopite henga ama le ama akiphondoh chun mihem khat cha jong akoma ding nalaiya aumpoi.
Ama O thongin akap’in ahile, Egypt mite ahin, Pharaoh insung mite ahiuvin ajasoh keiyuve.
Joseph chun asopite jah a, “Keima Joseph kahibouve, kapa chu hing nalaiya hinam?” atileh, asopiten la amapa adonbutje ahetapouve! ijeh-inem itile ama angsung laitah a chu moh tijat thigam ahitauve.
Joseph chun asopite jah a, “Lungset tah-in neihin nailut’uvin,” atiphat’in ama honjong anailut uvin ahile aman, “Keima nasopipau Joseph, Egypt gama najoh mangpau chu kahiye.
Tun hikoma neinajoh mang jeh-u hin lung genthei nan jong neidauvin lang chule mit ha hoimo nan jong neidauvin, ijeh-inem itile kihinso theina dinga Pathenin nangho masanga einasol masah ahibouve.
Ajeh chu kum ni sung hin gamsunga kel alhatan, loubolna theilou dingle chang at thei louna ding kum nga ma aum nalaiyin ahi.
Leiset chunga hi nangho dinga phabep beh hinso teina ding le akihinso chengse chu hing jinga aum theina dinguva Pathenin nangho masanga einasol masah ahibouve.
Hijeh chun hikoma einasola chu nangho nahipouvin Pathen joh ahi! ama chun Pharaoh din a pan eisemin, ainsung pumpia apun eisemin, chule Egypt gam pumpi vaipon eisemtai.
Kapa henga chetou loiyun lang ajah a,‘Nachapa Joseph chun hitin aseiye, “Pathenin Egypt gam pumpi chunga vaipon eisemtai, kahenga hung loi jengin, kinomsot hih helin.
nangma Goshen gama nachen a, nang hin lang nachapate natute hijongleu, nakelngoihon ho hihen lang naganchate hijongle abon cha kakomcha naum dingu ahi.

Hikoma chun keiman neh le chah na nato nange, ijeh-inem itile kel lhah nading hi kum nga jen aum nalaiye, achutilouva ahile na-insung mi chule nanei jouse navai mah thah pai dingu ahi,” ati,’ gatiuvin.
Chule ven nangho mitmu changtah le kanao Benjamin mitmu chang tah a keiman hiche thu kasei hi namutauve.
Chujongle Egypt gamsunga kaloupina le nathilmuu aboncha hi kapa naseipeh tei tei dingu ahi, hijeh chun kinomsot louvin kapa chu hikoma gapuisuh loi chel jenguvin,” ati.
Hichun anaopa Benjamin chu angongkoiyin akaptai, chule Benjamin jong chun Joseph angong koiyin akathuh jenge.
Chuin aman asopite abonchan abeng chop soh keiyin achunguva akap soh keiye; hiche jou chun asopiten akihoulimpiu vin ahi.
“Joseph sopite ahunguve,” ti thuthang chu Pharaoh insunga akijadoh tan ahile Pharaoh le asohten pha asa chehuve.
Joseph jah a Pharaoh chun, “Nasopite jah a seiyin lang hiche hi boluvin, “Naganchau thil pohsah-uvin lang Canaan gama cheuvin;
napaule na-insung mi gapuiyuvin lang kei henga hunguvin, keiman Egypt gama gampha laitah napeuving ting, nanghon agamga naneh dingu ahi,’ tin
amaho chu thupeh hiche jong hi pen lang hitin boluvin,‘Nachasen chengseu leh najiteu pohna dingin kangtalai ho jong kitoluvin lang chule napau jong hinpuiyuvin lang hunguvin.
Nathilkeo chengseu jong it hih-uvin, ajeh chu Egypt gam pumpia aphalaitah chu nanghoa hiyah ahitai,’ tin,” ati.
Israel chapaten hiti chun aboluvin, Joseph’in jong amaho’ chu Pharaoh thupeh dungjuiyin kangtalai tampi apen, akho lamuva dingin neh le chah ding jong agonpeh-e.
Abonchauvin amichang cheh chun golvah von apen, Benjamin vang chu dangka shekel ja thum le golvah von ngajen apei.
Apa dinga thil athot chu sangan som khat poh khopset Egypt gamsung thilpha jeng ahin, sangan som khat poh khopset chang ahin, changlhah toh ahin, apan khol gama aneh ding, neh le chah toh ahi.
Hiti chun aman asopite asoldoh-in akipatdoh doh-u chun aman ajah-uva, “Lampi dunga kinapa hih heluvin,” ati.
Hiti chun Egypt gama konin achetouvun, Canaan gama apau Jacob henga ahung tauve.

Amahon ama chu aseipeh-uvin hitin atiuve, “Joseph pi chu ana hing nalaiyin, chule Egypt gam pumpia vaipoa khu ama hijah ahiye,” atiuvin ahinah vang chun Jacob’in la amaho atahsan loujeh-in alungthim akiloh deh poi.

Hijongle amahon amapa chu Joseph’in amaho jah a asei jouse chu aseipeh-uvin ahi; chujongle ama tolna dinga Joseph’in kangtalai asol ho chu Jacob’in amudoh phat’in apau Jacob chu alungthim ahung haljah jengtan;
hijeh chum Israelin jong, “Kachapa Joseph ahin nah lai cha chu! a val umlouhel ahitai!’ che jeng ing katin kathi masanga ama kamu ding ahi,” ati.
Israel chu anei jouse toh akitol than, Beersheba ahinphah phat’in apa Isaac Pathen henga kilhaina gantha thilto tampi abolin ahi.
Hia chun jana mu aneinaa Pathenin Israel henga thu ahinseiyin, “Jacob, Jacob,” ahintin ahile, aman jong, “Hoijo!” ati.
Hichun aman, “Keima Pathen nangma hingpa napa dinga jong Pathen chu kahiye! Egypt lama chesuh ding kicha hih, ajeh chu khukoma jong keiman nang hi nam lentah kasosah ding nahi;
keima tah-in Egypt’a nakilhonsuh ping ting, chutengle kahintou pui kit ding nahi, chule Joseph khut mong mongin nathi mit hinsinsah nante,” ati.
Chuphat’in Jacob chu Beershebaa konin akipatdoh-in, hiti chun Israel chapaten apau Jacob le achasenteu chule ajiteu chu Pharaoh-in apau pohna dinga ahinsol kangtalai hoa chun akjtoltauve.
Amahon Canaan gamsunga alamdohsau gancha ho le thilkeo chengse akitoluvin Egypt gama ahung tauve, hichea chun Jacob chu achilhah chengsen ahin kilhonpiuve,
achapate ahin, atute ahin, achanute ho ahiuvin, atunu ho ahiuvin, Jacob sungkon chengsen abonchauvin Egypt geiyin ahin kilhonpiuvin ahi.
Israel sungkon Egypt’a hung ho chengse chu aminu hicheng hicahi, Jacob le achapate ahiuvin, Jacob chapa masapen Reuben ahin,
Reuben chapate chu Hanoch ahin, Pallu ahin, Hezron ahin chule Carmi ahi.
Simeon chapate chu Jemuel ahin, Jamin ahin, Ohad ahin, Jachin ahin, Zonar ahin, chule Canaan numeinu chapa Shaul toh ahi.
Levi chapate chu Gershon, Kohath chule Merari ahiuve.
Judah chapate chu Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez chule Zerah ahiuvin; Er le Onan vang chu Canaan gam sunga athiden lhontai. Perez chapate ni chu Hezron le Hamul ahilhone.
Issachar chapate chu Tola toh, Puvah toh, lob toh chule Shimron toh ahiuve.
Zebulun chapate chu Sered le Elon toh chule Jahaleel toh ahiuve.
Hichengse hi Leah chapate ahiuvin, Paddan-aram gama Jacob dinga achanu Dinah toh anahin tha peh ahiuve; achapate le achanu te abon bonin mihing som thum le thum alhinguve.
Gad chapate chu Ziphion le Haggi toh, Shuni toh, Ezbon toh, Eri toh Erodi toh chule Areli toh ahiuve.
Asher chapate chu Imnah ahin, Ishvah ahin, Ishvi ahin, Beriah ahin, chule asopinu-u Serah toh ahiuve. Chujongle Beriah chapate ni chu Heber le Malchiel ahilhone.
Hiche ho hi Labanin achanu Leah anakenpeh Zilpah chapate ahiuvin, aboncha hi Zilpah-in Jacob anahinpeh cheh ahiuvin, mihing som le gup ahiuve.
Jacob jinu Rachel chapa teni chu Joseph le Benjamin ahilhone.
Chule Egypt gama chun Joseph’in jong On thempupa Potiphera chanun anahinpeh chapa Manasseh le Ephraim anahinge .
Benjamin chapate Bela ahin, Becher ahin ahin, Ashbel ahin, Gera ahin, Naaman ahin, Ehi ahin, Rosh ahin, Muppim ahin, Huppim ahin, Ard ahi.
hicheng hi Rachel chapate, Jacob anahinpeh ho ahiuvin, abonchauvin mihing somle li ahiuve.
Dan chapate chu Hushim ahiye.
Naphtali chapate chu Jahzeel ahin, Guni ahin, Jezer ahin, chule Shillem ahi.
Hicheng hi Labanin achanu Rachel akenpeh Bilhah chapate ahiuvin. Bilhah chun Jacob anahinpeh ahiuve, abon bonin mihing sagi ahiuvin ahi.
Egypt’a hung Jacob mite chu mihing ama taiguiya peng mong mong Jacob chapate ji te sim louvin, mihing abonchauvin somgup le gup ahiuve!
chule Egypt gama Joseph chapa teni chutoh ahin, Jacob insung mihing mong mong Egypt gama hunglut ho chu som sagi alhinguve.
Jacob chun ama masanga Goshen gama Joseph angsunga lut masa dingin Judah asol masan, chuti chun amaho Goshen gamsunga ahung lut tauve.
Chuphat’in Joseph’in jong akangtalai akigot’in Goshena apa Israel lamto dingin achetoutai; apa chu atahsa tah-in akimupin, angong koiyin angongbula akiloiyin phat sotpi akap’e.
Joseph jah a chun Israelin jong, “Tun vang hinga na uma namai kamu chet ahitan thi jeng tange,” atitai.
Hichun Joseph‘in asopite le apa insung mite jah a, “Keima chetou ving ting Pharaoh jah a thu galhut ing katin ajah a,‘Canaan gama cheng kasopite le kapa insung mite kahenga ahung tauve!
amaho ho khu gancha vahte ahijeh uvin kelngoi ching mi ahiuvin, hijeh chun akelngoi hon tampiule gancha tampi chule aneijouseu ahin kikaiyuve,’ tin gaseiyinge.
Pharaoh chun nahin kouvuva chule‘Ipi natong mi nahiuvam?’ tia nadoh tengule,

nanghon,‘Nasohte hi, keiho jong kapu kapateu jong kaneocha lhah uva tuni geiya gancha vah mi kahiuve,’ tiuvin, chutile Goshen gama nachen thei dingu ahi; ijeh-inem itile kelngoi ching mi tapou chu Egypt mite dinga thet umtah ahiye,” atipeh-e.

Hiti chun Joseph achelut’in Pharaoh henga thu agah lhut’in, “Kapa le kasopite akelngoi ho jouseu le aganchau toh chule aneijouseu toh kilhonin Canaan gama konin ahung lhung tauve; tuhin Goshen gamsunga aumuve,” agati.
Aman asopite lah a konin jong mi nga apuiyin amaho chu Pharaoh henga aphongdoh-in ahi.
Pharaoh chun Joseph sopite jah a chun, “lpi natong mi nahiuvam?” atileh, amahon Pharaoh jah a, “Kapu ku pateu bang banga nasoh te hi kelngoi ching mi kahiuve,” tin aseiyun ahi.

Amahon Pharaoh jah a chun, “Canaan gamsunga kel alhah khoh-a nasohte hin kelngoi vahna ding hamhing kamu joulou phat’uva hiche gamsunga khopem dinga hung kahiuve; hijeh a chu katao jengu ahitai, nasohte hi Goshen gamsunga neichen sah tauvin,” atiuvin ahi.
Chuphat’in Pharaoh chun Joseph jah a, hitin aseiye, “Napa le nasopite nahenga hung lhungta chu,

Egypt gam na-angsunga uma chu me, napa le nasopite hi gamsunga gampha laipen tah losah-in lang, Goshen gamsunga chun chensah jeng tangem; chujongle ijem tia amaho lah a chu mi kiti thei thim nahet auma ahijongle amaho chu keima gancha vaipo dingin pansah jeng tangem,” ati.
Chuin Joseph chun apa Jacob chu ahinpui lut’in Pharaoh angsunga adinsah a ahile, Jacob’in jong Pharaoh chu phatthei aboh tai.
Hichun Pharaoh vin Jacob jah a, “Nahinkho hi ni ijat mong kum ijat mong lhing tam?” a tile

Jacob’in Pharaoh jah a chun, “Kakhopemle na nikho jat le akum jat mong hi kum ja khat le somthum alhingtan, keima hin nikho kum jat mong hi lhomchabou ahin, hinkho nomlou tah ahin, kapu kapate akhopem lai nikhouva ahin nikho kum jat jong aphajou naisai poi,” ati.
Hichun Jacob’in Pharaoh chuphatthei abohin, Pharaoh angsunga kon chun apotdoh pai paitai.
Joseph’in apa le asopite akhochensah tan, Egypt gamsunga aleiset goulo dingu jong, Pharaoh thupeh dungjuiyin gam phalai tah Rameses gamsung chu apetan ahi.
Chujongle Joseph’in apa, asopite chule apa insung kon mi jouse abonchauvin chapang kamhei thei dungjuiyin neh le chah apen akhangtai.
Kel akhoh behseh jengtan ahile gam sunga la neh le chah abeitan, Egypt gam le Canaan gam jong kel jeh chun akigenchat pai lhontai.
Joseph chun Egypt gamsungle Canaan gamsunga achang choh nau dangka jouse akhomsoh keiyin, chule hiche sum chu Joseph’in Pharaoh ina ahinpoluttai.

Egypt gamsungle Canaan gamsunga jong sum a man jouhel phat’uvin Egypt mite abonchauvin Joseph henga ahunguvin hitin aseiyui, “Neh le chah neihung petemuvin, ipi dinga nang mitmu sana kamoh thigam jeng dingu ham? Ajeh chu sum abeisoh tai,” atiuve.
Joseph chun, “Naganchau hinkaiyun, sum beisoh ahitah leh naganchau toh lhet dingin napenau vinge,” ati.

Hijeh chun amahon Joseph henga aganchau ahin kaiyuvin, Joseph’in jong sakol te le kelngoihon te, gancha te toh chule sangante toh lhet dingin amaho chu neh le chah apen, chuche kum lhung keiyin agancha teu toh lhet dingin neh le chah akhange.

Hiche kum chu akichai phat’in akum kit chun amaho Joseph henga ahunguvin ajah a, “Kapu koma impou vinge, sum jouse la abeisoh ahitan, chule gancha honpi la kapu changsoh ahitan, katahsau le kagam leiset’u tilou hi imacha kapu angsunga akikhendoh umlouvah ahitai.

Ipi dinga nang mitmua kamoh kel thi jeng dingu ham, keiho kahiuvin kagamu ahin? Neh le chah toh lhet dingin neikichoh jenguvin, keiho kahiuvin, kagamu pum hin Pharaoh sohin pang uving ting, thi louva kakihinso theina dingule agam leiset jong hi akeolhola akijam hel louna dingin muchi jong neipeuvin,” atiuve.
Joseph in Egypt gam pumpi chu Pharaoh dingin achohpeh tai, ajeh chu kel chun hahsa tah-in alhun khum jeng phat’uvin Egypt miten alou jousen ajohsoh heltauve; hijeh chun agam chu Pharaoh achangtai;
chule mipi chu aman Egypt gam among lang khat’a pat’in among lang khat geiyin soh-in asemgam sihseh tan ahi.

Achohdoh lou chu thempu ho gam seh seh bou ahitai; ajeh chu amaho hin Pharaoh phatsah a gam bih aneiyuva, hijeh a chu hiche Pharaoh vin amaho apeh gambih sunga chu kivah anahiuve; hiche jeh a chu amahon agamu anajoh doh louvu ahiye.
Hichun Joseph’in mipi jah a, “Veteh keiman tunia nangho jong nagamu jong Pharaoh dinga kachohdoh nahitauve; ven nangho dingin muchi akikoiye, tolkeo dunga muchi hi naga tu dingu ahi.
Chang at tengle hop nga a hop khat chu Pharaoh nahinpeh uva, hop li chu nalouma natu dingu le na-insung mite navah na dingu, chule nachasente navahna dinguva nangho chan ding ahi,” ati.
Chuphat’in amahon, “Neihinsou ahitan, kapu mitmun jong lung lhaina hihen lang, keiho jong Pharaoh soh hitauvinge,” atiuvin ahi.

Hiti chun Joseph’in Egypt gam chung chang thudola chondan khat’in anaphutdoh-in, tuni gei hin ading jing nalaiyin, Pharaoh ho khun hop nga a hop khat chu akilah ding ahi; thempuho gam leiset chu bou Pharaoh chang theilou ahi.
Hiti chun Israelte Egypt gamsunga Goshen gama chun anachenguvin, gou tampi akholdoh-uvin, cha le nao ahing theiyuvin chule hapun punin apungtauve.
Egypt gamsunga chun Jacob kum som le kum sagi sungin anachenge, hijeh chun Jacob ahin nikho kum jat jong kum ja khat le kum som li le kum sagi alhingin ahi.

Israel chu athitei ding nikho ahung naitul tul phat’in aman jong achapa Joseph akouvin ajah a, “Namitmua nangma kalung lhaisah jouva ahile gunchu tah le kitah tah a neibolna dingin kataipigui noi tuh-in lang Egypt gama neihin vui louhelna dingin kitep’in;
kapu kapate toh neihin lupsah than, Egypt gama konin neipodoh-in lang amaho lhanphunga neihin vuiyin,” atileh; aman jong, “Nasei bang bang chun hinbol nange,” ati.
Hichun aman “Kakoma kihahselin,” atileh~ ama jong apa koma akihahsel tai. Chujouvin Israel chu alu lhuna abohkhup’in ahi.
Thilsoh hichengse kichai nung chun Joseph jah a, “Ven napa anai,” tin akiseipeh-in ahile, aman jong achapa teni Manasseh le Ephraim chu apuipeh tai.
Jacob jah a, “Nachapa Joseph nahenga ahungtai,” tia akiseipeh phat chun Israel jong ahung kibol nah nah-in jalkhuna ahung toudoh e.
Jacob chun Joseph jah a, “Pathen hat chungnung chu Canaan gamsunga Luz khoa kakoma ahung kilah-in phatthei eiboh-in,

kajah a,‘Neihinve temin keiman nacha nanao phatthei sah ing ting kapunsah ding, mipi kou-lhen khat kahisah a, chule hiche gam hi nangma nunga nason nachilhah te tonsot goulo dinga kapeh ding ahi,’ ati.
Chule tun nachapa teni Egypt gamsunga nahenga kahung masanga hiche Egypt gama nahin teni hi keimi ahilhone; Reuben le Simeon banga Ephraim le Manasseh hi keimi hilhon ding ahi.
Amani nunga cha le nao nanei vang chu nangmi hi nante; amani vang asopite goulo min lah a kisim tha ding ahilhone.
Chule Paddana kon a kahung chun Rachel chun Ephrath hinphah ding konin Canaan gamsunga lampia eina thiden tai, ken jong ama chu Ephrath kiti Bethlehem lampia kanavuitai,” ati.
Israelin Joseph chapa teni chu amudoh phat’in, “Hiche teni koiba ham?” atileh,
Joseph chun apa jah a, “Pathenin hikoma eipeh kachapa teni chu ahi lhone,” ati. Hichun aman, “Anilhona phatthei kaboh na dingin kahenga hinpuiyin,” atin ahi.
Israel chu atehset behseh jeh chun amit athimin kho amuthei tapoi. Hijeh chun Joseph’in achate ni chu ahinpuilut peh-in ahile, Jacob’in amani chu achop’in akipomtai.
Hichun Israelin Joseph jah a nangma mai mu ding jeng jong kana ginchat lou ahitan, vetemin Pathenin nachate ni geiya jong eimusah ahitai,” ati.
Chuin Joseph’in amani chu apa pheichunga konin adomlhan, ama jeng jong tola amai asulut’in abohkhup’e.

Joseph chun achate ni chu ani tah lhonin akaiyin, Ephraim chu akhut jetlamin Israel khut veilama chun akailutpeh-in, chule Manasseh chu Israel khut jetlama, akhutveilamin akailut’in, anilhon chun amapa henga apuiluttai.
Hichun Israelin jong akhut jetlam alhangdoh-in adongjo pa Ephraim lujanga angamin akhut veilam chu a-upa jo Manasseh lujanga angamin, akhut teni chu apelton ahi.

Hichengse hi Israel phung som le ni chu ahiuvin chule apauvin ama ama dinga akitohbep cheh phattheinaa phatthei abohpet’a ajah-uva anasei athusei chu ahi.
Jacob’in amaho chu thu apen ajahuva, “Keima ka mite toh eikigom ding ahitai, Hit mi Ephron loumuna songlhana chun kapu kapa te toh neihin vuithauvin;
hiche songlhan chu Machpelah loumum Mamre nisolam, Canaan gamsunga um ahin, Abrahamin lhanmun dinga Hit mi Ephron henga aloumun anachoh doh ahi.
Hikoma chu Abraham le ajinu Sarah jong anavuiyuva, Isaac le ajinu Rebekah jong anavuiyu ahin, ken jong Leah kanavuiye,
aloumun le asunga um songlhan chu Hit mitea kona kichodohsa ahitai,” ati.
Jacob chun achapate athulhah chai phat’in jalkhun chunga akengphang teni asepdoh-in atantai; hiti chun amite toh akigomtan ahi.
Hichun Joseph’in apa mai le amai asuton, along chunga akap’in, chule achop’in ahi.
Joseph chun asohte louthem ho chu apa long amon mang louna dinga limbol dingin thu apen, hijeh chun lou themhon Israel chu amon lou na dingin aboltauve;
amon mang louna dinga limbolna ding chun thil manchah tamtah angaiyin, hichena ding chun nisom li jen angaiye, Egypt miten jong ni som sagi sungin aka gun set’uve.

Amapa dinga ka na nikho akichai phat’in Joseph chun Pharaoh insung mite jah a hitin aseiye, “Nangho mitmua lungset theiya ka uma ahile lungset tah-in Pharaoh koma thu neisei pehuvin lang hitin neiti peh uvin.

‘Kapan eiki hahsel sah-in hitin anaseiye vetan keima athi ding kon cha kahitai. Canaan gamsunga keima mong mongin kakikhensa songlhana chun neihin vuiyin” tin aseiyin ahi. Hijeh chun tun lungset tah-in neisol touvin lang kapa neiga kivuisah tei teiyin, chujou tengle hung ki le kit nange.’ tin aseiye nei ga ti peh uvin.” ati.
Hichea hin Pharaoh chun aseiyin, “Chetouvin lang napan nakihahsel sah bang chun napa gakivui tangem,” atipeh tan ahi.
Hijeh chun Joseph jong apa vui dingin achetoutai; amapa chu Pharaoh sohte le ainsung upa ho chule Egypt gamsunga upa chengsen akilhonpiuvin ahi.
Joseph insung mite le asopite ahiuvin, apa insung mite jong ahiuve; Goshen gama chun achasenteu le akelngoi hon chengseu le aganchateu bou adalhauvin ahi.
Joseph pum chun kangtalaiho ahin, sakol chung touthem ho ahiuvin akilhon tou cheh-uve; amaho chu hon tamtah alhinguvin ahi.
Amaho chu Jordan vadung gal Atad changphol ahung geiphat’uvin halunghemin alunghem uvin, lung genthei tah-in alunghem uvin ahi; chule aman nisagi sungin apa op gun dingin aboltai.

Agamsung cheng-te Canaan miten Atad changphol a thi-op lunghemna amu uvin ahile, “Hichepi hi Egypt mite dinga lunghemna nasatah ahitai,” tin aseiyuve. Hijeh chun hichelai mun chu amin Abelmizraim akisah-in, Jordan vadung gala aume.
Jacob’in achapate athupeh bang chun achapaten anaboluvin,
ama chu Canaan gamsunga apolut’uvin, Abrahamin lhan mun dinga Hit mi Ephron koma aleimun toh achoh tha Mamre nisolama Machpelah loumuna songlhan sunga chun avuitauve.
Apa avuijou phat’in Joseph chu apa vui dinga akilhontoupi chengse le asopite chutoh Egypt lama ahung kile kit tai.
Joseph sopiten apau thi amu chen phat’uvin, “Joseph hin eihin hotboluvin tin eihon ama agilouva ibolnau abonchan eihin lethuh jeng khat’uvinte,” tin aseitauve.
Hijeh chun amahon Joseph henga thu athot’uvin hitin aseiyuve, “Napan athi masang chun hiche thupeh hi eina peuvin hitin ati,

‘Joseph henga hiti hin seipeh-uvin lang, “nahenga katao ahi, nasopiten nachunga thil gilou aboluva suhkhel aneinau chu ngaidamin,” tin aseiye tiuvin,’ ati. Hijeh chun keiho nahenga kataovui, nahingpa napa-Pathen sohle suhkhelna chu ngaidamtan,” atiuve; ajah a athusei jeh-u chun Joseph akaptai.
Asopite jong chu ahunguvin amasanga abohkhup cheh-uvin, “Neiveuvin keiho nang dinga nasoh jeng kahiu ahitai,” tin aseitauve.
Ahinla Joseph’in ajah uva, “Kicha hih hel uvin, keima Pathen khela lom kahim?
Nangho ngaitoa chu kei dou na thil gilou soh dinga nagelu anahin, Pathenin thilpha lamin aheidoh tan, tunia ahinthei bangu hin mi tamtah hinso dingin eisemjo tai.
Hijeh chun tun kicha hih helun, keiman nangho jong nachasen jouseu jong neh le chah nakhang nauvinge,” ati. Hiti chun aman avelin amaho chu akinepsah kit’in, abonchauvin alung mon kit’e.
Joseph chu ama jong, apa insung mite jong Egypt gamsunga anachengtai. Joseph chu kum ja khat le kum som anahinge.
Chule Joseph chun Ephraim chate chu akhang thum lhinna atuson geiyin jong anamui. Joseph thaguiya peng Manasseh chapa Machir chate jong anamupeh-in ahi.

Chuin Joseph’in asopite jah a, “Keivang kathina ding anai lam tan, ahivangin Pathenin nangho nahung viltei teiyuvin tin, hiche gama kon hin Abraham, Isaac chule Jacob henga anaki hahselna gama dingin nahin puitou vunte,” ati.
Hichun Joseph’in Israel chate chu ahahselin hitin aseiye, “Pathenin nangho nahung viltei tei dingu ahin, chutengle nanghon keima gubuh jouse hi hikoma kona napoh lou dingu ahi,” ati.
Hiti chun Joseph chu kum ja khat le kum som khat alhinin anathin, amahon amon mang louna dingin alimboluvin along chu Egypt gamsunga thingkong sunga akoitauve.
